Friend, Tonight is the end of July, and it marks a crucial crossroads for my campaign to defeat Jim Jordan. We are now entering crunch time for a campaign like ours that is taking on a well-funded incumbent with a reputation as the most ruthless and unethical Member in the GOP House. The presidential primary election is right around the corner, and every reporting deadline will be closely scrutinized to see if my team and I are raising the resources needed to defeat Jim Jordan. **We cannot allow Jordan to skate by without being held accountable for his many awful and divisive statements and votes** —the voters deserve so much better than Jim Jordan’s awful absent leadership. I am so excited about the campaign we are building together, and our ability to finally unseat Jim Jordan. Ohio needs us. America needs us. We cannot fail to step up and rise to this challenge. I know that we can win if we dig deep and do everything we can to run the strongest campaign possible. **[If you can help me defeat Jim Jordan by making a last minute contribution before midnight tonight, I greatly appreciate your support:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67389723/419529171/1649708063?refcode=eom-july23-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk5ZmYxNjAtZmUyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ynDU4e_727w-0bKWbgK816a08G4KQc0I8qHEoev23aE=)**

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Help us make sure America gets to hear from all of their options this Presidential Election Cycle. | | | | | Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK, Jr.'s Road to the White House 2024
body:
Last week the censorship of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. reached a new low following his historic testimony.

| | |
---
* * *
---
Dear Peter, Last week the censorship and attacks on RFK, Jr. reached a new low following his historic testimony before the House Judiciary Committee on the weaponization of the federal government. If you didn’t think things could get any worse than Democrat members of Congress trying to censor a presidential candidate, consider the fact that last week **the Biden administration**[**refused a routine request to provide Secret Service protection for RFK, Jr,**](https://www.kennedy24.com/biden_administration_denies_rfk_jr_secret_service_protection?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=1) whose father was assassinated during his 1968 presidential campaign. **While the Democratic Party is stirring up hate against Mr. Kennedy** for running against President Biden, the Biden administration denied Mr. Kennedy's Secret Service protection. Yet, the Secret Service provides his own son, Hunter Biden, with protection. Despite this bad faith from Democrats, Mr. Kennedy’s popularity keeps rising, as **[a new Harvard-Harris poll found that RFK, Jr. has the highest favorability rating](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUb15GfFOozYufodRq4R3zcJHo3_T9j6vRAQztVBWqh2_6hJ_yPAQWZwHCRkOMHghXditOjaMOmS35xhCaLlc8VUewpJ89EwJ9yd-6HJ9WhkP&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=2 "RFK, Jr. leads

in the polls") of any candidate**, including President Biden and former President Trump.
---
* * *
---
---
**[Robert Kennedy Jr. Would Be Winning 2024 if it Was Popularity Contest](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUb15GfFOozYufodRq4R3zcLv3yBUS3FXqMx4OYedjQ6wR7jdlPOl15sJPe6KyACIpwFv-Cu_kaqD7B3AxjegPiJcaUnrlgxvywZjJFiy2tv28rciw4sP204EE8hkCThIBw&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=3), Newsweek
**_“Going off recent Harvard/Harris polling released last week, for example, Kennedy's net favorability rating of +21 (meaning his favorable numbers are 21 percentage points higher than his unfavorable numbers) was 35 points higher than Biden's as the president remained dogged by an anemic -53 favorability rating.”_****[**The New York Times Lied About RFK, Jr.’s Covid Comments**](https://www.kennedy24.com/new_york_times_lied_rfk_jr_s_covid_comments?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=4)**, The Hill
** Robby Soave of The Hill gives his take on how the mainstream media mischaracterized Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s comments and testimony on Capitol Hill[](https://www.kennedy24.com/new_york_times_lied_rfk_jr_s_covid_comments?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=5). **[“Newsweek Asks Robert F. Kennedy Jr: Why Not Stop the Conspiracy Theories?”](https://www.kennedy24.com/newsweek_robert_kennedy_jr_why_not?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=6 "Newsweek Asks RFK Jr Why Not Stop the Conspiracy Theories?") Newsweek
** _"My father told me when I was a little boy that people in authority lie and the job in a democracy is to remain skeptical. I've been science-based since I was a kid. Show me the evidence and I'll believe you, but I'm not going to take the word of official narratives,"_ RFK, Jr. explained.[ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUYneIgp2qqh_ux0lM54xyZC3Pv2fBFdUOw83AiCMX7s1DnjvEGszGr9FXE8V9ZZWa9cRDmB0lW7AGRRq7eFuNXnz9Coh0J9fBwCgHjN6ZL9IHUjYIjNtY__L331wWAfKwA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=7) **[RFK Jr. says the media criticizes him more than Trump](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv7U3LzVBLp8k-0xe7s2388JqNFYB-dDWbFo7cx6jnlv3zCmhrRYBRFTukNlWRwbX4_lZ6i45Xji6iBZTnO_yrZzMyOP4Hrw7lhLFG18CjJLZ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=8), The Hill
**“ _It’s interesting to me because I have been really slammed in a way that I think is unprecedented, even more than President Trump was slammed by the mainstream, by the corporate media,”_ Kennedy said.[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv7U3LzVBLp8k-0xe7s2388JqNFYB-dDWbFo7cx6jnlv3zCmhrRYBRFTukNlWRwbX4_lZ6i45Xji6iBZTnO_yrZzMyOP4Hrw7lhLFG18CjJLZ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=9) **[RFK Jr rips White House’s ‘bad decisions,’ won’t say whether Biden is fit to serve as president](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fId1A_uelYLKHXcZJkxcF9JnU2fZYjVwps3r0_2dlMA3pzWMJKAUU2I4XbGNyMbWRUqAdjlWJJk-KdvGek3xyhod9JPSFEZdMhiKkKC9ztzCEm2LKDnKhdKAH7yoKPkiLk&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_on_the_road_to_the_whit&n=10), Fox News
**_"What I've tried to do during this campaign is avoid personal attacks on people. I will say, whether he's up to it or not, whether he's making his own decisions – the decisions that are coming out of the White House are bad decisions,”_ said Mr. Kennedy.

Kennedy, Jr. reached a new low following his historic testimony. | | | Dear Peter, Last week the censorship and attacks on RFK, Jr. reached a new low following his historic testimony before the House Judiciary Committee on the weaponization of the federal government. If you didn’t think things could get any worse than Democrat members of Congress trying to censor a presidential candidate, consider the fact that last week the Biden administration whose father was assassinated during his 1968 presidential campaign. While the Democratic Party is stirring up hate against Mr. Kennedy for running against President Biden, the Biden administration denied Mr. Kennedy's Secret Service protection. Yet, the Secret Service provides his own son, Hunter Biden, with protection. Despite this bad faith from Democrats, Mr. Kennedy’s popularity keeps rising, as "RFK, Jr. leads in the polls" of any candidate, including President Biden and former President Trump. , Newsweek “Going off recent Harvard/Harris polling released last week, for example, Kennedy's net favorability rating of +21 (meaning his favorable numbers are 21 percentage points higher than his unfavorable numbers) was 35 points higher than Biden's as the president remained dogged by an anemic -53 favorability rating.”**, The Hill Robby Soave of The Hill gives his take on how the mainstream media mischaracterized Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s comments and testimony on Capitol Hill. "Newsweek Asks RFK Jr Why Not Stop the Conspiracy Theories?" Newsweek "My father told me when I was a little boy that people in authority lie and the job in a democracy is to remain skeptical. I've been science-based since I was a kid. Show me the evidence and I'll believe you, but I'm not going to take the word of official narratives," RFK, Jr. explained. , The Hill “ It’s interesting to me because I have been really slammed in a way that I think is unprecedented, even more than President Trump was slammed by the mainstream, by the corporate media,” Kennedy said. , Fox News "What I've tried to do during this campaign is avoid personal attacks on people. I will say, whether he's up to it or not, whether he's making his own decisions – the decisions that are coming out of the White House are bad decisions,” said Mr. Kennedy. Kennedy, Jr. in a conversation with some of America's most innovative farmers. Mr. Kennedy will ask and answer questions, and learn from real farmers on the ground about the practicalities of transforming our nation's food system. Every week we'll send you the most impactful and top trending social media posts so you can stay up-to-date on Mr. Kennedy's campaign. Please click below to follow along and share the on the latest developments with your friends & family. Follow 29.7 Million views "Since the assassination of my father in 1968, candidates for president are provided Secret Service protection. But not me. Typical turnaround time for pro forma protection requests from presidential candidates is 14-days. After 88-days of no response and after several follow-ups by our campaign, the Biden Administration just denied our request. 1.1 Million views The World Values stage dialogue w/ Reb. Shmuley “There is an alarming trend in the Democratic Party to describe Israel as an apartheid state. This rhetoric is dangerous and inaccurate.. It’s time to set the record straight. “ 873.7 K views Looking forward to joining this Twitter Space tomorrow with leaders of the community. Follow Instagram Americans have lost trust in their government Americans no longer trust their government, and they no longer trust the press. As president, I promise that the government will start telling the truth again. False Accusations against RFK, Jr. The accusations recently leveled against me by rank and file democrats are false. Here is the proof. #Kennedy24 Healing from a Wartime Economy We have money for military bases, and bailouts, and bombs, but what happens to the American people when they fall on hard times? Who will have compassion for them? Thanks for your support of Mr. Kennedy's campaign, every like, share, and conversation we have online or in person helps put RFK, Jr. closer to winning the race to the White House in 2024. Please share widely and join Team Kennedy! * | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Join Kennedy · CA 90049, United States

Fellow American,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0If46KuTbNn_CkIMqgWcTC9bx0DDIA31y5HbzzDoMHHyhqGMY2ru61V-l1kHhWdwXAQxs88XBrx9IeuUHOmzcB_TESrx4TVnNVIWz5gGBfkJvNMYy4mb1Y4XqhxzX1pq_fxkMo48VzvQAOCpSkbJju9FrTkrmkQVcQoOEMOUs8-V2w%3D%3D)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0Ici5YtPoPAID4Iig-LsQybB4wssueLHhkBKiPk_fz85eExioozZz8o8ouZjVMjkNJqoA9a_QtfgkdBawPnBOPQ0XvWeCqQ2EcWb1qrtpFzQuuruxu86a8o-QsgUsXTPRs5ZTNuzVezeZZlZqW4h-tMmkFN5Z8ouTFzn5LnIRSLzDQ%3D%3D)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0IeP5dsuOmTs_qkbp7MoUZFKVQ8NSR12CW23GI73hp05H9sNlonpXjMgvfZjFgVZ6ZWqO0aUV2lXWZ5VIHQRtlXYohSg9CdlJ1KdAYGYlMj6mHVFBgqE_WUZBTwVUo7j_oOdl1Jdup-rZEzFnmhWTqhXi2iFW2L0GYraFPvw0PaQxw%3D%3D)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0IdIu3_KWt8OnAKXS17tfxMlc1_fzgt_JVCPfYTuewjYGgrFiZDj3DfAA1U8s0TAtWS_I_6ifFrW7y2ozovLLSi9R8CwKBmqRrRCHZ0ONO4mvk982H-E1JDtkqceFfwQdY-CIJkvWTRBAA19BO68ej8GWjV_4W6gMHSYCt6zw6wMBQ%3D%3D)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0IdMzVyJfKw-f4ItDsXUPE_AHZL8qG1PclotipQ0jTleZe6qoJXVqxo02LuEHognG56c81unjLG0xhMp3nlKKz5GH-8gszgnbGhYbhm5AawU-YZjbbZOz6BdHhpporgjv5l5ZkwhKxqcrpwYgbSKLfxGJRdbtfxjJ-VxOs-HhMd0JQ%3D%3D)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b578d31b8aeb4afbb92dacade9f0c5d1&_e=O206Nx2eBH7o_-tCNvFfY0bhZfQ-Bl3zw4xQ_E9b8-KRUv5WreUlpazfZAIyY4VOQc3gs4Imt-r0zPB_91DJ9rNqrwzHXs44s8GsUDfHMx8fonb5fajfV_0XbBZRPvRGrVyUFQhPy--BlA2KIBfsnJg7JNnq4CRbmPW9A32EE-4OaJVFvigHtkDaSQHG3WJCeez0YGC8ng-Iy0jsXbONgK1GRmoP3TK-B_ywvejF0IedwYTEjnihqp52D6udFrNvPEYZ2h5YeItoZ_FixridbPFHh4izfD9ITdwviZNrUZkXEGtfRsFDm0yZIulZOMQxvKWYa0J5fCL9oECXAcFb8w1oacF0awzyq1Z9RwTAP3P_w-UcaXPAe6K9P1sK5L2SjMZH-OduhpdvzaFmXHe-Bw%3D%3D)

Friend, I know we’ve been emailing you a lot over the past few days, but I just got out of a meeting with my team and I wanted to keep you in the loop. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67390346/419531835/-2072809413?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQyMjBlOC1mZTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rci-HlsMVjr60S4jxgPR9J-Ha6P6GMHxwkkx5lqptVA=)

Friend,
I know we’ve been emailing you a lot over the past few days, but I just got out of a meeting with my team and I wanted to keep you in the loop.
According to the latest fundraising report, we’re still just 8% short of our goal. With just a few hours to go, it’s clear this is going to come down to the wire, and we need all hands on deck.

body:
Last chance to secure your spot >>
| This is urgent.

As you know, President Biden is neck and neck with Donald Trump in several new polls — **_and now, his approval rating is dropping!_**

The best chance we have of fighting back is if we demonstrate a GROUNDSWELL of grassroots support. _But our July deadline is just a few hours away!_

**You’ve been hand-picked as one of our top local Democrats,** [**so please secure your spot as a July President Biden supporter before it’s too late »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50874?t=6&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER) | **OFFICIAL PRESIDENT BIDEN SUPPORTER MEMBERSHIP** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50874?t=7&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER) **NAME:** On File
**DATE:** JULY 31, 2023
**DEADLINE:** **MIDNIGHT**
**SUGGESTED DONATION:** [**$7 — GIVE NOW!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50874?t=8&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER) | [**REPUBLICANS WILL DO ANYTHING TO STEAL BACK THE WHITE HOUSE: PLEASE, GIVE $7 IMMEDIATELY! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50874?t=9&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER)

Please don’t delay,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9656%2E878179%2E6DvqER).**

clean_body: This deadline is coming up fast | | | Hola Peter, I'm taking a few minutes tonight to reach out to you all because this is another big deadline for our campaign. Your support — whether in the form of donations, showing up to events, sharing your concerns with me, or on the ballot next year — means the world to me and to everyone at Team Vallejo. Because of your contributions helping us meet deadlines like this, we are able to keep this a grassroots campaign that stands for the people of TX-15 and the American Dream. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Stefanie Brown James
subject: how YOU are powering us here at The Collective PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Wb-mKo5E4Hc-XlhSn_R8kxpzKrOl2p57i2qPLhtFHmDhDROM-Sj5JaCW8NS0ob40U0LA4Im5XGM91RJBtQyyyP-TGVhN7NSLq7hl-x7aLeC1UalbgXFUZoi3N7wTKT-WgweDeOpNeviNgh4MhB21a3igPgccjm9VQztzQaxxAvcMJxH8mTB1TuR3JdEsxWJV2Z7aTuebp1ysfkP4irYktqZkw3vt55Sf7xZri9vqV80XvfeF8yOhKNb_b0trlgpbcoymWLx7KumHg3Lg9xIJVOIEDF9QHYUipYraTuRrej420MJJfdQ1f39qhGCzxoJlEOxtPKimIckkBtGj5iPNkLc6-R-72eKz4PCSfxx1kP3CjIBQtnVGfiUd1HgChzYTQ/3yd/T2z85uMXR4CwI7TC8_HWYw/h0/L9J80ArE675CfI-ftceee--SJsCKklHZRyYlRGMPWm0) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5Ztx-W3mU_00qcgCHGc5q9p9rea4fbDETOD8Rrm1DDD9m-n56y-wqGlfsrvBFRtIEAYPhdQTEIGgDB2y4wXyIjObjQg07T9QiHzH7OXh0Obmv2sIJyKGXz0BoHXnuNtFpwjIqRnt_CmWW9oZ85Han9H9fC7jzRvUh2FnKaMhvnOnOBW30WBXf_9go3UjJeHdxVvoNSs8BqVW89Dwnq71gzxpuFgHJubsYfyXfJOsfjEIQD7_xlY2M9kVxzJigg_nqqYH6YQMyiOMinoCmJDRe7oJx__Hb0PFKtyvORxlkb9WhStdCC1riL1Vn16JVdcai5nMrFV2-C5hmaYn_FF1BuhrHzOcYMETQlGFnqoBc5QKLlySpoQTM24845YQkggoQ8e1TEt0TE7sgzZt3ck50tVkU5vjWQ_RUjDsbOvZDaMsYF699LR7_C-n2aCD54aLz/3yd/T2z85uMXR4CwI7TC8_HWYw/h1/l9YfkpOeN0ITKMB23U19rfq8vYK_DNwP2VUE8dCkLVM) Peter, can I have your attention for just a second?

Our books for the month close at midnight, and last time I checked in with my team here at The Collective PAC — we were still 18% away from reaching our goal. At this point — every dollar counts.

Now I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails right now, all asking you for donations. And you’re probably wondering: _"What will you do with the money if I donate?"_ **That’s a fair question, Peter!

So let’s talk about it.
**
In 2022, we endorsed 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot — and that doesn’t just mean saying we endorsed them, we put our money where our mouth is and support them financially.

And with high stakes elections coming up THIS November for candidates all across the country — from Pam Stevenson (Attorney General, KY), Shawn Wilson (Governor, Louisiana), and Sheila Jackson Lee (Mayor of Houston) — we can’t wait until 2024 to help fund their races.

These candidates need our support NOW, Peter. And that’s why we’re asking for yours.

[Focusing on local elections is KEY to addressing the underrepresentation of the Black community in elected offices. Will you help us support our endorsed candidates across the country by donating $10 today? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5Ztx-W3mU_00qcgCHGc5q9p9rea4fbDETOD8Rrm1DDD9m-n56y-wqGlfsrvBFRtIEAYPhdQTEIGgDB2y4wXyIjObjQg07T9QiHzH7OXh0Obmv2sIJyKGXz0BoHXnuNtFpwjIqRnt_CmWW9oZ85Han9H9fC7jzRvUh2FnKaMhvnOkj-Ipu0ueeUn1vcfdwdDnWGsr67Yk8VzeZXLWLG26sF2Pea_vQfOf6Ms17ymHcNjNec0Wy4j6tNWsPzIsa-yI6PpzMRMhyXwHy2eyCQPZfF1GFt3oHn0FktHZ3Ns-XIOaoOQAQMIACtZslwWnN9IzLatL1jcuwTthyNLLzqCrAXGkmmb1vLpBb9qihDg8P8azY0ahmqg2yM-MdNtp7hKByEkkpFgNh78SkizlgkFUdS_Lg2ozOuxa1r8wfZUsA_q9BOx8GFSGrw4btvDb46Tmu/3yd/T2z85uMXR4CwI7TC8_HWYw/h2/-BhST5l9m9C5ceNSVeIvBd2fdr2rdzdCGJBtNrUdEKk) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, can I have your attention for just a second? Our books for the month close at midnight, and last time I checked in with my team here at The Collective PAC — we were still 18% away from reaching our goal. At this point — every dollar counts. Now I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails right now, all asking you for donations. And you’re probably wondering: "What will you do with the money if I donate?" That’s a fair question, Peter! So let’s talk about it. In 2022, we endorsed 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot — and that doesn’t just mean saying we endorsed them, we put our money where our mouth is and support them financially. And with high stakes elections coming up THIS November for candidates all across the country — from Pam Stevenson (Attorney General, KY), Shawn Wilson (Governor, Louisiana), and Sheila Jackson Lee (Mayor of Houston) — we can’t wait until 2024 to help fund their races. These candidates need our support NOW, Peter. And that’s why we’re asking for yours. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Stefanie Brown James The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . #
Hi folks, the race is on. We’re just a few hours away from our first end-of-month deadline of the new fundraising quarter, and **[I’m hoping you can pitch in just $3 (or maybe a little more) tonight to get us to our goal — and let me explain why the stakes are so high.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67390791/419536296/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=3&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230731_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTYyZTZlNi1mZjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JHgtF2tnXcncQdkCSSGNtnogvfu7IWPP9D6uiJHypPA=)** I don’t mean to sound alarmist, but the consequences of losing our Senate majority are very real. **It’s not just about losing legislative battles; it’s about jeopardizing the progress we’ve made and stalling the momentum for change.** With MAGA Republicans openly pushing to gut benefits for working families, cut taxes to billionaires, and ban abortion nationwide — we simply can’t let that happen. Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are even talking about _impeaching President Biden_. It’s beyond ridiculous — but that’s the reality of the extreme MAGA agenda. We need to seize the moment and fight back against the growing MAGA movement by defending our Democratic Senate majority. **[So, what do you say? name: Tammy Baldwin (iPhone)
subject: I’ll be candid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| My team tells me we’re still pacing behind.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=771%2E35263%2Er7dyNZ)
Hi Peter — Tammy here! Our team has been busy working to rally the support we need to reach tonight’s 10,000 donor goal. We’re short on time, so I’ll keep this brief. I’ll be candid: the fight ahead of us to defend this toss-up seat won’t be easy — but building up the resources to fight back against potential self-funding Republican opponents will put us in the best position possible to keep Wisconsin blue and defend our majority in the Senate. The number one way to do that is by staying on track to reach our fundraising goals, but I just got word that we’re still pacing behind on tonight’s goal with just hours to go before the deadline. Will you rush in any amount before midnight to close the gap? I’m really counting on your help, and you can use this personal donation link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-jul23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230731_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=771%2E35263%2Er7dyNZ)** Thank you, Peter. Your support will go a long way in this race. — Tammy _Sent from my iPhone_

name: Linda
subject: july deadline in a few hours…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
As we inch closer to the 2024 election, the work we build now will be the foundation of a successful campaign.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67390944/419538215/919917611?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230731-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjY4Mzk3OC0wMDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAzsu0LJtVnXDnGa02EfA9CyOcTKCyKixkduiJWQrkM=)
---
| Peter,

A strong campaign is built on a strong network of supporters.

As we inch closer to the 2024 election, the work we build now will be the foundation of a successful campaign.

Peter, I want to make sure I’m making myself clear.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, I am committed to empowering progressive Latinos across the country to run for office and WIN. With Republicans intent on setting us back decades on everything from voting rights to reproductive justice, **_we need to make this count._**

[**_I need you on my team. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Ritchie (personal)
subject: the power of lived experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
I ran for Congress to better the community that raised me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67391027/419540477/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2EzYTYwMS0wMTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S69XhmcyuO-vitRJXFSyTlf2B55leCHDFkK6xR1dAVA=)
---
Hi Peter,

As we approach our end of month deadline, I wanted to reintroduce myself, and remind you why being a public servant is so important to me.

_My name is Ritchie Torres._ **I’m the son of a single mother, a product of public housing, and a proud Afro-Latino gay man.**

I know what it’s like to barely scrape by. I know what it’s like to save every penny.

I ran for Congress to better the community that raised me.

name: Mary (America First Legal)
subject: AFL Continues to Defend Free Speech
body:
| | [](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVsAAB_qyboAAAAPclwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkyFByUOpWlJB6SUmmc_M_RmusLgAXqZI/1/PS5fCgCdVR88J8MHy2x54g/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vcl8yMDIzMDcyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXdlZWtseS1kb25vciZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBH)
---
Fellow Patriot, I wanted to bring you up to speed on the latest developments in our long-running battle to defend free speech in America.Today, Elon Musk’s X Corp (formerly Twitter) threatened legal action against the shadowy, anti-First Amendment organization “The Center for Countering Digital Hate” (CCDH), over the group's false claims of rising hate speech on the platform: [_https://twitter.com/xDaily/status/1686023589621882881_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVsAAB_qyboAAAAPclwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkyFByUOpWlJB6SUmmc_M_RmusLgAXqZI/2/rUMJDUBz5e7_6xeEYWsUzw/aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS94RGFpbHkvc3RhdHVzLzE2ODYwMjM1ODk2MjE4ODI4ODE) In March of 2021, CCDH published a report labeling a dozen influential COVID lockdown skeptics as “The Disinformation Dozen” and called for their de-platforming. This list included Biden’s primary challenger Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. The Biden Admin and 12 Democratic state attorneys general were happy to comply, coordinating with woke social media executives to ban accounts selected by the CCDH. As you may remember, on July 20th, AFL filed FOIA requests with HHS, the FBI, DHS, and the Department of State, seeking to uncover the extent of this unholy alliance between the Biden Administration and social media: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-launches-multi-front-investigation-into-government-collusion-with-pro-censorship-uk-based-nonprofit-center-for-countering-digital-hate/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVsAAB_qyboAAAAPclwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkyFByUOpWlJB6SUmmc_M_RmusLgAXqZI/3/LvivCkgMPl9z3Go4BetCGQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWxhdW5jaGVzLW11bHRpLWZyb250LWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24taW50by1nb3Zlcm5tZW50LWNvbGx1c2lvbi13aXRoLXByby1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLXVrLWJhc2VkLW5vbnByb2ZpdC1jZW50ZXItZm9yLWNvdW50ZXJpbmctZGlnaXRhbC1oYXRlLw) CCDH’s attacks on free speech are made all the more troubling by the fact that CCDH has extensive ties to foreign nationals–many of whom are affiliated with the left-wing British Labour Party. Despite this, CCDH is incorporated in the United States as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization and is able to engage in activities that directly impact U.S. public policy. Why on Earth would we allow this in America?This oversight initiative is the latest attack-point in AFL’s ever-expanding campaign against censorship in America. In just the last few months alone, AFL has also:
* Filed a lawsuit against the State Department for failing to comply with AFL’s FOIA requests intended to shed light on federal funding of non-profits engaged in censorship;
* Released documents obtained from a lawsuit against DHS that show the Biden Administration exaggerated the threat of domestic terrorism in order to weaponize its surveillance apparatus against Americans following Jan 6;
* Won our lawsuit, alongside co-counsel Christopher Mills, invalidating a decades-old state statute put in place by establishment politicians to silence groups like the South Carolina Freedom Caucus, in violation of their First Amendment rights;
* Obtained the dismissal of a frivolous lawsuit filed against an Illinois mother who was sued for speaking out against woke indoctrination in her daughter’s school.

As we take on these crucial battles, we rely on the support and generosity of patriots like you. Our continued partnership enables us to stand strong against the Radical Left's continuous assault on the First Amendment.Please make a donation today to help sustain our work and meet the many challenges that lie ahead. With the Lord’s help and your steadfast support, I am confident that AFL will continue to secure more significant victories for the American people.Thank you for being an essential part of the America First Legal Team. Together, we will uphold and preserve the foundational principles that define our great nation.Sincerely,MaryAmerica First Legal
| [**DONATE >>**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVsAAB_qyboAAAAPclwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkyFByUOpWlJB6SUmmc_M_RmusLgAXqZI/4/xhmYhmSpzu94zNKi8A6EsA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vcl8yMDIzMDcyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXdlZWtseS1kb25vciZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBH)

With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP.[**So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now and split $10 or more between me and Upset the Setup so we can win and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67391140/419544702/1084654965?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230731_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwZDJkNThiLTAyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bLaUBDcWHTMt4yOyMvnhXXnJmQGcAc9eV1wjS-WurWs=)

The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help.

**This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat.**

clean_body: | I needed to share this update with you directly, Peter: A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – has announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat. With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP.= Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat. Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | **= = = = = = Thank you for rushing your support to show the strength of this grassroots movement, Peter. Did you see my last email?
Hi team,
We’re watching the final few donations come in, but we still need a final boost in donations so we can hit our July fundraising goal.
I’ll put it simply: a blue House in 2024 depends on my re-election.
I’m the people’s champion here in Connecticut, but that work brings with it attacks from outside groups who want to flip my seat.
We’re so close to reaching our goal. If you can, chip in $10, $5, or even just $1 to my re-election campaign.

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: If we’re not preparing for 2024, we’re losing
body:
| | |
---
Derek, we are all so busy, and I wouldn’t email if it wasn’t important.
Tonight at midnight is our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I was just informed that we’re just short of our monthly fundraising goal.

**I know that Election Day 2024 seems like a long way away, but it’s closer than you think and here’s the thing: If you know me, you know that I believe if we’re not preparing, we’re losing.** The reality of campaigns is that it takes two years of fundraising to cover the costs of one competitive House race.
I won’t stop fighting for the things that matter to you: common sense gun safety, reproductive care, paid family leave, and a government that works for everyone.
_[**So please, Derek: Will you give just $5 right now to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? I’m counting on your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67391191/419544788/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk848-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTAwMTg5Mi0wMjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Sv-gPlnYiAfym3lqnB9LBNoEXHgEqpEPFShHBACNcU=)_

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Not your typical candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | **I’m not your typical candidate for Congress.**

I’m not wealthy or well-connected. I come from a working-class family. My dad is a Vietnamese refugee. My mom immigrated here from Mexico.

And right now, I’m working a full-time job _and_ running for Congress at the same time. A lot of candidates dedicate hours and hours every single day to calling up big donors and asking them for money. I don’t have the time or the luxury to do that.

_Instead, I rely on fundraising emails like these to power my campaign._

**Will you please make a donation to help us reach our goal? With our critical fundraising deadline just hours away, $10 or anything you can give will make a huge difference:**

[https://go.votekimnguyen.com/a/july2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67391259/419545217/764484201?contactdata=mD3LTH1LBPaysFyUaFLWDZRutg3F7T1aOzNStK+SprRWwR0XPjWq592vmkL82vxjoQ8bofLdLOHiLXvk3+dHoF7Li670YQAijne4cbnHRHo=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230731_2_6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQzOWQ5YjItMDIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HyfpzAT8OqMN2JDqV3pnRXTS273pxJEtqp0XvVF_o7o=)

name: Brian (personal)
subject: I wanted to reach out to Peter one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Hi Peter — I’m reaching out one last time tonight to say thank you.

So many of you joined this campaign on Day 1 and I couldn’t be more grateful. We’re building a campaign that is taking on the political status quo and I’m proud that you’re by my side.

Our communities are facing many issues that can be solved with bold, courageous action from our representatives in Washington.

We need leaders who aren’t beholden to the gun lobby and will pass meaningful gun safety legislation to save more lives from being cut short by preventable violence.

We need leaders who truly understand the barriers to healthcare that families face, whether it’s being able to afford care or simply having access to a doctor.

We need leaders who will always prioritize people over special interests and big money, and fight for a better future for our children.

I will be that leader in Congress.

**I am ready to do the work and represent you, but I can’t do it alone. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in a few hours and we need one last surge to reach our goal. Could you make a small contribution to help us get over the top?**

Here’s a link to use: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bw-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67391238/419545192/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230731_FR_JulyEOM_0_3MO_Dr.BrianWilliams_na_na_EOM05&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMzOWQ5YjItMDIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gl6WDDAUxdjvLVSyuZDbnUWlECqiQeh6Wh0wa-3Wj_4=)

Thank you,

Brian

clean_body: | | Hi Peter — I’m reaching out one last time tonight to say thank you. So many of you joined this campaign on Day 1 and I couldn’t be more grateful. We’re building a campaign that is taking on the political status quo and I’m proud that you’re by my side. Our communities are facing many issues that can be solved with bold, courageous action from our representatives in Washington. We need leaders who aren’t beholden to the gun lobby and will pass meaningful gun safety legislation to save more lives from being cut short by preventable violence. We need leaders who truly understand the barriers to healthcare that families face, whether it’s being able to afford care or simply having access to a doctor. We need leaders who will always prioritize people over special interests and big money, and fight for a better future for our children. I will be that leader in Congress. I am ready to do the work and represent you, but I can’t do it alone. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in a few hours and we need one last surge to reach our goal. Could you make a small contribution to help us get over the top? Here’s a link to use: = Thank you, Brian | | | = | Click ** to unsubscribe from our email list. Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr. Brian Williams for Congress PO Box 180725 Dallas, TX 75218 United States

subject: Coming to you live from Bakersfield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I spent the day here in the Central Valley, an area which quite literally feeds the nation—but has some of the highest rates of food insecurity in California.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27437%2E3422442%2E3_tm-X)
Derek, I’ll keep this quick because I’m getting ready for two TV interviews here in Bakersfield. Our July fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, **[can you pitch in so I can continue traveling the state and connecting with voters?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230731-2?refcode=EMAJ31_2_TEX_20230731_V1_F&refcode2=27437_3422442_3_tm-X&akid=27437%2E3422442%2E3_tm-X)**

I spent the day here in the Central Valley, **an area which quite literally feeds the nation—but has some of the highest rates of food insecurity in California**. When Washington sides with predatory corporations rather than working people, families here are left behind.
Californians deserve a Senator who stands up to special interests, and I’m so excited to continue traveling our state and earning the millions of votes we’ll need to win. I need your help to make this all possible—**[can you make a donation by tonight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230731-2?refcode=EMAJ31_2_TEX_20230731_V1_F&refcode2=27437_3422442_3_tm-X&akid=27437%2E3422442%2E3_tm-X)**

Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ31_2_TEX_20230731_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27437_3422442_3_tm-X&akid=27437%2E3422442%2E3_tm-X)**

#
Peter,
A new survey from Morning Consult just confirmed that **Josh Hawley has the _WORST_ approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator** up for re-election in 2024.

As a small grassroots-funded campaign, I can't stress how important it is to hit these early campaign goals. These goals set the pace of our movement. Right now, we’re just 45 donors away from our end-of-month donor goal, and I’m counting on your support to help us close the gap. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Hi friend – I didn’t think I’d have to reach out tonight...
Hi friend – I didn’t think I’d have to reach out tonight, but I just found out that we are still $432 short of hitting our July goal. **I wanted to send one last note tonight because, if everyone reading this email chips in just a few dollars, we’ll be able to reach our goal.

[So please, before midnight tonight, can I count on you to donate a dollar or two to our campaign? Every penny goes directly towards bolstering our campaign operation and fueling our fight for families like yours and mine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67391734/419553748/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.31_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY0YzY3Zi0wNTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IWYbdTe--UFO31RbWibx-mD1aItpgHVl9g_ZqU9z1l4=)**

I appreciate your support!

_Andrea_

name: Mark
subject: I can’t stop thinking about this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Walker4NC
body:
This is Mark Walker. I know it’s Monday evening, but I wanted to send you a personal request. My July fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight – just hours away – and I can’t stop thinking about what is going to happen if we come up short. The future of North Carolina is on the line. So, as a last shot, I wanted to reach out to see if you could send just a couple of dollars my way so we can reach our goal? |
---
Peter - this is Mark Walker. I know it’s Monday evening, but I wanted to send you a personal request.

My July fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight – just hours away – and I can’t stop thinking about what is going to happen if we come up short. _The future of North Carolina is on the line._

So, as a last shot, I wanted to reach out to see if you could send just a couple of dollars my way so we can reach our goal?

Having your support in this critical moment would really make a difference in our bottom line before we close our July books.

Can you help out?

I’ll see your donation immediately if you click here: [**https://secure.winred.com/walker-4-nc/eomgoal-h**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=951c17eb28524b18b7161014fdcbfa6e&_e=Eab6eAf6MeoNK5S37k5EIvawg1vlsJWfaIBXBo1sb6nZDC2v1IONGvuEwZSvbqmMjT7-OiukujrjIVK3sxApsvFVakl5LGcMn0jW7uoGFLv7lX9f4ykHzteAv9cqd63SzHg67zy9oJkCRDskWv4QTlJ2VWh-HunCg_QPrQfEr6JWH08ruzCElInMipxt1ZgTbWpB5DCdNSyfj0GjEXHXB8SXKDdlInxgU4tDYwNeDySIefFvhp48fhprBo2XI5PoAHEGvslttuoTyHwpEek6F4Ys8wYwt8m7mx0ey5c3soKaaSX1SH2hsgfWzIeoi77I9CM_OUELrt94ae6cDmHVMqCwvUZY15hgTx12HMmcNk2N5N8lmjWrLNlstHzrl17P)

Thanks and God bless,

Mark

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Onward,

Team Franz

**-Forwarded Message-**
I wanted to share a quick note ahead of tonight's critical fundraising deadline, Peter.

**As the only woman in the Democratic primary, I'm the only candidate who personally understands so many of the issues Washington families are facing.**

I'm the only candidate who personally understands what it’s like trying to find and afford both childcare and eldercare at the same time while overcoming roadblocks in a male-dominated career as a lawyer and state executive. I'm the only one who personally understands the impact of extremist Republicans' attacks on reproductive rights and women’s healthcare.

_**And, Peter, I'm the only candidate with the statewide executive experience creating a strategy to tackle our problems headfirst while creating sustainable jobs and investing in our children's education.**_ I did it with my work establishing Washington as a leader in wildfire response and preparedness, and I’ll do it as your next Governor.

I've been on the ground, building things on the ground, for more than seven years as Commissioner of Public Lands, working to understand our communities' needs and how to deliver. Now, I'm running for Governor to continue the work of making Washington the blueprint for a leading pro-worker, pro-family, pro-choice, pro-environment state.

[_**With my critical July fundraising deadline at midnight, I need your help building my team’s resources to prepare for the election ahead of us. Will you join my grassroots movement for Washington's future by donating $10 right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392209/419563424/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230731-2-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFlZmEwZDQtMDgzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gZCt8_GED4mXU8HlCasAMCQygO3MbIlXVh9B-nJDWm8=)

name: dan kildee
subject: This is not right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I’m sorry to reach out so late at night, but it’s important.

The fundraising deadline we’re facing in a few hours is critical to ensuring my team can respond to the brand-new misleading attack against my record.

That’s why we have to hit our goal of raising another $1,000 before midnight.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/supportdan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392272/419566685/-630682683?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230731_FR_2.7_0_12MO_candidate_NA_NA_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDE4OTFlZC0wYTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RE2Oh8KNAAO-MUtWVay5IA5OQ3BJ8iguSm3ie4Ftwk=)**

National Republicans are attacking me for voting against a measure that includes new bans on abortion, even in the case of rape and incest, for military personnel. Supporting our troops shouldn’t be a partisan issue, but House Republicans are putting politics over the safety of our servicemembers.

We need to lower the temperature in politics and work together to deliver real results for our constituents. I will continue to defend a woman’s right to choose.

Will you help me continue fighting for Michigan families in Congress by chipping in before our midnight deadline?

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/supportdan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392273/419566686/-630682683?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230731_FR_2.7_0_12MO_candidate_NA_NA_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDE4OTFlZC0wYTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RE2Oh8KNAAO-MUtWVay5IA5OQ3BJ8iguSm3ie4Ftwk=)**

Thank you,

Dan

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. name: Sepi Shyne (personal)
subject: We need a sense of urgency in Congress
body:
Hi team,

We’re approaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and I want to explain why your support means so much. (If you’re fired up to bring real change to Congress, and don’t need an explanation, here is a link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307_email_shyne?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392382/419567645/1120139897?refcode=em23_230729_EOM3_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_EOM3_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=558a9781-0b30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YTk3ODEtMGIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQfdWDHzrHjwfKFBlavVl4XAKScVKfDmfw-D7uKsIks=)

I’ll be honest: I’m tired of watching election cycle after election cycle come and go with little to no progress: I’m tired of hearing politicians offer the same hollow promises of making life better for working people and failing to deliver.

That’s why I stepped up to run for Congress. As a renter in California, I know how hard it is to make ends meet, pay bills, and keep up with rising costs of just about everything. As a Lesbian and an immigrant, I deeply understand how high the stakes are as we face unprecedented assaults on our fundamental rights and a dangerous rise of GOP extremism.

We can’t keep electing the same kinds of career politicians reciting the same empty promises and expect different results.

We need a change, team, and I’m running to deliver just that.

I need your support to get me to Congress where I can fight to make it happen. It would mean the world if you could chip in $5, or whatever you can, ahead of our deadline in just a few hours. Here’s a personal link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307_email_shyne?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392383/419567646/1120139897?refcode=em23_230729_EOM3_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_EOM3_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=558a9781-0b30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YTk3ODEtMGIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQfdWDHzrHjwfKFBlavVl4XAKScVKfDmfw-D7uKsIks=)

With gratitude,

Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392384/419567647/-1864324579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YTk3ODEtMGIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQfdWDHzrHjwfKFBlavVl4XAKScVKfDmfw-D7uKsIks=&emci=d78df8f9-e02c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=558a9781-0b30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=13528480) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392385/419567648/1964229587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YTk3ODEtMGIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQfdWDHzrHjwfKFBlavVl4XAKScVKfDmfw-D7uKsIks=&emci=d78df8f9-e02c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=558a9781-0b30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=13528480) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67392386/419567649/538944710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YTk3ODEtMGIzMC1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQfdWDHzrHjwfKFBlavVl4XAKScVKfDmfw-D7uKsIks=&emci=d78df8f9-e02c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=558a9781-0b30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=13528480)

subject: Closing the books on July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
We’ve only got a few hours left to hit our fundraising goal for the month |
---
Friend, the last Monday of the month is usually a busy one, so I’ll keep this short: We’ve only got a few hours left until we have to close the books on our July fundraising. With a new ad up and running and a Republican House majority in disarray, this deadline is our chance to get ahead so we can take back Congress in ‘24. Every single dollar we raise between now and next November will determine how much gas in the tank we’ve got to get the MAGA mob out of the halls of power. That’s why I need to ask: Will you chip in any amount you can before midnight tonight? name: Keep Extremism Out of the White House
subject: Moms Against DeSantis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We hate to bother you, but we promise this will be real quick. Our monthly fundraising deadline is TONIGHT , but right now we’re not on track to reach our must-hit goal.
Glenn Youngkin’s victory shows the power of parents in shaping our political landscape. Last month, the DeSantis campaign officially rolled out “Mamas for DeSantis,” a national version of the statewide group that started in 2022, aiming to significantly influence the 2024 presidential election.
This is where we need you.
Every contribution, big or small, helps us stand against the massive funding DeSantis and his supporters have amassed. Your support will help us raise awareness and prevent the spread of extremism into the White House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Stand with us, Peter. Donate before midnight below. We’re up against millions and extremism, and we can’t do this without you.
RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

clean_body: [] Peter, We hate to bother you, but we promise this will be real quick. Our monthly fundraising deadline is TONIGHT , but right now we’re not on track to reach our must-hit goal. Glenn Youngkin’s victory shows the power of parents in shaping our political landscape. Last month, the DeSantis campaign officially rolled out “Mamas for DeSantis,” a national version of the statewide group that started in 2022, aiming to significantly influence the 2024 presidential election. This is where we need you. Every contribution, big or small, helps us stand against the massive funding DeSantis and his supporters have amassed. Your support will help us raise awareness and prevent the spread of extremism into the White House. [] Stand with us, Peter. Donate before midnight below. We’re up against millions and extremism, and we can’t do this without you. name: Team D'Esposito
subject: Midnight Deadline: Protecting Americans
body:
Peter,

In just a few hours, we will reach our end-of-month deadline.

This pivotal moment serves as a barometer for the strength of our campaign, which is much more than just a political race. It's a fight for the values we hold dear and our community's well-being here on Long Island.

Help us reach our goal. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email]

Recently, I introduced the Protecting Americans from Fentanyl Trafficking Act, an effort to classify fentanyl-related substances permanently as having the highest potential for abuse.

This drug epidemic has not spared any community in the United States, and it's time we take definitive, long-term actions to address it.

In 2022 alone, 110,000 Americans tragically lost their lives due to fentanyl. This heartbreaking statistic is a wake-up call for all of us, emphasizing the urgency to act. We can't stand by while such substances continue to invade our communities.

The proposed legislation aims to move beyond temporary measures and establish a permanent order to make a lasting impact.

I urge all my colleagues and constituents to put politics aside and support this necessary legislation.

Your support before our midnight deadline is crucial in this fight. Be it $5, $50, or $500; every donation brings us closer to a safer community and a brighter future. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email]

CHIP IN $5 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=5&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email] CHIP IN $500 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=500&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Protecting+Americans+Email]

Your help at this critical time will go a long way in shaping the future of Nassau County and beyond.

Thank you for your unwavering support.

Best,

Anthony

Fellow American,

Summer is racing by on the campaign trail and there's no time to slow down.

Over the past couple of months, we have experienced unstoppable momentum. Last week in New Hampshire, I unveiled my comprehensive plan to shut down the administrative state, which gained widespread attention and support. Polls now show us solidly in 3rd place - and rapidly ascending.

| [** RAMASWAMY TSUNAMI MOMENTUM ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT-X0QLycA9C1YsIBLj8-ul_zKcUwUnCq7uLQ8Xz0IsZ6I-hYOfK0KNzG3gB6pYoD_bGeehK1Hv_dnzZKrkqk7fVBZL6gYNnbhyVnLbTChLDt-pPfDkMU5roYMOUG7eaiGahBkH7AvcLK15KENr9NmvviclEFqr6hOrcy78p4ZPCMAfQJ7bFLKZY_0gsFNLupgPaSLr-5Zzf7jkPbl9s8srf7wpcHzUkCDd-A-Aze8HF_V2Jr5DEiEZvecKev052QXW4MQRtaNhArjOh-fpytkisoDLbrPI3Vg_O1k9J49wVepWDuyVgj8MLfoCjCEgWiBME5Dl7LzewR23viRTlIAg3iOvK4tswnaBBTJkcxJdHE)
---

_**But there's no resting on our laurels.**_

I've been crisscrossing the country, tirelessly campaigning and connecting with people from all walks of life. Together, we're building a movement that's stronger than ever before. We have qualified for the first Presidential GOP Debate, but now we are trying to make sure we have a prime spot on the debate stage.

That's why this end-of-month deadline is absolutely crucial. It marks the last deadline before the upcoming debate. It's vital to maintain the momentum in spreading the message of TRUTH. **[Can I count on you, Fellow American, to continue your unwavering support?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT-X0QLycA9C1YsIBLj8-ul_zKcUwUnCq7uLQ8Xz0IsZ6I-hYOfK0KNzG3gB6pYoD_bGeehK1Hv_dnzZKrkqk7fVBZL6gYNnbhyVnLbTChLDt-pPfDkMU5roYMOUG7eaiGahBkH7AvcLK15KENr9NmvviclEFqr6hOrcy78p4ZPCMAfQJ7bFLKZY_0gsFNLupgPaSLr-5Zzf7jkPbl9s8srdK-aE1nIUUs5clv-GYtH0ycwm0jxW6ImJxzXMwlYZNlRX6Md8fHZsSwFuDJcwpwFcR_ZuK50DAGYdb0IDpGWs_FBgt4qZzXJoUH_Ip_E6L77ooLMpF1UiyuTI8yw2jOdIRio-RKv7oi1BBT1lU-ylK)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT-X0QLycA9C1YsIBLj8-ul_zKcUwUnCq7uLQ8Xz0IsZ6I-hYOfK0KNzG3gB6pYoD_bGeehK1Hv_dnzZKrkqk7fVBZL6gYNnbhyVnLbTChLDt-pPfDkMU5roYMOUG7eaiGahBkH7AvcLK15KENr9NmvviclEFqr6hOrcy78p4ZPCMAfQJ7bFLKZY_0gsFNLupgPaSLr-5Zzf7jkPbl9s8srcdpe68E1u1dAvSzwJK62hKDUq7T-I9l8bTYNpv7dBhIH0PHVBX8A_kWc5QnogweIQhw6uSM5jDgXrhH5wez-PDch4HYA7xyUJYnxC57KTVs5AdE3aRejlZSkO1NTYJem0NtjWNMNEtApmCtidjmuuf)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT-X0QLycA9C1YsIBLj8-ul_zKcUwUnCq7uLQ8Xz0IsZ6I-hYOfK0KNzG3gB6pYoD_bGeehK1Hv_dnzZKrkqk7fVBZL6gYNnbhyVnLbTChLDt-pPfDkMU5roYMOUG7eaiGahBkH7AvcLK15KENr9NmvviclEFqr6hOrcy78p4ZPCMAfQJ7bFLKZY_0gsFNLupgPaSLr-5Zzf7jkPbl9s8srdhZJT1dLcDuzKpkd02L7yFlUlnAAIwB02XhpcUZYvnDOP00-kLCGtnA_Gh6Z-jgfHyXiWfNYzyafqtqQG1WOuwSF6qDncPpURkfB1bBXf118n54cvSw2ElLLVz2V00u4Afnr13Y9d7BockqR7dsY3Z)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT-X0QLycA9C1YsIBLj8-ul_zKcUwUnCq7uLQ8Xz0IsZ6I-hYOfK0KNzG3gB6pYoD_bGeehK1Hv_dnzZKrkqk7fVBZL6gYNnbhyVnLbTChLDt-pPfDkMU5roYMOUG7eaiGahBkH7AvcLK15KENr9NmvviclEFqr6hOrcy78p4ZPCMAfQJ7bFLKZY_0gsFNLupgPaSLr-5Zzf7jkPbl9s8srcT-oehi3gPQ5dR3bx_svpIMqACSi81vF8L04YDjUUmacpmFglMs5gtBz4iNczTk7wlgmZDxzyi0Azix2CdW5XE9YFJlt--ZiD4JLdySFoi5gqX8X4Si2Bjm89HUi-hPllxsyrOcc3I_65fZitmBUNL)

---

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT9jcuENS9TIHe0riFkOgHw13rAFYxtIQnCr4CszDLHd3f4Z679JbLYKY71n4qNvGNX7Fo4t2giroX3uKS21tL3RVDWAEKek_XH30ThNmBo248OTQmHKaiooxBh0C7g41hVodKp1HK-qprnvplG9GnZzQpURN7VUDu6qFDoK5j3MK0De--tzMyAZhxH22Er4wlSFsZSy2QtCySZobvJv0cqU%3D)| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT1eTG78sDxz5oe37W-NZ-MbyifqC6yjKgqguijWfbXfWFvR3CZNqbZKV05R-LHR9pyaQchoTqRZa6waSj-xe8rLGccXdRJtE3L4tWR9k199qWa-82XkFClqc_pPJhKS8wWzpwsvmQE7wG1Vm9WjQzUUZNuBJsnpl-AUeECJXltSxkgOo3mZblaoQRjTODnsBNA%3D%3D)| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4cbdd32c46cf42419246fd09d686b49c&_e=hEBXsAIqRZDPxK456MDzT0WYxPxmi3C4EL5pbmAlHXDIM5lnW_EA4OptBW9SZnMnufO22bpzKae7Wik0M8wLcPU1htoVmo2tux4NJu3rDaMO207k3UaJrwUko73zfYuvzLZjx5axb0A483L5-qX3vAopqYCkOKGKT1Z4fcs4dw53OsIku_fHpcjvufLXWPkbtP0oK-oWz4CgWonlUR8H42Bs4ZfPbCd5JqyRwTJDAHU%3D)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.
