**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=32edcccc06884bc8924bd97c1779e4b0&_e=yyzadW3AeDGwM_B3fCIByRuIfKYgxTlqe7D87UscFw2-F-aF-3c7F56aKjUVr09BkCyFqHuqGzyTOx_dTsxPw-cT-T3L9YLmAXCC5mHl6OG05x4uNbRYBXv9yJE7DkbaWDd9oRxysdsUvGjISmSB2p0Nfsfm6bW9CYmA36ZgqYcdEFFaqpvdaa_GbYRW1RcZr8eRM8P9wIeBYRU7CXXNy4ZAty8hbhAUyDb_sVHtux6ZsptI-pVCwJMHcQmvede_3mye8MekjiXYqjFbLfzPTaXjFoHMMeRvTAioGo9Dd1wQiapDc4LaGFm4ALoZlRW-iUJI-fQ4-LxgHjUn7g0ZkaGtGgcjTp-R_s0dIyYOe9_gY_om9lB_3IrTEfaeV1lKciPWhlKBjhGe6efpds3z1TenJEIMw1_TtNuGtSHHYZpW4suIUSEpF4K822aBfwjNNJMnFJO1Vocj1R0uqWyCvQ%3D%3D)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Summer months are notoriously difficult
body:
#
Peter, we know it’s late so we’ll get right to it:
**Summer months are notoriously difficult for political fundraising but we can’t afford to miss our July end-of-month fundraising goal.**
The work that we do takes a lot of time and resources. We recruit candidates who will truly represent the communities they serve and then help those candidates with every aspect of their campaigns.
**Imagine the Democratic Party without Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, or Summer Lee** — we recruited each of these progressive champions and supported their campaigns from day #1.
[**We’re up against our July fundraising deadline in just a few hours and we need your help today to catch up on our fundraising numbers this month. Will you chip in $3 right now?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136253?refcode=em20230731-30158&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q)
Thank you so much for your support, we’re so thankful that you’re a part of this movement. Every single contribution truly makes a difference because we depend on everyday people chipping in what they can afford to power our work.
In solidarity,
Team JD
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=2&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=3&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230731-30158-footer&t=4&refcode2=30158_1203867_oMwP3q&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=30158%2E1203867%2EoMwP3q)

clean_body: Looking over our records one last time before... | | | Friend – in just a few short hours, we’ll have to officially close our books on the month of July. After Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ just brought *NEW BOGUS CHARGES against President Trump, tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is no longer just about outraising Biden... ...It’s about showing the radical Left and the Deep State thugs that good and honest Americans will NEVER be intimidated out of voting to make their country GREAT AGAIN. Because WE will NEVER SURRENDER to tyranny! When the clock strikes midnight, YOU can help us PROVE that our movement's resolve to peacefully save our country is truly UNBREAKABLE. | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Mon, Jul 31, 2023 Subject: RE: Final check-in To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, I was checking to see who hasn’t donated yet before tonight’s end-of-month deadline – and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn’t see your name. But don’t get me wrong, Friend... ...I certainly don’t want you to feel pressured into making a contribution. Only someone like Crooked Joe would do that – as he shakes down Ukrainian energy bosses for $10 million in bribe money. And if you can’t donate right now because of the Crook in the White House who’s bleeding our country dry, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. I’m only reaching out, because I know that many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. So if that’s you, Friend, then now is your chance! Now that the Biden Department of Justice has brought new fraudulent charges against me – and with more witch hunts looming, ending the month strong would be a great way to show the leftist tyrants in Washington that We The People refuse to surrender our country to tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. I know it feels like we have a long way to go – but I’ve seen time and time again _just_ how much this grassroots movement can accomplish when we stand strong and united. I know we can do this. All we need is you.
The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover.
**But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into August with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next month, meeting our July deadline is critical.**

clean_body: This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. | | | | | This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. But first, here’s where things stand: There are TWO HOURS left until our July end-of-month deadline. But we’re still $25,000 short of our critical goal. And based on our projections, we need strong grassroots Democrats in your area to help us close this gap. The moment that we announced our TRIPLE-MATCH offer, something incredible happened: Democrats took this opportunity to make their voices heard, loud and clear – they’re pouring in gifts to support our movement and defeat state Republicans: So we’re counting on you to help us keep this momentum going until the clock strikes midnight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | I know it feels like we have a long way to go – but I’ve seen time and time again just how much this grassroots movement can accomplish when we stand strong and united. I know we can do this. All we need is you. The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover. But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into August with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next month, meeting our July deadline is critical.** Thanks for standing with us, Audrey Holzrichter Email & SMS Manager, DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Dear Fellow American, A movement is underway led by leftwing environmentalist activists to decimate America's fossil fuel industries and undermine America's energy independence under the guise of fighting climate change. These activists are shutting down America's gas pipelines, eliminating drilling permits, and dismantling our nuclear power plants. **As a result, Americans are being crushed by high energy prices and our energy infrastructure is deteriorating and becoming more vulnerable to blackouts and "brownouts." ** The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. **[This is why PragerU is conducting a survey.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Your answers to this survey will help PragerU understand where everyday Americans stand on these important issues and the most effective strategies to educate Americans.

The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. Please share your views on this important topic by taking the survey, using this secure link provided below: Thank you for your time and attention. | | Thank you, and God bless you. Sincerely, Prager U Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

subject: Please join me on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=aaf435bb1a&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | About one week until my birthday celebration and I'd love to see you there! Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=810089f0c5&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1bd0a865b9&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=2a69837ebf&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Let me introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm running for President to stop wokeism.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf9s153dru0i3erk6l8f49uovmrk9gh2hsm5uvvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shgs5i38tli68o7ccr3m8pmeodk66r67db3cuqe6sb6maq38sb0chim7db5m9rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm0phmciqj4ptncdj32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9o30sjgm1pj7c8iv0)
I'm running for President to stop wokeism.

|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

**My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I am running for President of the United States. **

Our country is facing an identity crisis. When you ask people, "what does it mean to be an American?" you get a blank stare.

Meanwhile, Democrats are seeking to **DIVIDE** us and make us forget about all the reasons that we are **PROUD** to be Americans.

The Radical Left is**_OBSESSED_** with wokeness and gender ideology. They want to divide you based on race, gender, and political views.

**[That's not okay. I'm running for President to stop the Left's WOKE agenda.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zarfqbvur2u20lufpqkcc2id9kl83t6gr7cfab40_rp22sh2s8i66p70c3ie2o76cth2bs "That’s not okay. I’m running for President to stop the Left’s WOKE agenda. ")**

We need to revive the ideals that set this nation into motion over 250 years ago. Our country was founded on excellence, merit, free speech, Democratic self-governance over aristocracy. A nation of laws.

The same values that provide hope to the free world.

I am running for President with a vision to rediscover our national identity. E Pluribus Unum: When we stand as one, _**NOTHING**_ can stop us. That includes having a strong House Majority to support the next President.
**[Will you chip in $8 to help support House Republicans' crusade against the Radical Left?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zshnk1s7fjh486kdtor45vk0j0ik0b0dm3dkq9eg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c3ie2o76cth2bs "Will you chip in $8 to help support House Republicans' crusade against the Radical Left? ")**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp3npu54vrke71g213f2hv7517b6c4n63939tua8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c3ie2o76cth2bs "Generic Button")
---
Together, we can make a difference.

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

name: The Flyover
subject: Americans’ Trust Slipping, Trump’s Lead Widens, and Selfie Daredevil Falls to Death
body:
Hunter Biden's former friend Devon Archer told Congress Monday that President Biden definitely had knowledge of his son’s business dealings, which Rep. James Comer said meant the President “lied to the American people.”

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# TUESday, August 1, 2023
---
**Good morning! **On this date in 1988, Rush Limbaugh began his national radio show. Within five years, it was the most popular talk show on radio, reaching an estimated 20 million listeners weekly until he died in 2021.

We're discussing the presidential debates in today's edition, and the results of yesterday's poll are interesting: _Flyover_ readers are only slightly in favor of President Trump taking the debate stage against his GOP rivals.

If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljHHRAzMFSqvKVrR-tsjpgKx5FLY_Xvq2bO_J6e9D4v44VLLbfrB68SW95Gnlt5yAj9yZyQRtQpZhEU0hKND9D3PXirl8gT--TEkTWcXOY8TWKzCZOEgDNnXSICEvRgIJB3tgvJo3MZiBLy2RplQVJp2959beXWFsn1d3vI3s3bqmtcWrsrelM4KByO43hh_TMaftqq6N2C3mO6H6XW8u3PysJ15VKfsfZy7S8AAP__-mNPoQ) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [iMemories.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFr8zAQxvFPI28x8p2kyIOGlzdoKKRLAx2NYp3iK3IULCWl3760pVv3h4cf_9fjdAyc-Xp5Diu5lsoU5sYPmqTdDTvACbroEhEQduQGM0prrTSqW9xgUwSUJsxq3GurSFE8n62OyZC1I3bsQAJKKwc5otGqH6MBrZNEjBD2ahBKUuRWtv6t8LUtlPJHedDWz2Xtsltau1WB_wR4AT5SyLW_UOOV1rIx1Z6LAA_4YrQ-GQH--PT_YPFrjr6W-zbTxFHg4bSQ_3kWYOr9PAg8_NK6zcXbO-fM1eyFkpc1cP4GtD9zfAYAAP__DHFdFA)

## Biden Friend: VP Sat In On Hunter's Calls
Hunter Biden's former friend Devon Archer told Congress Monday that President Biden [definitely had knowledge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1ygzAQQOHTQLeMkPgRBUUaOqdNyQjtyqwjJI8km_j2GadO_Zo339dlvRj2HK6f5qC5uLgaW_hJq9DQglSrrHF2RJJUTXM7TEJrLYau3ueWHKpJCzt1m5g06nbsp5EcolbGGqx5lkIqoUUrJjX0XTPhIPveCaVQmrFrq04QcompuUUOZSfnX_FJqbHxqP28l3LPlfqo5FLJ5TzPxsWfQGd-90ou9-i5sM2VXJCeMYBJdqcENgbH6chwiwQbIwXwTAhmi48C3yGenvBKsD9CoZRhe2QOlDMgmTdFBhsPSpDNK9dpxvvJ3nMexqoT18Ow__sr_2r9BgAA__9zRW-4) of his son's business dealings, which Rep. James Comer said meant the President "lied to the American people." Comer said Archer told the House Oversight Committee that while he was vice president, Joe Biden was put on a speakerphone at least 20 different times with Hunter's partners to "sell the brand." The "brand" was the Biden family name. Democrats [downplayed the testimony](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd0QwYAIFxWvc5bVbWtiMw6ywiYA42r9fJfV2V7o6OtL5us23QJmO-_-wo-9bmcPa6cRZWC45qBmG6DdEQDWgl8YJa60wekhei8U66ay7CrOMxqxaLlpEwM1ZwBgG8iBACSukcMqM-uKigXHchFIRwlVLpgVG6qVevgsdPeGWf8qJ9bKWfcg-9f5oTP1jMDGYesJEOb8_BlMqOx74ap_5bMhg0hKsA8vT8-hY-UIRDx5aKyuFjjziWQ4e6pqw8jud2PiaS8PIYymV0xs6CV8MpqH6-HhRztTMlWlx3wN9xEP_M9FvAAAA___cEWhV), saying that having his dad on the phone to meet-and-greet guests didn't mean the President was involved in the actual deals.
## Support for the Military Slips in America
Public confidence in the military slipped to the [lowest level in 20 years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvpCAURn8NdpjLRQELi23sZtstDQvX8W4QjLBj5t-_zKtf_X3JOTl_HuvDc-L8_O0PmttWVh8av2gFJ5VEvWIX540ISXc0KzOBcw7M0O2zDQFQOxVHiB60cdb-HewGw-jIkFUdzwiowYGCSZtx6KdocBw30Dqit4MSA1DkVq7-X-HcdtrSu7zo6kM5ujTvrZ1V6F8CF4HLfd_9WRI3DuVzELhkuqvA5UMRuIAVuGglcPEHXRx8rjKUvHGkHEhylm0n-V9WeXDi5q-3TOWm2j4TykjBR6ryLCnJjXOsEkCBm8zUXXM8b06Jq7FigOfhOX1Lth-TfQUAAP__S8xqxQ), a new Gallup Poll reports. Only 60% of Americans expressed high confidence, down from 64% last year. Even so, the military remains one of the most-trusted U.S. organizations, surpassed only by the broad category of "Small Business." Across the board, American faith in major societal institutions is historically low.

Ranked as the least-trusted institutions in the Gallup survey ([See Poll Results Here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO2zAQAL-G6iTwbbFgkUad06YUGHFpbbAmBXFtx39_8NXXzhQDzJ_rek1IWG-_0x0il7amjfEJq5xHNWqz6iHHAqDBDBCVD3KeZ-ntsEf_oTLkLZQUNvXXSaucy1A0XIIKdsCopTZylkoG452dQvbauSKNyTpdrBJWQkZu5_SvYeUdCr3bE85pa_eB4s58dGF-Cb0IvVR49emWiB7Hxwu9HI1I6MXJWfkg9LJj53bilojeI7XXWBLyPmLtjPxgbLWPW6uM9QF9Sv34P5wxHy8kwu4vwsrbPSF91_nHF18BAAD__2_LYUs)) are Congress at 8%, big business and television news both at 14%, the criminal justice system at 17%, and newspapers at 18%.
## Arch Manning's 1st Trading Card Sets Record
University of Texas freshman Arch Manning, grandson of football great Archie Manning and nephew of Eli and Peyton Manning, [set a new record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOnTAQAL_GdIvMGgwUFGnoLm1KtNgLODKY2HtH3t9HL_W1oylG8-tj-aAQw7X_pJMn2dJCTsIXL3qABtAsWPlpY0Y2FU-NHfUwDNq21TERrcZi48xqcRs7b3034NqzHzUOq-mrMKFGowfd6NHYrq1Hb7HrNm2MR-rbRrWafZCU698pXHLwFl_pi3Pt0lnF6RC5izI_FM4K5-d5areWcqcs5W0onF2KkXeGLSVZKUaF88VPUThTdgecdF3h2oE-Je2Z7oM9SCb_Zo6yh8IxFthShkZjpzVQAeG_VODPCoWlQGaXsgcScAflIC-gTychXQrnKk_-fkKModhetXo_KcT_7fLtyX8BAAD__xo0d0Y) with the sale of his first trading card for $102,500. The sale comes just a week after Manning signed a Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) deal with Panini America, a trading cards company. The price is the [most ever paid](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskTGP3CAQhX8N7maFB2zswkUaukubcsWawSbCzB5w5-y_j7xFqlQjjT7pfU_v18f9w8UU8_bTHbS0wHe3tvhNdzlBD6ju2PklECGpjpZ-nOU0TXLU3b4YI42atPYPP_SoxkmjcjOGdZgno53v4oISlZxkL2c1Dvo2-xGHIUilPDqje6El-di43H5zzG2nkF78TeW28tGlZW_tWYX6IdAKtOd53mpzjerh8kUItLVxeV33yaVVgXbllGgjgTZx3nYu-foG5vZwKQm0l5FAK41Aq3qBttEfV-EfDZ8PcGXd4XA5x7xVyDFBK87HvMHqiofKyUPgAoVWLh7cwV-5wSUOT3o1zpBDgs-vmDPQSeVSMFLPZpBGvpO7svjnGVOKdTRCy-1wMb1bt_9u8DcAAP__ObuIOA) for a collegiate trading card. Manning hasn't played a single college game yet, but at $102,000 his card topped his uncle Peyton Manning's top card, which went for $72,000. All proceeds for the sale are going to children's healthcare.

clean_body: Hunter Biden's former friend Devon Archer told Congress Monday that President Biden definitely had knowledge of his son’s business dealings, which Rep. James Comer said meant the President “lied to the American people.” | | | | | TUESday, August 1, 2023 Good morning! On this date in 1988, Rush Limbaugh began his national radio show. Within five years, it was the most popular talk show on radio, reaching an estimated 20 million listeners weekly until he died in 2021. We're discussing the presidential debates in today's edition, and the results of yesterday's poll are interesting: Flyover readers are only slightly in favor of President Trump taking the debate stage against his GOP rivals. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Biden Friend: VP Sat In On Hunter's Calls Hunter Biden's former friend Devon Archer told Congress Monday that President Biden of his son's business dealings, which Rep. James Comer said meant the President "lied to the American people." Comer said Archer told the House Oversight Committee that while he was vice president, Joe Biden was put on a speakerphone at least 20 different times with Hunter's partners to "sell the brand." The "brand" was the Biden family name. Democrats , saying that having his dad on the phone to meet-and-greet guests didn't mean the President was involved in the actual deals. Support for the Military Slips in America Public confidence in the military slipped to the , a new Gallup Poll reports. Only 60% of Americans expressed high confidence, down from 64% last year. Even so, the military remains one of the most-trusted U.S. organizations, surpassed only by the broad category of "Small Business." Across the board, American faith in major societal institutions is historically low. Ranked as the least-trusted institutions in the Gallup survey () are Congress at 8%, big business and television news both at 14%, the criminal justice system at 17%, and newspapers at 18%. Arch Manning's 1st Trading Card Sets Record University of Texas freshman Arch Manning, grandson of football great Archie Manning and nephew of Eli and Peyton Manning, with the sale of his first trading card for $102,500. The sale comes just a week after Manning signed a Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) deal with Panini America, a trading cards company. The price is the for a collegiate trading card. Manning hasn't played a single college game yet, but at $102,000 his card topped his uncle Peyton Manning's top card, which went for $72,000. All proceeds for the sale are going to children's healthcare. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We could lose Southern Resident orcas forever, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **One oil spill would wipe out Southern Resident orcas. Help protect them and the planet and donate $27 to help us reach our urgent $3,000 goal!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908108?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908109?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908110?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908111?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Starving. Languishing. Grieving. **
Only 75 Southern Resident orcas remain. And they’re in a struggle to survive. Just one oil spill could put the final nail in the coffin for these gentle giants. But Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are putting profits over the survival of the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States. If they get away with their deadly dealings, it’s likely to _**seal the death sentence for Southern Resident orcas.**_ [**Don’t let Big Polluters wipe out the last 75 Southern Resident orcas and threaten our planet: Donate $27 today and help us reach our urgent $3,000 goal before the clock strikes midnight!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908112?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Southern Resident orcas are already facing a chronic lack of food. And Big Oil and the shipping industry are driving forward two devastating megaprojects that would drive away even more Chinook salmon -- their main food source. _**Before long, an oil spill could completely wipe out the remaining 75 whales.**_ We can’t let it come to that.
These orcas function in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. But when they lose a family member, their chances of survival plummet as their grief pushes them further into starvation. The losses of spirited Cappuccino, Marina the matriarch, and young Ripple were incredibly devastating. And while we have recent wonderful news that __**TWO baby orca births**__ have just been confirmed, we don’t want to get too ahead of ourselves. Sadly, **the mortality rate for newborns is as high as 50%,** so these baby orcas won’t even be counted and named until they can survive at least a year after birth.
**Don’t let Southern Resident orcas grieve another death. Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,000 goal before midnight tonight for orcas and our planet.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908108?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908109?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908110?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908111?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Southern Resident orca populations have been declining for the last 17 years, suffering through pollution and starvation. If the two newborn orcas are going to have a chance at survival, they need enough food to keep them nourished and growing strong. Their main food source, Chinook salmon, were once abundant in their ecosystems. But the salmon have declined so much in the last decade that they are now considered _endangered_ themselves. This is **leading Southern Resident orcas to starvation, stress, and miscarriages.**
Two proposed megaprojects would take things from **bad to worse.** The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic and scare away Chinook salmon from orca habitats. The noise from the massive cargo ships will also disrupt the orcas’ sonar hunting methods, disorienting and preventing them from finding the few salmon left in their waters.
The expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline will also increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD -- from one tanker a week to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be **pushing millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- the dirtiest kind \--** out in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat. And we know that when you move oil, oil spills are practically a GUARANTEE.
The endangered Southern Resident population is just one oil spill away from extinction. It’s only a matter of time, Friend. This is why we need to raise our voices and stand up to Big Oil and the shipping industry, showing them that we will not allow them to put private profit over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them.
**We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward the brink -- the time to fight back is NOW. Rush your $27 donation today for orcas and the planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908108?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908109?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908110?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1908111?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. They absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
Each death in these pods reduces the chances that the remaining orcas survive. With Marina’s death, **her children are now three times more likely to die, while her grandchildren are SIX TIMES less likely to survive.** With these 75 precious lives hanging on by a thread, we need to step up our fight to protect them.
Southern Resident orcas are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend.
_**If we don’t act soon, we could lose orcas forever.**_ Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. _But we can’t do it without your help._ Your membership support today will go a long way toward protecting our planet and stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 75 orcas. Will you join us in this fight and rush your $27 membership contribution before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures?
**Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $3,000 goal. **

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | One oil spill would wipe out Southern Resident orcas. Help protect them and the planet and donate $27 to help us reach our urgent $3,000 goal! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == Starving. Languishing. Grieving. Only 75 Southern Resident orcas remain. And they’re in a struggle to survive. Just one oil spill could put the final nail in the coffin for these gentle giants. But Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are putting profits over the survival of the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States. If they get away with their deadly dealings, it’s likely to seal the death sentence for Southern Resident orcas. == Southern Resident orcas are already facing a chronic lack of food. And Big Oil and the shipping industry are driving forward two devastating megaprojects that would drive away even more Chinook salmon -- their main food source. Before long, an oil spill could completely wipe out the remaining 75 whales. We can’t let it come to that. These orcas function in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. But when they lose a family member, their chances of survival plummet as their grief pushes them further into starvation. The losses of spirited Cappuccino, Marina the matriarch, and young Ripple were incredibly devastating. And while we have recent wonderful news that TWO baby orca births have just been confirmed, we don’t want to get too ahead of ourselves. Sadly, the mortality rate for newborns is as high as 50%, so these baby orcas won’t even be counted and named until they can survive at least a year after birth. Don’t let Southern Resident orcas grieve another death. Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,000 goal before midnight tonight for orcas and our planet. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Southern Resident orca populations have been declining for the last 17 years, suffering through pollution and starvation. If the two newborn orcas are going to have a chance at survival, they need enough food to keep them nourished and growing strong. Their main food source, Chinook salmon, were once abundant in their ecosystems. But the salmon have declined so much in the last decade that they are now considered endangered themselves. This is leading Southern Resident orcas to starvation, stress, and miscarriages. Two proposed megaprojects would take things from bad to worse. The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic and scare away Chinook salmon from orca habitats. The noise from the massive cargo ships will also disrupt the orcas’ sonar hunting methods, disorienting and preventing them from finding the few salmon left in their waters. The expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline will also increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD -- from one tanker a week to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be pushing millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- the dirtiest kind \-- out in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat. And we know that when you move oil, oil spills are practically a GUARANTEE. The endangered Southern Resident population is just one oil spill away from extinction. It’s only a matter of time, Friend. This is why we need to raise our voices and stand up to Big Oil and the shipping industry, showing them that we will not allow them to put private profit over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them. We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward the brink -- the time to fight back is NOW. Rush your $27 donation today for orcas and the planet. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. They absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs. Each death in these pods reduces the chances that the remaining orcas survive. With Marina’s death, her children are now three times more likely to die, while her grandchildren are SIX TIMES less likely to survive. With these 75 precious lives hanging on by a thread, we need to step up our fight to protect them. Southern Resident orcas are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend. If we don’t act soon, we could lose orcas forever. Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. But we can’t do it without your help. Your membership support today will go a long way toward protecting our planet and stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 75 orcas. Will you join us in this fight and rush your $27 membership contribution before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures? Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $3,000 goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Marcie Keever Oceans and vessels program director, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: "Mama Bears" are not extreme!
body:
you have to watch this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/mama-bears?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

During my campaign, I saw "mama bears" out in full force - defending their kids, individual rights, health freedom and parental choice. I'm extremely disturbed at the recent push to paint these moms as extremists. That's what the media now seems to be pushing. [Watch this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=cd497e1a2d&e=9828080a05) by clicking below and hear my full-throated defense of the "mama bears" who make our country so great:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ed0a74cd2b&e=9828080a05 "In Defense of "Mama Bears"")
---
| Moms and dads are continuing to stand up. Their voices must be amplified more than ever; but instead our media is trying alienate them, by labeling them as "conspiracy theorists" and "extremists." These dismissive labels have no place in our cultural and political discourse. We must continue to speak out.

To be absolutely clear, calling mama bears "extreme" is an outlandish insult! [Watch this to find out why.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9fe650395f&e=9828080a05)

Parents are going to continue to fight for their kids. Our hope for a brighter future hinges on them. Do not let the mainstream media get away with bad-faith labels.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: American Action News
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...
body:
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za76poav8e2hei9j24o3ub2r9se4erke57tk174o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6co71c9h2bs)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4aksg24reokfbk3lukgk2ljh6tki0tni9lsv1lg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6co71c9h2bs)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnbvkc8rj35go3l32r5hdiuh727i18bpg20fqvo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6co71c9h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctspk0kch7s1ik13ti5fqbs2hrnt7uebv8eii38_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6co71c9h2bs)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z35ucvet48oppgc3fkkpn73pio7mqibksvrhaeo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6co71c9h2bs)

body:

| | | Friends, Exciting news—I’m launching **“Moms for Cameron,” **a coalition of women invested in the future of Kentucky on a mission to elect my husband, Daniel Cameron, as Governor!

Becoming a mom has taught me patience and service, and has given me a glimpse of the kind of love our Savior has for us. It has opened my eyes to the importance of electing strong leaders—leaders like Daniel. This year, Moms across Kentucky have an opportunity to shape our children’s future for the better.
---
[**I’M A MOM — I SUPPORT DANIEL CAMERON**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/3cc208936fde4493/ee4eea02882267d7c3d6b838967d376c/40933)

**_When our shared values—faith, family, and community—are threatened, we say NOT ON OUR WATCH!_[That is exactly why I’m seeking your help as a mother and join me in this critical mission to protect our children, fight for our values, and elect a Governor who will do the same!](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/3cc208936fde4493/ddfab4d15a3ef197c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**

_We will not sit idly by while radical ideas are imposed on kids in their classrooms. _ _We do not accept the drugs and crime ravaging families and towns. _ _And we will not allow our young women who love sports to be degraded. _ **There is too much at stake in November. Kentucky Moms are ready to fight back—[I hope you’ll join us!](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/3cc208936fde4493/a9f6756f05be9622c3d6b838967d376c/40933)** For Kentucky, Makenze Cameron

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqitrcsc9db2amulj9j9dsbsqlthcc0eau8e3hgo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg66pb4cph2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zme5ev843kqi6dg8rssjug5r7fg1hs94495nj1io_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg66pb4cph2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf818ta3raleovdduhhfojp7q8r9ts7r6qhubvgg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg66pb4cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbamffitpt905a3dfnr879fnhhl86r27a4loodp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg66pb4cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")

# ICYMI: 247,000 people want to know, will Mayor Francis Suarez be the first Bitcoin President?
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=bb5455c981&e=9562ca5d98)
Conservative Twitter host [Mario Nawfal](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=d714fec0e4&e=9562ca5d98) (known to host Twitter’s largest Spaces) and [Scott Melker](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=4e2fca2aeb&e=9562ca5d98) (The Wolf of All Streets) hosted Mayor Francis Suarez on Twitter Spaces this Monday, where 247,000 people tuned in to hear the Presidential candidate discuss the future of Crypto in his administration, national security, and immigration. [Tune into the entire interview on Twitter](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=0d1af6b8ae&e=9562ca5d98).
| [GET MAYOR SUAREZ TO THE DEBATE STAGE](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=2afd6bd966&e=9562ca5d98)
---
**What role should Crypto play in America?** Does it give you more freedom, or should the government control crypto? Reply to tell us what you think!
|

# Did you see the new Hunter Biden video?

# Why Mayor Francis Suarez?
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=29a1cd2f40&e=9562ca5d98)
Conservative Miami Mayor Francis Suarez is the son of Cuban immigrants who fled Communist Cuba for a better life in America. After serving as a Miami City Commissioner, he became the first Miami-born Mayor of the city in 2017.Mayor Suarez is a fierce advocate for law and order, fiscal responsibility, and pro-business policies. He upholds conservative principles and advocates for the well-being of his constituents. Under his leadership, Miami has undergone a significant transformation, serving as a model for the rest of the country.
| [GET MAYOR SUAREZ TO THE DEBATE STAGE](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=860c1c2bc8&e=9562ca5d98)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stopping abortion on demand
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztg71voc069nsj39561img1rhbjuslpl91j187fg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6eob4c5h2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfo1gas54d7s0krprgmvf2netcp2kgm0g9irab58_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6eob4c5h2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z793jc72jkgkukrrvoc8m8324aqv98hhoe665g7o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6eob4c5h2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi0hpfpidlrpkqrmmick5i5ss5n7gg97j7m0s6b0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg6eob4c5h2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

1600 Daily

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: A brief thank you
body:
| | | This is Col. Mike Waltz.

I wanted to take a brief minute and thank you for all of your hard
work this month.

I have some great news: my team informed me this morning that we
successfully reached our end-of-month fundraising goal for July.

This means we can confidently continue with our work of saving America
from the radical-left mob - and I couldn’t have done it without you.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

In service,

Col. Mike Waltz

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Join me in New Caney on Saturday morning...
body:
Let's stand together for our kids!

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOT:**
Together with Two Moms and Some Books, we are proud to join Kirk Cameron, alongside BRAVE Books, in their mission to hold story hours at public libraries nationwide! We will teach kids about faith, hope, and love on Saturday at the **R.B. Tullis Branch Library in New Caney, TX**.

**On August 5, 2023** , we call on all families who love God and love America to join us this Saturday to pray, sing, and read BRAVE Books and other books of virtue.

Imagine being joined by thousands of local public libraries across the country filled by you, your friends, pastors, teachers, and local representatives on Saturday!

We are on a mission to turn our nation back to God.

Are you with us?

If so, we want to see YOU at the R.B. Tullis Branch Library in New Caney, TX, on **August 5 at 10 am**!
Here are the details...
**Date & Time:** Saturday, August 5, 2023, 10:00 am
**Address:** R.B. Tullis Branch Library 21569 US-59 New Caney, TX 77357

If you're on Facebook, please [RSVP here](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZmYi5tZSUyRmUlMkY3RjM4TVJYYkQ=&sig=2gzXAgtqqTBB8PS6veDod1VvjPq4AfhS4dti5S17yy77&iat=1690912057&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=%2FeflsxOaJpmM1Qhy%2BIKMWj3GS48mo52t8fr0fLVHXI7KGsa8%3AdfcmmpoJW4OvD%2BUndUFOwglJJwF1O%2B9X&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=199A222A1A1741), share the event, and invite others!
**Additionally, please _reply to this email_ and let me know if you can make it!**
[](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRks0M3pzdzJGWUtJ&sig=9UhNBBvPze85ERLjyARFqHR2s4ZhWEnJXVJc7NPGenuc&iat=1690912057&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=%2FeflsxOaJpmM1Qhy%2BIKMWj3GS48mo52t8fr0fLVHXI7KGsa8%3AdfcmmpoJW4OvD%2BUndUFOwglJJwF1O%2B9X&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=199A222A1A1742)
_For Liberty,_

clean_body: Let's stand together for our kids! | | | | FELLOW PATRIOT: Together with Two Moms and Some Books, we are proud to join Kirk Cameron, alongside BRAVE Books, in their mission to hold story hours at public libraries nationwide! We will teach kids about faith, hope, and love on Saturday at the R.B. Tullis Branch Library in New Caney, TX. On August 5, 2023 , we call on all families who love God and love America to join us this Saturday to pray, sing, and read BRAVE Books and other books of virtue. Imagine being joined by thousands of local public libraries across the country filled by you, your friends, pastors, teachers, and local representatives on Saturday! We are on a mission to turn our nation back to God. Are you with us? If so, we want to see YOU at the R.B. Tullis Branch Library in New Caney, TX, on August 5 at 10 am! Here are the details... Date & Time: Saturday, August 5, 2023, 10:00 am Address: R.B. Tullis Branch Library 21569 US-59 New Caney, TX 77357 If you're on Facebook, please , share the event, and invite others! Additionally, please reply to this email and let me know if you can make it! For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- • • Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis, 9803 Hwy 242 #162, Conroe, TX 77385, United States

name: info info
subject: Karen for KS Update
body:
Hello and thank you for signing up for email updates on my campaign!

If the last three election cycles have taught us anything, it’s that we
need a new playbook and a new kind of candidate if we are going to win in
KS03. I am that candidate and I’m committed to running a different kind of
campaign <http://www.kcforkansas.com/>.

All too often, candidates and outside groups think our votes are for sale,
that they can come into our community and “buy” a seat in Congress. That
may work in other places, but not in Kansas. If the biggest checkbook won
in Kansas, then Barbara Bollier would be our U.S. Senator, not Roger
Marshall. *Don’t get me wrong. Fundraising is critical for any successful
campaign, but fundraising alone won’t win this election. The only way we
are going to beat Sharice Davids is with hard work and money.*

That’s why I’m focused not just on raising money but also on building a
strong, strategic ground game. KS03 voters want someone who will work to
earn their vote - not someone who thinks they are entitled to it because of
the size of their checkbook.

· Voters are tired of politics as usual. They want leaders who are
focused on solving problems. As a business leader, I know how to quickly
identify a problem and work with others to find and implement a solution.

· Voters want someone who understands what it’s like to worry about
making a payroll or covering the rising cost of healthcare. As a small
business owner, I know what it takes to balance a budget and stay up at
night worrying about paying the bills.

· Voters want someone who has shown a commitment to our community.
For almost twenty years, I have demonstrated my dedication to this
community through my extensive volunteer activities, including founding a
nonprofit organization designed to help homeowners in need.

· Voters want someone who is more than just another prepackaged
cookie-cutter candidate served up to them by professional campaign
consultants. They want authenticity. There is no candidate in this race
more authentic than me.

I can’t promise you that I will raise the most money in this race, but I
can promise you that no one will work harder to earn your vote. We can win
this race and we can replace Sharice Davids in Congress.

But I can’t do it alone. I need your help and would be most grateful if
you would:

1. Support my campaign with a contribution: *Donate*
<https://secure.winred.com/karen-crnkovich-for-congress/donate>

2. Like and interact with my *Facebook*
<http://www.facebook.com/kcforkansas> page: www.facebook.com/kcforkansas

3. Follow and interact with my *Twitter*
<http://www.twitter.com/kcforkansas> page: www.twitter.com/kcforkansas

4. Share this email with your friends and encourage them to learn more
about me and my *campaign* <https://kcforkansas.com/>.

As the campaign gets rolling, there will be opportunities to help me out in
a variety of ways. Please stay tuned and thank you for your support!

#GOteamKaren

With gratitude,
Karen Crnkovich
Candidate for US Congress KS03

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Empowering Our Community's Voice
body:
Go to alfonsoforcongress.com to learn more! | | | | |
---
|
---
# Empowering Our
Community’s Voice
|
---
I hope this email finds you well and filled with the same passion for change that drives me every day. As a Democratic candidate running for Congress in Michigan, I am dedicated to ensuring that our community’s voice is heard loud and clear.
Please click the play button below if you want to be heard,
|
---
[](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=8516f8882f&e=16d812e81c)
|
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e38e47bca5&e=16d812e81c)
---
From the very beginning, we have had one mission: to create a community that listens and values the diverse perspectives of one another.
With your support, we will be able to make even greater strides in creating a platform that empowers every single member of our community.
|
---
# TOGETHER, LET’S
# MAKE A DIFFERENCE!
|
---
This campaign is about more than just winning an election; it's about building a brighter future for Michigan.
As your representative, I will be a tireless advocate, amplifying your voices in Congress. By working hand in hand, we can tackle the pressing issues facing our district.
Together let’s build a movement that stands for progress, compassion, and unity. We will be the force that creates real change that benefits every resident of our beloved state.
|
---
# YOUR CONTRIBUTION MATTERS!
|
---
| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=9b18bf429b&e=16d812e81c)
---
As we continue on this journey towards a more inclusive and prosperous Michigan, I am compelled to ask for your continued support. Your contributions have already made a significant impact, but with your help, we can achieve even more.
Together, we can make a real difference in the lives of our fellow neighbors.Your contribution will enable us to reach more voters, connect with our communities, and promote policies that reflect our shared values.
By donating to our campaign, you are investing in a vision of a better Michigan. Together, we will advocate for what we believe in, and strive to create opportunities for every individual to be heard.
Your donation, no matter the size, empowers us to stand firm against the forces that seek to undermine the principles we hold dear.
|
---
# EVERY DOLLAR COUNTS!
|
---

To make a contribution or learn more about our campaign, visit our website at alfonsoforcongress.com and click on the "Give Today" button to make a secure online donation. Every contribution, no matter the amount, makes a difference.
Thank you once again for your belief in our cause and your dedication to making a difference. Together, we can build a Michigan that reflects the true spirit of democracy - a Michigan thatworks for everyone.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team
| | | | [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=c6b5ed3d68&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e07528ca60&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=748ad4e398&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=1c60311384&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=90a3981f80&e=16d812e81c)

Peter, I want to thank you for an incredible first launch month.

We’ve already made a HUGE impact in Virginia, and I’m looking forward to what we achieve next.

This is just the beginning of our fight, but I know if we keep up this momentum, we can WIN in 2024.

Grassroots patriots like you are the crux our our campaign, JR. We wouldn’t be able to achieve anything without you.

I’m so grateful for you, and I can’t wait to see what we can do together in the coming year.

In Liberty,

CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
