body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb682c54dbd14c29b50ce8667f97469abfc18db925447ef49b9735a979030214c66fcfff167674a6089dc55ad55c20141319 Welcome to Jen's Journal, your monthly source for updates from Congresswoman Jen Kiggans’ Campaign. Join our team and stay informed about our ongoing efforts to address critical issues in Washington and Hampton Roads. Help us expand our reach by https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb68691a6bb07a3cbd51e904c96922ab744ac340b13e707dde464c4ec9624394e26db6d2098dc2b13743f7a3ebfa8bed9264 inviting your friends and family to be a part of our community . Together, we can make a difference! WHAT JEN WAS UP TO IN JULY… Congresswoman Kiggans attended a fundraiser for Virginia House Delegate Karen Greenhalgh, featuring special guest Attorney General Jason Miyares. Congresswoman Kiggans spoke in support of Delegate Greenhalgh, harping on why we must push her across the finish line this November. This month, Congresswoman Kiggans attended the Luau on the Lawn fundraiser in Virginia Beach, which was hosted for An Achievable Dream. An Achievable Dream Academy is a nationally recognized K-12 program that is dedicated to the belief that all children can learn and succeed, regardless of their socioeconomic background. Congresswoman Kiggans attended the 2nd Annual Montero Medical Missions Fish Fry and Parade of Boats fundraiser in Virginia Beach! Jen celebrated her favorite holiday with friends and family on the eve of the 4th of July! At the Crittenden/Eclipse 4th of July parade in Suffolk, Jen had the honor of being the Grand Marshall. After visiting various other parades throughout the district, she ended her 4th by admiring the fireworks over Mt. Trashmore. Back at Mt. Trashmore Park, Congresswoman Kiggans enjoyed Filipino-American Friendship Day. Congresswoman Kiggans joined the Princess Anne Republican Women’s Club for an event. Staff also joined the group at their monthly meeting, and gave a campaign update. They were some of the first people to receive our new bumper stickers and magnets! Jen attended the weekly Republican Party of Virginia Beach breakfast and gave an update on what she's been up to in D.C. and in the District. In Virginia Beach, Rep. Kiggans attended a meet and greet event for State Senate candidate Kevin Adams. Jen attended a VMI Student send-off event in Portsmouth with the VMI alumni association. She gave the students words of wisdom and encouragement in preparation for their upcoming endeavors at VMI. Jen in the News - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb68636c3727292f8281bdda14762d50f775e5b8e39ae15f24165771486ab702ce5ebc253526c6c5f56a95e90a2f72fb646e Mental health needs discussed at veterans roundtable in Virginia Beach , from 13 News Now - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb68ae61aac41210b257db1611b80b87b542af8b365b38b247ee832ecacbe2a68ed3c92f4c3c616402d93a393ab0adbaaa3d Being a lawmaker is the latest leap for career-hopping Kiggans , from Roll Call - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb682edbed604ee812e03b3ad9b5b1e3e80f09fe124a8e220b6747111e5a5dd9203366c8607bdad82e836a47b651344710bc Rep. Kiggans offers insight on newly introduced legislation to support women in ag , from RFD TV - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb68585d667f6c941c82d2e6d97bf4a9f8f336e0ea92e1cfb052a258b873e4517c2e1cfb867d71ff33cb786bc99c0ab4f872 'The Navy can do better:' Rep. Kiggans adds mental health resources for sailors to markup for defense budget , from WTKR - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=8b084b2b7d34eb68caaaf0be221838840a07e9ee4b0449686e3a9e184974577e9b6f3e38592cd703be2124122d43a31a04aa91d424e500a9 Military housing in Hampton Roads to see multi-million dollar renovations , from13 News Now Team Kiggans on the Road While Jen is staying busy working in D.C., the Team Kiggans members are fanning out across the District to connect with voters and keep them informed about Jen's legislative endeavors in Congress. Check out some of the remarkable July highlights below! Team Kiggans attended the Western Tidewater Young Republicans event in Chesapeake. It was good to hear from candidates while supporting the future generations of Republicans. Team Kiggans attended Red, White, and Brews at the Big Ugly Brewing Company to meet with the Modern Republicans in Chesapeake. Team Kiggans loved supporting our fellow Republican candidates at the York County Republican Headquarters grand opening! Staff attended the El Clasico Centroamericano soccer game in Virginia Beach. Team Kiggans joined the Filipino-American monthly meeting for dinner and to provide the group with a campaign update. We learned about issues facing the Filipino teacher community. Team Kiggans enjoyed a nice summer picnic with the Republican Party of Virginia Beach! Team Kiggans joined the Beach Suburban Republican Women's Club for their Pints for Patriots fundraiser! Staff visited the Accomack Republican Party tent at the Chincoteague Island Blueberry Festival. Staff attended a meet and greet with the Lt. Gov. in Chincoteague at the Chincoteague Volunteer Fire Company. Staff joined the LG on a tour of the fire station facilities. Team Kiggans attended an Accomack and Northampton Republican Party Gathering in Exmore with the Lt. Gov and Delegate Bloxom. Have you seen Jordan yet? If you happen to spot our Operations Director, Jordan, at an event, be sure to say hello! We're here to help you. Keep us informed about any upcoming events. You can reach him via email or by calling the campaign office: jordan@jenforcongress.com (757) 231-5519 HOW YOU CAN HELP Want to be more involved with Team Kiggans? We could use YOUR help. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stopping abortion on demand
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hUhhx5znLHHY%2flRBJsgJmg&sysid=1)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AAsQpMQOeiub4BdnfQsqjQ&sysid=1) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yoz0M2C9bpqYOKJMv3yz0A&sysid=1)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ap%2fcPu%2fF5S9ftENJ5eda%2fA&sysid=1)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

American Update

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: The fight for life is far from over
body:
The battle has been taken to the states to decide

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmse9he35uiqkp5uln5vnjhnb3gog870e2egkbo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)
---
Pro-Life American,

Have you ever heard some of the outrageous performance numbers Planned Parenthood reports on? As a supporter of life, I wanted to share some of the numbers that keep me passionately fighting for unborn babies.

* In 2021-2022, 374,155 abortions were performed by Planned Parenthood.
* Abortions alone made up 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services.
* For every single adoption referral in 2021-2022, Planned Parenthood performed 208 abortions.

**[We may be living in a new era of the pro-life movement, but the fight is raging now more than ever!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z14aqa59ca8cka77p45kjms4475mkaj9fu1s2rk0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4flma9oqbv3pj9b4hgblenocjcr1ii927ai5138_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z78reiljg00l76pfef246tl1021p6h855gj9ti60_) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfft97b9uqkjimjclkhtotrm2h51qobn5mkjo758_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrb8b2sg4fqij7p0f0m8h6fthje0c3m2nbkqt96o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)
The battle has been taken to the states to decide. Abortion clinics are still open for business. Defenseless babies are still being stripped from their right to life. Planned Parenthood is still lying to vulnerable women about their unborn children and making the death of babies a highly profitable business.

**[This is grotesque. We must take action now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaaku7jm0ecg8hocmk7tll1o8jnagib2g3n0m1hg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)**

Help SBA Pro-Life America stand against the abortion industry and fight for life! By giving a gift today, you are:

* Helping Americans understand the truth behind Planned Parenthood's lies.
* Helping pro-life champions take another step toward their elected office to make a difference.
* Helping life win in the United States of America.

Can I count on you to help us win this fight?

You can give a gift today by using the link below:

[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/join-us-in-the-fight-for-life](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfg5k7oqkp9uj51qaffj4hmnllo1sf36q8e0o8eg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)

| For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

**SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Make your gift now using this secure link:**

[Count me in!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qg3pqvv3horfb9gi278396sk2004v5d3b144pg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjg69oj4clh2bs)
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Trump Train News

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

## **VIDEO TRANSCRIPT**
## Private Jets, AMEX, and Luxury Hotels: What Is DeSantis Spending YOUR Campaign Donations On?
**LOOMER:** Hey, everybody. Welcome to a new episode of Loomer Unleashed. I'm your host, Laura Loomer. And on today's episode, we're going to take a deep dive into Ron DeSantis' first FEC report since he filed to run for president in May of 2023. You may have heard that Ron DeSantis' campaign really isn't going so well. In fact, he is burning through his campaign cash like crazy.
**LOOMER:** Since filing to run for president, Ron DeSantis posted his fundraising numbers that show that in the first fundraising quarter since filing, he raised $20 million. However, if you look at these expenditure reports, you'll see that Ron DeSantis has already burned through $8 million of campaign cash, which equates to a burn rate of roughly $1.5 million per week in the five weeks since he filed to run until the July 1st fundraising reports were due.
**LOOMER:** Why does this matter? Well, it matters because that means that Ron DeSantis only has $12 million of campaign funds left. And when you look at the fact that $3 million of those campaign funds are earmarked for the general election because they are double max donations and can only be used if he wins the primary against Donald Trump. Ron DeSantis technically only has $9 million available on hand that he can utilize for the duration of his presidential campaign.
**LOOMER:** And this is causing quite a problem for Ron DeSantis because his fundraising numbers thus far are not indicative of a candidate that has the ability to fundraise for the long haul all throughout the duration of the GOP primary, especially for key caucus states like Iowa, where the caucus is going to be taking place in January of 2024 with a burn rate of $1.5 million per week, Ron DeSantis would need an additional $42 million cash on hand if he was hoping to spend at this current rate all the way until the Iowa caucus.
**LOOMER:** And given the fact that Ron DeSantis' poll numbers are dwindling on a national level every single day, with Donald Trump taking a 40 point lead in national polls, it doesn't look like Ron DeSantis is going to be raking in millions of dollars that he desperately needs if he's wanting to continue his presidential campaign. Now, you're probably thinking to yourself, '"Holy hell, how does somebody spend $8 million without running a single TV ad in five weeks?"
**LOOMER:** Well, I went through Ron DeSantis' first FEC report with a fine tooth comb. And I'm here to show you some of the most outrageous and most absurd expenditures that Ron DeSantis had on his FEC report. Let's take a look. Now, if you look at the $20 million that Ron DeSantis raised for his campaign, only $2.9 million of those funds came from small grassroots donors whose donations were under $200.
**LOOMER:** Why does this matter? Because if you take a look at his FEC report, you'll see that majority of his donations came from large, high dollar Wall Street type donors. With the average donation being 1200 dollars. That is not indicative of a grassroots campaign. If you look at the $35 million that Donald Trump raised in this fundraising period, his average donation was $34 because most of President Trump's donations came from grassroots small donors.
**LOOMER:** Now, you're probably wondering what on earth did Ron DeSantis spend $8 million of his campaign money on in five weeks? Well, here are the reports. Ron DeSantis' presidential campaign spent $867,583 on media placements. And then they spent an additional $730,497 on direct mail, postage. Do you remember when Ron DeSantis had the genius idea of launching his presidential bid on a failed Twitter space with Elon Musk?
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RV6rruHpHtSXSR5z4hxiY3T_9lBFBjlmMD3EPuB_Qvg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=135590808)
**LOOMER:** Yeah, well, I was there for that to report on it live on the ground. And I'll tell you what an absolute dud it was. It turns out that it was actually an investor meeting. Yeah. His donors refer to themselves as investors and walk around with investor badges because they are hoping, right, to get some type of return on their investment.
**LOOMER:** Whereas people who support Donald Trump are campaign donors. It's just further evidence that Ron DeSantis is trying to sell the White House and sell access to his campaign. Because what do you expect? If you invest in something, you expect a financial return on your investment? And so when Ron DeSantis had this fancy elitist donor kickoff, he had it at the Four Seasons Resort in Miami on Brickell Avenue, which happens to be one of the most expensive hotels in Miami, Florida.
**LOOMER:** And what did that end up costing? Well, if you look at the FEC report, you'll find over $280,000 in payments that were made to the Four Seasons in Miami, where DeSantis had his campaign kickoff. But it doesn't end there. Other receipts on the FEC report show that he spent over $28,000 on donor mementos. What are donor mementos? Well, those are gifts that you give to donors.
**LOOMER:** So not only is Ron DeSantis spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on these fancy getaways for the weekend, where his donors are sipping champagne and eating five star meals and raising money for the governor. But he's also spending tens of thousands of dollars on gifts for these donors. So if you happen to be a grassroots donor who donated money to Ron DeSantis, this is where your money's going.
**LOOMER:** Some of the more concerning expenditures on Ron DeSantis FEC report come in the form of payments that were made to pay off his American Express credit card. Now, the FEC has very strict guidelines when it comes to how you can report credit card expenditures. You're actually supposed to have an itemized list of every single purchase that was made on the credit card so that you're not just going on wild shopping sprees and writing it off as a credit card payment.
**LOOMER:** But if you look at Ron DeSantis' expenditure form, you'll find one payment that was made on June 13th to American Express to pay off a credit card for the amount of $175,589.20. Then ten days later, on June 23rd, there's another American Express credit card payment for $148,347.66. And then on May 26, there is another American Express, very large credit card payment for the amount of $99,218.32.
**LOOMER:** So this is absolutely absurd. Ron DeSantis has over $425,000 worth of American Express credit card payments that aren't even itemized the way they're supposed to be legally itemized, according to the FEC on his FEC expenditure form. So it really makes you wonder, what did Ron DeSantis spend $425,000 of donor money on through his American Express credit card? Is Ron DeSantis paying off his personal credit card bills with his campaign funds?
**LOOMER:** Is his wife going on crazy lucrative shopping sprees? We will never know. And unfortunately, that just leaves room for speculation since Ron DeSantis has decided to skirt FEC laws and improperly report his Amex credit card payments, another expenditure on Ron DeSantis, his report shows that he spent over $21,000 on campaign apparel. This is not what you call a grassroots campaign, and as Ron DeSantis' poll numbers continue to plummet, it has his very large national donor base asking questions about whether or not his campaign is sustainable given the current burn rate.
**LOOMER:** Well, what is Ron DeSantis now doing to address his donors' concerns about his extreme burn rate? Well, you guessed right, he's spending more of their money. Recent reports show that Ron DeSantis spent an additional $87,000 of his campaign funds to host a swanky donor retreat and investor appreciation dinner at a Utah resort called the Stein Erikson Lodge. This type of luxury is indicative of how Ron DeSantis is running his campaign, and that's with absolute total disregard for the average middle class working American who can't afford to live their life in luxury.
**LOOMER:** According to his FEC reports, Ron DeSantis and his wife have also spent hundreds of thousands of dollars flying on private jet while they jet set around the country pretending like they're going to be the next president and first lady of the United States of America. Is this somebody who you really think is going to run our country responsibly if Ron DeSantis can't even run a lean and mean campaign and doesn't know how to save his campaign cash and run things on a budget?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RV6rruHpHtSXSR5z4hxiY3T_9lBFBjlmMD3EPuB_Qvg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=135590808)
**LOOMER:** How does he expect to run our country? Is he going to drive our country into trillions of dollars more debt? While I was sleuthing to Ron DeSantis' FEC report and looking into this swanky high dollar investor retreat that he just had in Utah this last weekend, I came across this Instagram video that was posted by DeSantis' high dollar Bundler Brooke Waltzer.
**LOOMER:** Brooke and her husband are all over social media bragging about how wealthy they are and how they're so proud to be raising tons of money for Ron DeSantis. But being braggadocious is a double edged sword because it looks like Brooke revealed too much information in her Instagram posts. Brooke Waltzer admitted that the campaign is essentially committing illegal coordination with the Never Back Down Pro Ron DeSantis Super PAC, which is highly illegal.
**LOOMER:** Her Instagram post reads "Lots of one on one time with governor to exchange ideas. Spent time with the super PAC, Never Back Down to learn about the campaign boots on the ground and fundraising strategy and needs." Well, if this is true and Brooke indeed spent time with Ron DeSantis and then also spent time with officials and paid employees from the Never Back Down super PAC discussing Ron DeSantis' campaign and his campaign strategy and his campaign's fundraising needs.
**LOOMER:** That is an admission to illegal coordination between a super PAC and a campaign which is highly illegal. And as nauseating as Brooke's social media posts and the video that she posted along with some cheesy EDM music may be it sheds light into the mentality of the donor class and the type of person that is supporting Ron DeSantis in his presidential campaign.
**LOOMER:** These are not people that care about the needs of the everyday, hardworking American. You can see they don't really care about the fact that our country is in decline. No, they're just having a grand old time eating baked Alaska, beef tenderloin, and sipping champagne at a swanky Utah resort. And who else happened to be in attendance? Well, it looks like Congressman Chip Roy from Texas also decided to jet set to Utah, where he spent the weekend with DeSantis donors and investors.
**LOOMER:** It really makes you wonder, do any of our elected officials actually work anymore? Ron DeSantis is an absentee governor. You see that he's not really concerned about the issues facing Floridians, whether it be the insurance crisis or the upcoming hurricane season that is likely to devastate thousands of homeowners here in Florida. No, he's not really focused on that because he would rather have parties with his donors and investors at Utah Resorts that cost tens of thousands of dollars, something that your average American can't even dream of doing in their lifetime.
**LOOMER:** And these leaked images, Instagram posts, and videos out of Ron DeSantis' donor retreat this weekend show that Ron DeSantis is the last thing that we need as president of the United States of America. The American people on both sides of the political aisle are sick and tired of the elitist donor class controlling our politicians and purchasing access to our politicians and the White House.
**LOOMER:** The American people want a leader and a president like Donald Trump who is going to put the American people first and not sell us out to the donor class. Given Ron DeSantis' current burn rate, it's unclear how he plans on running a full blown presidential campaign for the duration of the GOP presidential primary. But as we have seen, there is no shortage of elitist millionaire and billionaire anti-Trump establishment GOP donors who are more than happy to piss their money away if it means trying to stop Donald Trump from securing the second term that was stolen from him and the second term that he rightfully deserves and is entitled to.
**LOOMER:** Time will tell if Ron DeSantis is able to successfully reboot his campaign, as he said he plans on doing, and whether or not he will be able to raise enough campaign cash to carry out his campaign all the way till the end of the GOP primary. But one thing that is certain and one thing that I will promise you is regardless of how much money Ron DeSantis is able to raise, I will be here every single reporting period with my fine tooth comb to go through Ron DeSantis FEC reports and tell you the American people what Ron DeSantis is wasting his donor money on.

WATCH: VIDEO TRANSCRIPT Private Jets, AMEX, and Luxury Hotels: What Is DeSantis Spending YOUR Campaign Donations On? LOOMER: Hey, everybody. Welcome to a new episode of Loomer Unleashed. I'm your host, Laura Loomer. And on today's episode, we're going to take a deep dive into Ron DeSantis' first FEC report since he filed to run for president in May of 2023. You may have heard that Ron DeSantis' campaign really isn't going so well. In fact, he is burning through his campaign cash like crazy. LOOMER: Since filing to run for president, Ron DeSantis posted his fundraising numbers that show that in the first fundraising quarter since filing, he raised $20 million. However, if you look at these expenditure reports, you'll see that Ron DeSantis has already burned through $8 million of campaign cash, which equates to a burn rate of roughly $1.5 million per week in the five weeks since he filed to run until the July 1st fundraising reports were due. LOOMER: Why does this matter? Well, it matters because that means that Ron DeSantis only has $12 million of campaign funds left. And when you look at the fact that $3 million of those campaign funds are earmarked for the general election because they are double max donations and can only be used if he wins the primary against Donald Trump. Ron DeSantis technically only has $9 million available on hand that he can utilize for the duration of his presidential campaign. LOOMER: And this is causing quite a problem for Ron DeSantis because his fundraising numbers thus far are not indicative of a candidate that has the ability to fundraise for the long haul all throughout the duration of the GOP primary, especially for key caucus states like Iowa, where the caucus is going to be taking place in January of 2024 with a burn rate of $1.5 million per week, Ron DeSantis would need an additional $42 million cash on hand if he was hoping to spend at this current rate all the way until the Iowa caucus. LOOMER: And given the fact that Ron DeSantis' poll numbers are dwindling on a national level every single day, with Donald Trump taking a 40 point lead in national polls, it doesn't look like Ron DeSantis is going to be raking in millions of dollars that he desperately needs if he's wanting to continue his presidential campaign. Now, you're probably thinking to yourself, '"Holy hell, how does somebody spend $8 million without running a single TV ad in five weeks?" LOOMER: Well, I went through Ron DeSantis' first FEC report with a fine tooth comb. And I'm here to show you some of the most outrageous and most absurd expenditures that Ron DeSantis had on his FEC report. Let's take a look. Now, if you look at the $20 million that Ron DeSantis raised for his campaign, only $2.9 million of those funds came from small grassroots donors whose donations were under $200. LOOMER: Why does this matter? Because if you take a look at his FEC report, you'll see that majority of his donations came from large, high dollar Wall Street type donors. With the average donation being 1200 dollars. That is not indicative of a grassroots campaign. If you look at the $35 million that Donald Trump raised in this fundraising period, his average donation was $34 because most of President Trump's donations came from grassroots small donors. LOOMER: Now, you're probably wondering what on earth did Ron DeSantis spend $8 million of his campaign money on in five weeks? Well, here are the reports. Ron DeSantis' presidential campaign spent $867,583 on media placements. And then they spent an additional $730,497 on direct mail, postage. Do you remember when Ron DeSantis had the genius idea of launching his presidential bid on a failed Twitter space with Elon Musk? LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. LOOMER: Yeah, well, I was there for that to report on it live on the ground. And I'll tell you what an absolute dud it was. It turns out that it was actually an investor meeting. Yeah. His donors refer to themselves as investors and walk around with investor badges because they are hoping, right, to get some type of return on their investment. LOOMER: Whereas people who support Donald Trump are campaign donors. It's just further evidence that Ron DeSantis is trying to sell the White House and sell access to his campaign. Because what do you expect? If you invest in something, you expect a financial return on your investment? And so when Ron DeSantis had this fancy elitist donor kickoff, he had it at the Four Seasons Resort in Miami on Brickell Avenue, which happens to be one of the most expensive hotels in Miami, Florida. LOOMER: And what did that end up costing? Well, if you look at the FEC report, you'll find over $280,000 in payments that were made to the Four Seasons in Miami, where DeSantis had his campaign kickoff. But it doesn't end there. Other receipts on the FEC report show that he spent over $28,000 on donor mementos. What are donor mementos? Well, those are gifts that you give to donors. LOOMER: So not only is Ron DeSantis spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on these fancy getaways for the weekend, where his donors are sipping champagne and eating five star meals and raising money for the governor. But he's also spending tens of thousands of dollars on gifts for these donors. So if you happen to be a grassroots donor who donated money to Ron DeSantis, this is where your money's going. LOOMER: Some of the more concerning expenditures on Ron DeSantis FEC report come in the form of payments that were made to pay off his American Express credit card. Now, the FEC has very strict guidelines when it comes to how you can report credit card expenditures. You're actually supposed to have an itemized list of every single purchase that was made on the credit card so that you're not just going on wild shopping sprees and writing it off as a credit card payment. LOOMER: But if you look at Ron DeSantis' expenditure form, you'll find one payment that was made on June 13th to American Express to pay off a credit card for the amount of $175,589.20. Then ten days later, on June 23rd, there's another American Express credit card payment for $148,347.66. And then on May 26, there is another American Express, very large credit card payment for the amount of $99,218.32. LOOMER: So this is absolutely absurd. Ron DeSantis has over $425,000 worth of American Express credit card payments that aren't even itemized the way they're supposed to be legally itemized, according to the FEC on his FEC expenditure form. So it really makes you wonder, what did Ron DeSantis spend $425,000 of donor money on through his American Express credit card? Is Ron DeSantis paying off his personal credit card bills with his campaign funds? LOOMER: Is his wife going on crazy lucrative shopping sprees? We will never know. And unfortunately, that just leaves room for speculation since Ron DeSantis has decided to skirt FEC laws and improperly report his Amex credit card payments, another expenditure on Ron DeSantis, his report shows that he spent over $21,000 on campaign apparel. This is not what you call a grassroots campaign, and as Ron DeSantis' poll numbers continue to plummet, it has his very large national donor base asking questions about whether or not his campaign is sustainable given the current burn rate. LOOMER: Well, what is Ron DeSantis now doing to address his donors' concerns about his extreme burn rate? Well, you guessed right, he's spending more of their money. Recent reports show that Ron DeSantis spent an additional $87,000 of his campaign funds to host a swanky donor retreat and investor appreciation dinner at a Utah resort called the Stein Erikson Lodge. This type of luxury is indicative of how Ron DeSantis is running his campaign, and that's with absolute total disregard for the average middle class working American who can't afford to live their life in luxury. LOOMER: According to his FEC reports, Ron DeSantis and his wife have also spent hundreds of thousands of dollars flying on private jet while they jet set around the country pretending like they're going to be the next president and first lady of the United States of America. Is this somebody who you really think is going to run our country responsibly if Ron DeSantis can't even run a lean and mean campaign and doesn't know how to save his campaign cash and run things on a budget? LOOMER: How does he expect to run our country? Is he going to drive our country into trillions of dollars more debt? While I was sleuthing to Ron DeSantis' FEC report and looking into this swanky high dollar investor retreat that he just had in Utah this last weekend, I came across this Instagram video that was posted by DeSantis' high dollar Bundler Brooke Waltzer. LOOMER: Brooke and her husband are all over social media bragging about how wealthy they are and how they're so proud to be raising tons of money for Ron DeSantis. But being braggadocious is a double edged sword because it looks like Brooke revealed too much information in her Instagram posts. Brooke Waltzer admitted that the campaign is essentially committing illegal coordination with the Never Back Down Pro Ron DeSantis Super PAC, which is highly illegal. LOOMER: Her Instagram post reads "Lots of one on one time with governor to exchange ideas. Spent time with the super PAC, Never Back Down to learn about the campaign boots on the ground and fundraising strategy and needs." Well, if this is true and Brooke indeed spent time with Ron DeSantis and then also spent time with officials and paid employees from the Never Back Down super PAC discussing Ron DeSantis' campaign and his campaign strategy and his campaign's fundraising needs. LOOMER: That is an admission to illegal coordination between a super PAC and a campaign which is highly illegal. And as nauseating as Brooke's social media posts and the video that she posted along with some cheesy EDM music may be it sheds light into the mentality of the donor class and the type of person that is supporting Ron DeSantis in his presidential campaign. LOOMER: These are not people that care about the needs of the everyday, hardworking American. You can see they don't really care about the fact that our country is in decline. No, they're just having a grand old time eating baked Alaska, beef tenderloin, and sipping champagne at a swanky Utah resort. And who else happened to be in attendance? Well, it looks like Congressman Chip Roy from Texas also decided to jet set to Utah, where he spent the weekend with DeSantis donors and investors. LOOMER: It really makes you wonder, do any of our elected officials actually work anymore? Ron DeSantis is an absentee governor. You see that he's not really concerned about the issues facing Floridians, whether it be the insurance crisis or the upcoming hurricane season that is likely to devastate thousands of homeowners here in Florida. No, he's not really focused on that because he would rather have parties with his donors and investors at Utah Resorts that cost tens of thousands of dollars, something that your average American can't even dream of doing in their lifetime. LOOMER: And these leaked images, Instagram posts, and videos out of Ron DeSantis' donor retreat this weekend show that Ron DeSantis is the last thing that we need as president of the United States of America. The American people on both sides of the political aisle are sick and tired of the elitist donor class controlling our politicians and purchasing access to our politicians and the White House. LOOMER: The American people want a leader and a president like Donald Trump who is going to put the American people first and not sell us out to the donor class. Given Ron DeSantis' current burn rate, it's unclear how he plans on running a full blown presidential campaign for the duration of the GOP presidential primary. But as we have seen, there is no shortage of elitist millionaire and billionaire anti-Trump establishment GOP donors who are more than happy to piss their money away if it means trying to stop Donald Trump from securing the second term that was stolen from him and the second term that he rightfully deserves and is entitled to. LOOMER: Time will tell if Ron DeSantis is able to successfully reboot his campaign, as he said he plans on doing, and whether or not he will be able to raise enough campaign cash to carry out his campaign all the way till the end of the GOP primary. But one thing that is certain and one thing that I will promise you is regardless of how much money Ron DeSantis is able to raise, I will be here every single reporting period with my fine tooth comb to go through Ron DeSantis FEC reports and tell you the American people what Ron DeSantis is wasting his donor money on. Vance and Josh Hawley on Wednesday will introduce legislation aimed at preventing future "accounting errors" at the Department of Defense, after the Pentagon revealed it overvalued military equipment sent to Ukraine by more than $6 billion.

"This legislation will save American taxpayers from footing the bill for shoddy accounting at the Pentagon," Vance, R-Ohio, told Fox News Digital. "There should be no excuse for accounting errors with a seven-figure price tag," he said. "With this bill, Congress can ensure that the cost of our military aid is properly and consistently calculated."

J.D. Vance (R-OH) and Rep. Josh Brecheen (R-OK) are proposing legislation that will ban illegal aliens from securing benefits under the Affordable Care Act, commonly known as Obamacare, Breitbart News has exclusively learned.

Vance and Brecheen are filing the "No Obamacare for Illegal Aliens Act," which would undo President Joe Biden's move to allow illegal aliens enrolled in the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program to obtain Obamacare plans.

"The American taxpayer should never be forced to cover the cost of healthcare for illegal immigrants," Vance said in a written statement. "It's common sense: people who break our laws should not reap the benefits of public programs intended for lawful citizens."

Vance has introduced legislation on Tuesday that would federally ban gender affirming care for minors.

If passed, doctors who perform gender affirming care on a minor could be charged with a Class C felony, and non-U.S. citizens who have performed gender affirming care on minors would be deemed ineligible to receive visas or admittance into the country.

Additionally, the legislation would cease taxpayer funding for such care including under government-sponsored healthcare plans of the Affordable Care Act and prohibit higher education institutions from providing instruction on this care.

"Under no circumstances should doctors be allowed to perform these gruesome, irreversible operations on underage children. With this legislation, we have an opportunity to save countless young Americans from a lifetime of suffering and regret," Senator Vance said.

JD Vance, R-Ohio is introducing legislation Thursday that would require immigrants with temporary visas to pay thousands of dollars before entering the U.S. - as part of the effort to crack down on visa overstays.

Vance's office noted data that there are approximately 700,000 visa overstays a year, making it an often-overlooked but significant contribution to the illegal immigration problem the U.S. is tackling. In FY 2020, there were 684,499 overstays - about 1.48% of expected departures.

"America is a welcoming nation, but we are also a nation of laws," Vance said in a statement. "There are millions of people in this country who have abused our visa system and circumvented our legal immigration process. It is a slap in the face to the working-class Ohioans whose wages are suffering - I will not stand for it."

JD Vance is warning liberal arts colleges and Ivy League schools not to disregard the Supreme Court's recent ruling striking down affirmative action policies in the admissions process.

In a letter Thursday to Ivy League schools, as well as Kenyon and Oberlin colleges in his home state, the Ohio Republican expressed concern about what he called their "openly defiant and potentially unlawful reaction to the Supreme Court's landmark decision" last week.

"As you know, the Court has instructed you to honor the spirit, and not just the letter, of the ruling," he wrote, adding, "You and your institutions expressed open hostility to the decision and seemed to announce an intention to circumvent it."

JD Vance and Sherrod Brown are working to hit fast forward on semiconductor projects through legislation so companies like Intel, which is bringing two manufacturing plants to central Ohio at a cost of billions of dollars, can get construction done sooner rather than later.

Democrat Brown and Republican Vance agree that faster is better, and with Brown's new bill to strengthen supply chains, lower costs, and improve national security, those projects like the one in Licking County can be finished faster.

"This is not rocket science," Vance said. "The money has been appropriated. The law has been passed. We really need the Biden administration to do its job and to get that money out the door."

JD Vance is introducing legislation that would provide unlimited federal deposit insurance to non-interest bearing accounts at smaller institutions.

Institutions likely to benefit from the legislation would include Key Bank in Cleveland, Fifth Third Bank in Cincinnati, and Huntington Bank in Columbus, Vance's office said.

"Regional and community banks all over Ohio are suffering from the unfair advantage held by their larger counterparts," said a statement from Vance. "After the failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank, we saw depositors at smaller institutions moving their holdings to larger institutions, benefiting the coastal elite at the expense of the heartland. This expansion of deposit insurance is crucial to ensuring the stability of community and regional banks and the health of the wider U.S. banking system."

clean_body: | This month's edition of Hillbilly on the Hill is packed with recaps of Senator Vance's work in Washington. Senator Vance continues to deliver for the People of Ohio. Keep scrolling and follow us along for all of the updates. Thank you always for your support! ' THERE SHOULD BE NO EXCUSE FOR ACCOUNTING ERRORS WITH A SEVEN-FIGURE PRICE TAG' ()-- FIRST ON FOX: Senators J.D. Vance and Josh Hawley on Wednesday will introduce legislation aimed at preventing future "accounting errors" at the Department of Defense, after the Pentagon revealed it overvalued military equipment sent to Ukraine by more than $6 billion. "This legislation will save American taxpayers from footing the bill for shoddy accounting at the Pentagon," Vance, R-Ohio, told Fox News Digital. "There should be no excuse for accounting errors with a seven-figure price tag," he said. "With this bill, Congress can ensure that the cost of our military aid is properly and consistently calculated." Read the entire Fox News article ' WE'RE NOT MAKING ENOUGH AMMUNITITON TO ARM OUR OWN TROOPS OR OUR ALLIES'() - Senator Vance joined Laura Ingraham to slam Biden's depletion of our ammunition stockpiles. : ' IT'S COMMON SENSE: PEOPLE WHO BREAK OUR LAWS SHOULD NOT REAP THE BENEFITS OF PUBLIC BENEFITS INTENDED FOR LAWFUL CITIZENS' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance (R-OH) and Rep. Josh Brecheen (R-OK) are proposing legislation that will ban illegal aliens from securing benefits under the Affordable Care Act, commonly known as Obamacare, Breitbart News has exclusively learned. Vance and Brecheen are filing the "No Obamacare for Illegal Aliens Act," which would undo President Joe Biden's move to allow illegal aliens enrolled in the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program to obtain Obamacare plans. "The American taxpayer should never be forced to cover the cost of healthcare for illegal immigrants," Vance said in a written statement. "It's common sense: people who break our laws should not reap the benefits of public programs intended for lawful citizens." Read the full Breitbart article ' UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES SHOULD DOCTORS BE ALLOWED TO PERFORM THESE GRUESOME, IRREVERSIBLE OPERATIONS ON UNDERAGE CHILDREN' () -- Ohio-based U.S. Senator, J.D. Vance has introduced legislation on Tuesday that would federally ban gender affirming care for minors. If passed, doctors who perform gender affirming care on a minor could be charged with a Class C felony, and non-U.S. citizens who have performed gender affirming care on minors would be deemed ineligible to receive visas or admittance into the country. Additionally, the legislation would cease taxpayer funding for such care including under government-sponsored healthcare plans of the Affordable Care Act and prohibit higher education institutions from providing instruction on this care. "Under no circumstances should doctors be allowed to perform these gruesome, irreversible operations on underage children. With this legislation, we have an opportunity to save countless young Americans from a lifetime of suffering and regret," Senator Vance said. Read the full WFMJ article or watch: ' BIDEN HAS DOUBLED DOWN ON DESTROYING THE OHIO ENERGY SECTOR' () -- Senator Vance joined 10TV to discuss Biden's economic policy. Watch : ' THIS LEGISLATION BRINGS SOME SANITY TO OUR BROKEN IMMIGRATION SYSTEM'() -- FIRST ON FOX: Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio is introducing legislation Thursday that would require immigrants with temporary visas to pay thousands of dollars before entering the U.S. - as part of the effort to crack down on visa overstays. Vance's office noted data that there are approximately 700,000 visa overstays a year, making it an often-overlooked but significant contribution to the illegal immigration problem the U.S. is tackling. In FY 2020, there were 684,499 overstays - about 1.48% of expected departures. "America is a welcoming nation, but we are also a nation of laws," Vance said in a statement. "There are millions of people in this country who have abused our visa system and circumvented our legal immigration process. It is a slap in the face to the working-class Ohioans whose wages are suffering - I will not stand for it." Read the entire Fox News article : ' YOU AND YOUR INSTITUTIONS EXPRESSED OPEN HOSTILITY TO THE DECISION AND SEEMED TO ANNOUNCE AND INTENTION TO CIRCUMVENT IT' () -- Sen. JD Vance is warning liberal arts colleges and Ivy League schools not to disregard the Supreme Court's recent ruling striking down affirmative action policies in the admissions process. In a letter Thursday to Ivy League schools, as well as Kenyon and Oberlin colleges in his home state, the Ohio Republican expressed concern about what he called their "openly defiant and potentially unlawful reaction to the Supreme Court's landmark decision" last week. "As you know, the Court has instructed you to honor the spirit, and not just the letter, of the ruling," he wrote, adding, "You and your institutions expressed open hostility to the decision and seemed to announce an intention to circumvent it." Read NBC News ' full article . ' THIS LEGISLATION IS SUPPOSED TO CAUSE A LOT OF MONEY TO FLOW INTO AMERICAN SEMICONDUCTOR MANUFACTURING' () -- Ohio Sens. JD Vance and Sherrod Brown are working to hit fast forward on semiconductor projects through legislation so companies like Intel, which is bringing two manufacturing plants to central Ohio at a cost of billions of dollars, can get construction done sooner rather than later. Democrat Brown and Republican Vance agree that faster is better, and with Brown's new bill to strengthen supply chains, lower costs, and improve national security, those projects like the one in Licking County can be finished faster. "This is not rocket science," Vance said. "The money has been appropriated. The law has been passed. We really need the Biden administration to do its job and to get that money out the door." Read the full NBC4 article or watch: ' FOR FAR TOO LONG, FEDERAL REGULATORS HAVE FOCUSED ON ADVANCING THE AGENDA OF THE FAR LEFT AT THE EXPENSE OF THEIR CORE MISSION' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance (R-OH) introduced legislation on Thursday that would seek to protect vulnerable industries from overly burdensome banking regulators. "For far too long, federal regulators have focused on advancing the agenda of the far left at the expense of their core mission," Vance said in a written statement. "Meanwhile, regulatory bias and misconduct has gone unreported, as institutions have feared retribution. This legislation aims to correct that imbalance by ensuring the banking system is governed by ethical and apolitical oversight." Read Breitbart 's entire article . ' REGIONAL AND COMMUNITY BANKS ALL OVER OHIO ARE SUFFERING FROM THE UNFAIR ADVANTAGE HELD BY THEIR LARGER COUNTERPARTS' () -- Spurred by reports that the failure of Silicon Valley Bank has prompted depositors to flee small, regional banks for institutions considered "too big to fail," U.S. Sen. JD Vance is introducing legislation that would provide unlimited federal deposit insurance to non-interest bearing accounts at smaller institutions. Institutions likely to benefit from the legislation would include Key Bank in Cleveland, Fifth Third Bank in Cincinnati, and Huntington Bank in Columbus, Vance's office said. "Regional and community banks all over Ohio are suffering from the unfair advantage held by their larger counterparts," said a statement from Vance. "After the failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank, we saw depositors at smaller institutions moving their holdings to larger institutions, benefiting the coastal elite at the expense of the heartland. This expansion of deposit insurance is crucial to ensuring the stability of community and regional banks and the health of the wider U.S. banking system." Read Cleveland.com 's full article . It was so great to watch Gabe on national television as he made the case for why he is best prepared to represent Rhode Island in the United States Congress. He pledged to work in a bipartisan manner when possible but fight back against some of the extreme Republican positions and tactics, including misguided political theatrics like trying to impeach President Biden. I hope you’ll watch Gabe’s interview on MSNBC and then chip in $5, $10, or whatever you’re able to show your support for #TeamGabe today, especially as we enter August and the final stretch of this campaign. | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | All the best, MattCommunications Director for Gabe Amo for Congress | | = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. subject: Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS Plan (must read)
body:
Have you seen Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS plan? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
She just introduced the Youth Voting Rights Act to make it easier for young people to vote [!!] [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
The Youth Voting Rights Act will make it easier for young voters to register and harder for anti-democratic Republicans to suppress their votes.
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
Extremist Republicans are rolling back voting rights nationwide, it’s critical that we protect young voters from targeted restrictions.
Elizabeth Warren’s new plan would:
*
Allow
teens
to
pre-register
to
vote
before
turning
18
*
Expand
voter
registration
services
at
colleges
and
universities
*
Require
on-campus
polling
places
at
colleges
and
universities
*
AND
guarantee
that
states
accept
student
IDs
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]
In the 2020 election, roughly 50% of eligible 18-24 year olds voted.
Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected.
This election is one of the most CONSEQUENTIAL elections of our lifetime. And with so many laws and policies being passed that directly affect them, they deserve a voice too.
That’s why Elizabeth Warren’s new plan is SO important! We’re collecting 10,000 signatures to show Liz she has our full support. Will you stand with us to empower young people and sign our petition to Co-Sponsor her Youth Voting Rights Act? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/youth-vra-080123]

Team DASS

name: Trump Watch (via DLCC.org)
subject: Do you think Donald Trump should be indicted for his attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election?
body:
If Trump is indicted in the special counsel’s investigation, he could finally be held accountable for the damage he’s done to our democracy. | | |
---
| | **UPDATE:** **** Special Counsel Jack Smith’s investigation into attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election is ramping up – **Donald Trump has been informed that he could be facing his _third_ indictment. ** If Trump is indicted in the special counsel’s investigation, he could _finally_ be held accountable for the damage he’s done to our democracy and for his role in the deadly January 6th insurrection. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Because of you, we hit our goals.
#

Peter -
I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for sticking with me during the flurry of emails and texts we sent before our FEC fundraising deadline came to a close.
What's more, just the mere fact that you open these emails means a lot to our campaign. They help ensure all our emails get delivered to everyone — and since email is such a major part of how we raise our money, that means a lot.
That's it. Just a quick note to say thanks. I appreciate you.
Ruben
* * *

👋🏼 Before you go...

If you haven't already, please add your name to say you endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona.

It's a small and simple action, but coupled with our strong FEC fundraising report, it will send a powerful message about the strength of our grassroots campaign.
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230801_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230801-1-15&refcode2=874.734936.b4boka&akid=874%2E734936%2Eb4boka)
---

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=874%2E734936%2Eb4boka). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=874_734936_b4boka&akid=874%2E734936%2Eb4boka)

name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11477%2E9716520%2EUPq39y)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11477%2E9716520%2EUPq39y)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewAugust/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11477%2E9716520%2EUPq39y)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11477%2E9716520%2EUPq39y)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230801-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11477%2E9716520%2EUPq39y)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Third degree burns from the sidewalk
body:
| | | Peter – Phoenix has been breaking records for its extreme heat. It’s so hot that Arizona’s famed Saguaro Cacti are falling over. Yes, it’s too hot for cactuses. It’s so hot that touching the sidewalk with bare skin can cause third degree burns. It’s so hot that people are literally dying. **This is a five-alarm fire.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJ4an6ywEdOCVla4O11w8TuxLN37pwFKApxGdZHeb89SXgwmOUJpzFFvfrYk5OfIAwJbeRPShPII16FF-XsodXkMAJr0AGCDAjiJPoB214xKJC7FwOOvtDKhd7Re4571-Lp2AL0D7cMR3KC7Ut9m7kKVQ1bEE8jMdhdeWV6bxdWluQVCWGYBX-5tMlgV4ffXk0uPa7pfVJGuVf648H0usXx4DQWDv8B1Ba9wpXpbzKwrQLIlxs4Rv7FkTxlAN39KjsIHGcnj4IkcYqzNIGY-vak2HEfaQzood4GMAwa3fuW3jmgE1ytaTkGuB0yMcbGFE/3yd/OfUhsv7VRLO2zoJqrwqX1A/h0/ta9aN9bSJOwGCI08gA2ydbrb0P0TMkmfGqLTEaL6hhQ) You would think that headlines like these would be a wakeup call for every politician to address the climate crisis. name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Taking our fight statewide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Still...nothing.
The devastating impact of gun violence continues to plague every community across our beloved state.
Still...nothing.
As of today, Gov. Bill Lee has not issued a proclamation calling us into an extraordinary session on August 21st, proposed a single piece of legislation or made any concerted effort to build a coalition. The GOP supermajority adamantly refuses to even discuss or consider important legislative ideas to better protect our families.
My Democratic caucus members and I refuse to accept this inaction and unwillingness to legislate. Our kids deserve better. That is why I announced a statewide bus tour yesterday. From August 9th through August 21st, we are traveling across Tennessee to speak with families in their own communities about this issue. In a bold move, we Democrats are taking the fight to our GOP colleagues in their own backyards.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourkidsdeservebetter]
We cannot afford to stand idle any longer or simply spin our wheels in the State Capitol, so we are putting our wheels on the road. It’s time to do the work necessary to pass meaningful legislation and lay the groundwork to elect leaders who will prioritize the safety of our children and communities.
Our caucus’ statewide bus tour ahead of the special session is unprecedented, but we can't do it alone - we need you to get on board with our efforts.
Your contribution will be instrumental in funding our movement to prevent gun violence and ensure we have the resources to promote good government, serve the people of Tennessee effectively and break this GOP supermajority.
Support our mission, and together we can make a difference:
*

Together, we are a force for change. Join our movement today and be part of the solution.
Click here to contribute to our fundraising campaign and learn more about our mission. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourkidsdeservebetter]
Thank you for standing with us and being a beacon of hope in this fight for a safer Tennessee.
Sincerely,
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
State Representative

**ICYMI: Chris Christie Tells Trump To Sell Trump Tower Instead Of Swindling Americans**
This morning, Governor Chris Christie joined CNBC’s Squawk Box to discuss the state of the 2024 GOP presidential race.
Governor Christie made clear that as president he would be focused on working towards building a great economy and strong leadership that is respected around the world.
He also took aim at Donald Trump, calling him out for his grift and using campaign donations to pay for his mounting legal fees.
Governor Christie had some advice for Trump: don’t swindle hardworking Americans - sell Trump Tower to pay your personal expenses.

**“Sell Trump Tower”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=54ae9028e9&e=d0a9afa930)
The Governor also reminded viewers that If Donald Trump is the GOP nominee, Republicans stand no chance of regaining the White House.
By the time of the first debate on August 23rd, Trump may be out on bail in four different jurisdictions.
**“Trump Will Be Out On Bail In Four Jurisdictions”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=2b67c67fb6&e=d0a9afa930)

These are the wristbands that litter the border. They’re worn by border crossers and signify which cartel the wearer belongs to, and how much that individual owes the cartel.
As though that wasn’t shocking enough, when I held up a jar filled with them and asked U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra what they were...
He said they “look like candies or snacks.”
This is how out of touch this administration is on the issues and travesties that are occurring every day, tearing this country apart.
I’m fighting tooth and nail to expose them – and I need your help to keep it up.

You deserve an administration that knows what’s going on at the border.
You deserve members of Congress who will hold the feet of those who have failed you to the fire.
You deserve to live in a country that values and protects its own citizens above all else.
None of the above should be considered a “novel idea” – in fact, I shouldn't even have to reiterate any of it, it should all be a given.
But that’s the unfortunate reality of today – and it’s my mission in Congress to change that.

clean_body: | | | | It’s his job to be informed, and he has failed miserably | Fellow American, The U.S. border with Mexico is in shambles, and our own Secretary of Health and Human Services doesn’t even have a clue how bad it is. These are the wristbands that litter the border. They’re worn by border crossers and signify which cartel the wearer belongs to, and how much that individual owes the cartel. As though that wasn’t shocking enough, when I held up a jar filled with them and asked U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra what they were... He said they “look like candies or snacks.” This is how out of touch this administration is on the issues and travesties that are occurring every day, tearing this country apart. I’m fighting tooth and nail to expose them – and I need your help to keep it up. | | | | | You deserve an administration that knows what’s going on at the border. You deserve members of Congress who will hold the feet of those who have failed you to the fire. You deserve to live in a country that values and protects its own citizens above all else. None of the above should be considered a “novel idea” – in fact, I shouldn't even have to reiterate any of it, it should all be a given. But that’s the unfortunate reality of today – and it’s my mission in Congress to change that. Thank you, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 == \-

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Harvey is home from the NICU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an exciting update.
**Late last week, Marilyn and I finally got to bring Harvey home from the NICU!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35323?refcode=em20230801-3486&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3486%2E614464%2EDF0YQm)
We are just so grateful to everyone at Children’s Mercy Hospital here in Kansas City — they are truly a team of miracle workers.
I wanted to take a few minutes this morning to send a special thank you to you too, Peter. The love, support, and patience we’ve received over the last two months has been overwhelming — and we can’t wait to see you back on the campaign trail.
Thank you so much, for everything.
Lucas

_— A Note From Team Kunce —_ Hiring more staff, opening offices, traveling across the state, and putting ads up in front of voters... Your first-time donation today will make a huge difference as we ramp up the next stage of our campaign. **So we’re asking for your help again:** **[Will you add your first donation of $10 or anything at all to our grassroots campaign today so we can defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for real, everyday people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35323?refcode=em20230801-3486&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3486%2E614464%2EDF0YQm)** **[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35323?refcode=em20230801-3486&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3486%2E614464%2EDF0YQm)**

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

subject: Peter, hoo boy!
body:
this is personal...

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b9ba752-82e9-418f-97b6-8349d4d646a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | Peter, My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [before I ask you to chip in a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a8c9dbb-2108-4199-af0d-276426726055/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here are three reasons why:
1. Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please: [Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T009f4ddb-7d14-4eb0-a42d-52417b5fffb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Peter,

Greg Abbott thought no one would notice after he stripped Texas workers of water break protections. He was wrong.

Two days after our Greg and Texas workers held an all-day thirst strike on the U.S. Capitol steps, President Biden called out Abbott’s cruelty.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67412260/419639631/193715513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEyNzlhMi04MTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CWkd0m5qfuMl-iBaywjRq6bWC1AQo93-L6qf_R1410=)
Too often, it feels like nothing will ever get done in DC. But we’re showing how we can make change if you’re willing to get creative and not follow the status quo.

The President heard Texas workers’ stories, and now it’s time to get the job done.

We won’t quit until we pass federal heat safety protections, win union rights and decent wages for all, and stop the overheating and destruction of our planet.**[Can you chip in $10, $20 or whatever you can afford to help us fight back against Greg Abbott and the anti-worker right wing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67412261/419639632/210946638?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEyNzlhMi04MTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CWkd0m5qfuMl-iBaywjRq6bWC1AQo93-L6qf_R1410=)**

clean_body: Peter, Greg Abbott thought no one would notice after he stripped Texas workers of water break protections. He was wrong. Two days after our Greg and Texas workers held an all-day thirst strike on the U.S. Capitol steps, President Biden called out Abbott’s cruelty. = Too often, it feels like nothing will ever get done in DC. But we’re showing how we can make change if you’re willing to get creative and not follow the status quo. The President heard Texas workers’ stories, and now it’s time to get the job done. We won’t quit until we pass federal heat safety protections, win union rights and decent wages for all, and stop the overheating and destruction of our planet.= **= Thank you for being in this fight, Team Casar ****=** | ****** ---|---
