name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6voii9hcmkbhli5mdst09gng9h8q1irubjljgcg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z02mk92vhmlifvijt7nl2tf8hjnusibrgridabn0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo3ksn649o9ma75sh7tkv4hd06n82bkod1peid4o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf559gg70j8kk9mqo8eak23dqruq789bj8patqoo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z46suger9k3ajsldi334ri16gg0a6gbmn8etr90o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zku3181unbc4b6qoub0sd5kk814kqfnmdj91rjdo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za800mdmf5fmitg9msm5jk754hrtchjjkdjam3s8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6qq2f4aoovcrgq6dm6tkb4b67j92cpa5nah72v0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgmapb0slh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z10cb9v6q4dq1g04nic7c33k6j2n1ngo067cap38_rp22sh2s8i66p70cji69p36cth2bs)_

**[Rush Critical Support Now >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

I’m going to keep this quick, Fellow Conservative. The most important thing is that we hear back from you ASAP today. I just learned that we fell short of our July end-of-month grassroots goal.

**Our midnight deadline has come and gone – but we’re not giving up.**
**🚨I let my team know that we’re _EXTENDING OUR DEADLINE_ until midnight tonight!🚨**
We don’t do this often. But it is absolutely vital that we have Team Cruz fired up and involved as we get to work to stand our ground and Keep Texas Red.

**[Rush a $5 or $10 donation to help us close the gap.](http://trk.tedcruz._ngUkxU9fPug) **We only have $885 to go.

Thank you, fellow patriot!
---
\- Ted

Friend,

**From humble beginnings,** Ron DeSantis's grandfather worked in the steel mills of Pennsylvania and Ohio. His mother was a nurse, and his father installed Nielsen TV rating boxes throughout Florida. As a child, DeSantis found passion in America's pastime: baseball. From playing in the Little League World Series as a kid to becoming a baseball legend at Yale, where he served as captain of the team and held the highest batting average for the Bulldogs, Governor DeSantis worked to put himself through college and Harvard Law School before **courageously** volunteering to serve our country in the U.S. Navy. [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7142ecf972d4e2596dd7e72d7be3a80&_e=srisB29x7Fh8NWAu3RjKDaYBoVGhli2bp-HHQzrLl6OVtXIuL6H-B0BVQPgYpisH20FOUZizSBp-sb3UTR4zH7MtQi4qI1L50uoqhvss8gU9KThh5jF8pRj2xUKeDG2AdIJiT1NLy90eWnTjE5QzEuQ2J2qzWQNWxOomwMeDRHhwvV6Eyn1km_a2lSQtCwysN5QJDZrjFpdv4OyKksKl9m_9xSWEqeV9pNEK2Mg75N9nODKEuvnF9Y9ERfDtUXAHBr8QO-TBcm0g_0V4HpB6kFS444L5-a9co48dnxw-uToD2devY1QAQZzB-xMlamVDHZ1ero5ax7yQx-YrggsSs4PQBF52cVCyzIf4qfZvZcs%3D)
As a JAG Officer in the U.S. Navy, Ron deployed to Iraq to support the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi, and the rest of Al Anbar province, where he earned a Bronze Star Medal.

Upon completing his military service, Ron DeSantis wasn't done serving. Ron served as a federal prosecutor, targeting and convicting child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 by a 57-43% margin, with majorities in all four counties. Congressman DeSantis was also **a leading champion for America 's veterans** and helped enact reforms to the VA with an emphasis on mental health, and established the **House Freedom Caucus (HFC).** HFC was founded to fight against the establishment of Washington elites and give conservatives nationwide a real voice in the U.S. Congress.

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7142ecf972d4e2596dd7e72d7be3a80&_e=srisB29x7Fh8NWAu3RjKDaYBoVGhli2bp-HHQzrLl6OVtXIuL6H-B0BVQPgYpisH20FOUZizSBp-sb3UTR4zH7MtQi4qI1L50uoqhvss8gU9KThh5jF8pRj2xUKeDG2AdIJiT1NLy90eWnTjE5QzEuQ2J2qzWQNWxOomwMeDRHhwvV6Eyn1km_a2lSQtCwysN5QJDZrjFpdv4OyKksKl9kgWOq9_HpKOb0Wn_mFvT855vrMe4CMWGWp42akv3nGma5X1U1Nf29rAceBm1yLLbQXUxB6sU575HA5KVpcYNwSPOv1w6v_-FhkrZDbMQ54cfLGXGL11_Z82bELPH4sFNi_BcN_qAj4TdjFQjKwA-Ao%3D)
Ron DeSantis was elected Governor of Florida in 2018 by a razor-thin margin. But after tackling woke corporations, fighting for parents and keeping indoctrination out of our classrooms, refusing to back down to Dr. Fauci's draconian COVID recommendations, and keeping his state open and accessible while creating an economic powerhouse, DeSantis won re-election by the widest margin in a generation. [**Ron DeSantis has NEVER lost an election and is the Republican Party 's best chance to beat Joe Biden and radical Democrats in the 2024 Presidential election.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7142ecf972d4e2596dd7e72d7be3a80&_e=srisB29x7Fh8NWAu3RjKDaYBoVGhli2bp-HHQzrLl6OVtXIuL6H-B0BVQPgYpisH20FOUZizSBp-sb3UTR4zH7MtQi4qI1L50uoqhvss8gU9KThh5jF8pRj2xUKeDG2AdIJiT1NLy90eWnTjE5QzEuQ2J2qzWQNWxOomwMeDRHhwvV6Eyn1km_a2lSQtCwysprlNDnvDcDieMC-EsHEf6ImXjA_aU6EEaMsaxEN5XGL8NqhGGDaan07qEJypGU2MvGJiwVL-o9wLyxhNFF2icw1jKRbkexUkY5DNAwRNSvPuwTbAXWxAEd4ow0YtBiQiuE5GSXbyWEJE9egRDCTli7-sbK_ERLlh0qsLlU7jBNG5SerUv-K_Q49ZjUAbpyCF)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Thank you for supporting my campaign to Keep America Free! |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Thank you to everyone who responded to our July fundraising appeals. We are working hard to raise the resources necessary to run an effective campaign and spread our positive message to voters across the congressional district.

As I travel around the Lehigh Valley preparing for next year’s congressional election, I make it a priority to remind voters about this year’s municipal races. In November, we will elect the school board members, local government officials, and statewide judges who will have a direct impact on our daily lives. **It’s critical that we help those local candidates who support the Constitution and defend our way of life.**

That’s why I invite so many local candidates to my campaign events. In Palmerton, **[Mike Sofranko](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c08bfac1e7&e=1090c5c412), candidate for Carbon County Commissioner **attended my kickoff breakfast. In New Tripoli, **[Jacqueline Rivera](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d1a4466459&e=1090c5c412) and [Paul Moat](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e86d5da4a6&e=1090c5c412), candidates for Lehigh County Commissioner, and [Robert Smith](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7eccc08a77&e=1090c5c412), who’s running for Lehigh County Controller,** all addressed the crowd. You’ll meet many more outstanding local candidates at my events, including my upcoming **[Slate Belt Meet-and-Greet on August 10 in Bangor](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=a29dabfa5f&e=1090c5c412)**. **Please get to know our local and judge candidates and support their campaigns.**

This week, campaign highlights include supporting police-community partnerships at various locations in the Lehigh Valley for Tuesday's [National Night Out](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=0b434ad1fe&e=1090c5c412). And next week, I’ll be hosting a Slate Belt Meet-and-Greet at Washington Township Park. Please check my [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ec07e19398&e=1090c5c412) for details and updates.

**Keep America Free!**

---
|
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!
---

---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=071c4c27e4&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejeu32db856q73tfbg7l47foqo9ltqlfils5ub0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg7uom14sheosgs10h6ptbi76fu2k1hhlvmq8hpg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8kmk259m9mt21gibts2o6vfhobqeesurhgkqdt0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvj9ibe8s35cn6llfklorl39pvb7ucgbjq27aa0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmrq8h4p56nop7s85mp89adlqe4tti342rq42g2o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zif0bb1civg13r3887qpb89b3v0602h9sq8idka8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2f0kobace10605erp6b0nrjo7k1f81smedlvi30_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh60o36c3h2bs)

---

body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b1c0def0549489aa3c19c432d82d737&_e=lxA1mkLSDXHIm2kvneD3BNMjs1VlrLa1xdoD0WZVBzSox7jY4JWPSjubDDreQPg-sgdgi2F-s7NO-1uWJeuQZazN3_6FyXFlNmB2lgGxRJuJCfxS9DPVu-G3QMyb68JUTRlgbyt1K3xJFQAA7GSurl7qwVvjtIu71QGA0HnQe8cP0Ao25fmOW0MPbzcvrLRibSX5gxD_UGuOKi0wRnA3Il23c_C4cpKeTkp2FvCyKVm-kxMOwye2oKgp1wCxqhIrIxuNHGViUPTq4Ms_xe3qKaiS2Bz1C7jVXBnDzxEdnbgNjnvQ-e24uuBEmoBX_-9Y6djVW6l_qV9PZE2N4E7_mlIzUCOchuHBvVq7J6nh-LuAHnrGrSGUAa6BZ5CNls7xrxgqy498qx7Oq70lK0OPJEntRSXqiStZ4ZlMTvnvN450u7fsE7pWzHXu9mzO1WPjQEnZAKGwzi8_HaOIyVzMjX18-14wQEHzO2we55PCLaI%3D)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b1c0def0549489aa3c19c432d82d737&_e=lxA1mkLSDXHIm2kvneD3BNMjs1VlrLa1xdoD0WZVBzSox7jY4JWPSjubDDreQPg-sgdgi2F-s7NO-1uWJeuQZazN3_6FyXFlNmB2lgGxRJuJCfxS9DPVu-G3QMyb68JUTRlgbyt1K3xJFQAA7GSurl7qwVvjtIu71QGA0HnQe8cP0Ao25fmOW0MPbzcvrLRibSX5gxD_UGuOKi0wRnA3Il23c_C4cpKeTkp2FvCyKVm-kxMOwye2oKgp1wCxqhIrIxuNHGViUPTq4Ms_xe3qKaiS2Bz1C7jVXBnDzxEdnbgNjnvQ-e24uuBEmoBX_-9Y6djVW6l_qV9PZE2N4E7_mhwu7OM0ggrNT8zBYeYoUrO3WA5dr5t6p7PHELu69wy1R2dyUY61r_ai4bS4VK8s_NQHCYU2RGMi0eaI_AYn-H_3pEl_qH-IAZIycaYuoFJm2A-_trZx_J8I6Y0e_zWDe_XsPBuzK_ICV25bWvyY7XE%3D)**
---

I won't beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I 'm humbly asking if you'll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b1c0def0549489aa3c19c432d82d737&_e=lxA1mkLSDXHIm2kvneD3BNMjs1VlrLa1xdoD0WZVBzSox7jY4JWPSjubDDreQPg-sgdgi2F-s7NO-1uWJeuQZazN3_6FyXFlNmB2lgGxRJuJCfxS9DPVu-G3QMyb68JUTRlgbyt1K3xJFQAA7GSurl7qwVvjtIu71QGA0HnQe8cP0Ao25fmOW0MPbzcvrLRibSX5gxD_UGuOKi0wRnA3Il23c_C4cpKeTkp2FvCyKVm-kxMOwye2oKgp1wCxqhIrIxuNHGViUPTq4Ms_xe3qKaiS2Bz1C7jVXBnDzxEdnbgNjnvQ-e24uuBEmoBX_-9Y6djVW6l_qV9PZE2N4E7_miNhNO-KqVr9WBAFSqprlkMKJJj6lUnJb92lZ__tt2F_k8OUoiOFbpLA3AH8cVC9SxB3lORfqbZDgRfQMoi2eUY-Rk5CTvS9Iqm5sejdpPxpNRt9mey58bzFkLbu5nKTe3zJ34em43_MhHWh1MeU-u8%3D)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & this is the most impactful thing you can do to help us make history & defeat Joe Biden.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

name: =?utf-8?Q?Judson=20Sapp?=
subject: Congressmen Aaron Bean & John Rutherford Join Judson
body:
Congressman Aaron Bean and Congressman John Rutherford endorse Judson Sapp | | | [ ](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=3b12c5ea66&e=dc147d445f)
---
| _**Husband. Father. ****Conservative Businessman.
Proud Floridian.**_
---
|
---
“As a former State Representative and State Senator, I know what it takes to lead in Tallahassee. **Judson Sapp is the very type of leader we need in the legislature to fight for lower taxes, support our law enforcement, expand school choice, and keep Florida free.** I’m proud to endorse Judson Sapp for State Representative and **I look forward to working with Judson to keep North Florida the best place in America to start a business and raise a family.** ”
**_-Congressman Aaron Bean_**
|
---
“I’ve known Judson Sapp all his life. **Judson is a devoted husband and father, an astute businessman, a true conservative, and he will make a fine public servant.** I am honored to endorse Judson Sapp for State Representative.”
**_-Congressman John Rutherford_**
|
---
“**Judson Sapp is a leader North Florida can trust to work hard, get results, and stand firm for our conservative values.** I’m proud to endorse Judson for State Representative and look forward to working with him to keep Florida free.”
_**-Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis**_
|
---
“**Judson Sapp** **is a leader** who understands the unique needs of our community. **He is an** **unwavering conservative and a steadfast supporter of law enforcement**. I am proud to endorse Judson Sapp to be our next State Representative.” _**
-Michelle Cook, Clay County Sheriff**_
|
---
“I am proud to endorse Judson Sapp for State Representative. Judson is a native of Northeast Florida, he runs a successful business, helps local charities, and is raising a family here. **Judson Sapp is a staunch supporter of law enforcement and understand the needs of our community.** I look forward to working with Judson as our next State Representative to preserve the Florida we all know and love.”
_**-Sheriff Gator DeLoach**_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0tjsqim4cp3arnkr1orm8nsc8771aj0im0n898g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh68o72c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4tp0t0krquruuhondm02ubn5n156dqc56s2f4lg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh68o72c1h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27vtj866bcbjjg9du2uaqj855mgjlkbdi45ar48_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh68o72c1h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6tqifni6nno2g78r6j4mp6eke7n16g823uejpog_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh68o72c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Bring the Kingdom to the Capitol
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! **And, after reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL, we are in the FINAL WEEKS of our 2023 tour ... and we'll be roll through the final states in 2024.** [**Will you help TPUSA Faith finish our FINAL EVENTS for the Kingdom to Capitol Tour this year, with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more to help us reach as many people as possible before September 1?**](http://trk.readactnews.-Jx7fYVVQ)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.readactnews.-3VPfanw)
---
So far, **Kingdom to the Capitol** has visited almost half of America's capitals. We only have two more weekends, where we will visit six states to finish out this summer. We plan to roll through the rest of America in 2024. Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America!**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.readactnews._Gr2FOYqvEc7jYDcmwowZA)
---
After reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL this summer, we want to reach THOUSANDS more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, are bringing the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.readactnews.-3TCWhQ) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,

Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith

Donald J. Trump July 31st, 2023
Today, Ron DeSanctimonious recited his DeSanctinomics plan before tens of people.
If it sounded awfully familiar, it’s because virtually everything he said was plagiarized from President Trump’s playbook for an America First economic agenda that built the World’s strongest economy twice.
Even Ron’s so-called “Declaration of Economic Independence” was lifted word-for-word from one of President Trump’s speeches from June 2016.
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81uwjAQhJ9mcwOt1z9xDj4UolxAvbRSezXxhrh1IMKGiLevUlW9zjf6NOOnOcXh6aDeAdEYQwYikC9AdFC7z1dz-Di0m-PRPzat0WpZKe2BqDxn_q_-WbY8-ZjWtG6r4DQNAit2wjTYoNUoq9F5PvFgWRlqgjd132jpUQuUspbhhL6KjpAkWhTCKEti641ixlr3upeqtx4UBs7f1yFcLz6Fr3K7T_O2v05VcmMpc_7d1AF1ZYml8G1lQN37yG-FH3zZj3y_nIG6XHy5Z6BOGGtQoZVWayRBBi3ILoNsCaubC_MSU4rZ1KDwvH5clT8BAAD__-UqW6Y)

_**Ron DeSantis Supported Obama’s Globalist Trans Pacific Partnership, But Opposed President Trump’s America First Tariffs on China**_
In 2015, [DeSantis voted to fast-track Obama’s globalist trade deal](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8FugzAQRL_G3IJ21_YaDj40jbgk6rW9WrYJNBAQdoLy95WrqqddzYyeZty8TmP_ssIcBdEwhiSIhHwTRGd1_Prg8-f5dLhc3PNwYq324tK7IMqvNf5H_yh1nN04FdWcqmA19QhVtMgttNBokNVgm8AovTTMiD0wecOtkU5HNDE0ralGS0ASGkBk1RDWjlWMYLTXXirfOKEgxHRb-rDc3RS-8_aY19ovczXZIec1_XbqBHX7vtfX5Zk352_1Iwnq_HK_bjGV97nkWC6iOhCgFtQNkqnabFj3cZrGxEYouJZJhf4TAAD__3jkVqE) known as the “Trans Pacific Partnership.”
DeSantis also [voted against the TAA](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j79ugzAYxJ_GbEGfP_8BBg9NURaiDu3QbsjYJrg1GGE3EW9fUVVd706_u9PzGvy4K1KdCeLkbSKIhD0RxI6fP15k9961p-tV30-tFPxxuPhMEPO-uv_oH6V0s_bhUKu2sErgSKFwisoGGqgFsGJSFLTBcWjEMBiLjLEGoUIYLWoEKmnhFQIyqIFSyWukpZbcOaiEEYZxU2vCwbr0FUcbFx3sZ96-57U0cS6CmnJe0--mC8HLoEOIeXXW6zJuN4KX17j0rXvTS_aJoMCqN3G5bS4lf8D6yacct50g69ze32N2qdiUXR8-BJ9kRTjcjo9H3U8AAAD__0YvYBQ) (trade adjustment assistance) that would have provided American workers displaced by foreign trade agreements with job training and services.
When President Trump stood up to China in order to protect American farmers from Chinese retaliation, Ron DeSantis opposed.
“I’m not somebody that advocates tariffs. I want to have lower barriers and I want to have free trade,” [DeSantis said in a 2018 Fox Business interview](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81uqzAQRp_G7ILGY3swCy9uLsomUbftduKf4AYCAhqUt69cVd1-5-hohsd5yOnlRHMUiH0Oq0AU6p9APOvjxxud38_d4XLh56Ejo_dC8b9A3F5z_FN_K3UcOQ9lbboqOINJQhWdpBZasAZU1TtoPVFkydam0LBC9hpam9Q1tCSNqbJDQAUWpCRtUdZMOkZojDdeaW9ZaAhxvU8pTA8ewue2fI1z7aexGly_bfP6c9NJ4Gnf9zqxj9dpuhehTLz5vlB1egrVSZCGjEHSBgygsgJpiUmobu15yY9btbgw73kY8kqN0HArH5bWdwAAAP__xYhaqg).
In a separate interview, DeSantis said, “I think that’s part of it, and I think China – and [President Trump] has been tough on China, and I think it’s been well documented, some of their practices. And I think those need to be addressed - whether tariffs are the best way or not, I mean we can debate that.”
DeSantis recently flip-flopped on the issue, now saying that he supports President Trump’s tough-on-China tariffs, which ensured fair and reciprocal trade for American workers.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmclms8nuj86vfjdgrnaou81f0dn6aqao5dou6vg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh64pr2chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziia14e7gvbahj3lenttpvo5t73sotfj8bmf5fso_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh64pr2chh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk4ovs3ut7hs3h4e08mr0r2f0d362fftcnc3edoo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh64pr2chh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3hqpk59o1f11nmtr1k41spa1mkcob54hcos6i98_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh64pr2chh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Andy Beshear
subject: July came and went, and this team SHOWED UP.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
If we keep this up, nothing can stop this campaign! Hey Peter,

July flew by! It was a busy month, and this campaign team put in countless hours and did an immeasurable amount of hard work on the ground knocking on doors, calling Kentuckians, and spreading the word about this year's important race.

And that work paid off! July was another impressive month of fundraising and outreach. If we continue with this pace, we're going to win again in November and keep making historic progress for Kentucky.

Peter – We have made enormous leaps forward since I stepped into office, and we're on track for even stronger years ahead. Thousands of Kentuckians across the Commonwealth are showing up and offering their time, effort, and contributions to keep Kentucky headed in the right direction.

In response, outside groups supporting Daniel Cameron have spent over $4 million on TV ads to attack me. They want to take the attention away from what's at the heart of this election— _creating more good jobs, paying our teachers, funding pre-K, expanding mental health services, and strengthening our economy._

We're not going to let that happen. We're going to keep fighting to create a brighter future for ALL Kentuckians. **And we're going to do it together.**

Thanks for your time,

Andy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67417050/419658323/950424521?refcode=em23_230801_eomty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230801_eomty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e328fbd9-8c30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI4ZmJkOS04YzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v42JH-qNKAV0QDdn0rYynXTnc9KzTKsddujigDa4f_c=) | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67417051/419658324/950424521?refcode=em23_230801_eomty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230801_eomty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e328fbd9-8c30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI4ZmJkOS04YzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v42JH-qNKAV0QDdn0rYynXTnc9KzTKsddujigDa4f_c=)

subject: Lost my Election

body:
This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7dd0371dc3d546efae1d0df348ffbdf2&_e=lAznvJ4CW-hyERDZec_EluiSkGkdyJlHmCNU1H0eXskEdY-DTIER-rz2U4421DfJSrFm8eHQKlKluFqYsI80Z9ZzYuxXxmHXWp77zoh5v5qtbps1fG1Dw4E9qYuV3EEAhZFX06c_dRIR0SDC4em_gV3VpwBnPBG1loYb0DJ7Sju06TVinCwUQxL5hmD7qK1wsNAJrfNLsmpLY4GKb9jNIRg4MUi_TSk8vjQ3giL4lQFOIhvaRMXG5wNpVRQ1VFbU7pyceB21zz-3VIebEK1VyYCR0N4Z18wkSQMpBC-sN4lbdzaid-kTkpLnn4EB8lRld4gliYAF9dzdFJ-4Mlp5favH1WcdqBq0umf1qVKl159yOkWy6bY3VNQkbKkdxg92rv1WWGaNw_m5KCl4uFNXWQ%3D%3D)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **
| **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7dd0371dc3d546efae1d0df348ffbdf2&_e=lAznvJ4CW-hyERDZec_EluiSkGkdyJlHmCNU1H0eXskEdY-DTIER-rz2U4421DfJSrFm8eHQKlKluFqYsI80Z9ZzYuxXxmHXWp77zoh5v5qtbps1fG1Dw4E9qYuV3EEAhZFX06c_dRIR0SDC4em_gV3VpwBnPBG1loYb0DJ7Sju06TVinCwUQxL5hmD7qK1wsNAJrfNLsmpLY4GKb9jNIRg4MUi_TSk8vjQ3giL4lQFOIhvaRMXG5wNpVRQ1VFbUYe2fuSEM98FJwQ8JImFRc1aQG8DsiRZD6M6cwMoQEQfzuA7v4IZD2Ga7kPZqDycYwz-FsCfuiFNSEF1c-T3osIqCEg63_-696hiCaSwCLP-iVnUjXNIAsq_edlMlJTX3OrovYwFqYFF44yEDS-zapg%3D%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7dd0371dc3d546efae1d0df348ffbdf2&_e=lAznvJ4CW-hyERDZec_EluiSkGkdyJlHmCNU1H0eXskEdY-DTIER-rz2U4421DfJSrFm8eHQKlKluFqYsI80Z9ZzYuxXxmHXWp77zoh5v5qtbps1fG1Dw4E9qYuV3EEAhZFX06c_dRIR0SDC4em_gV3VpwBnPBG1loYb0DJ7Sju06TVinCwUQxL5hmD7qK1wsNAJrfNLsmpLY4GKb9jNIRg4MUi_TSk8vjQ3giL4lQFOIhvaRMXG5wNpVRQ1VFbUk3_QqSiqZdCMzH6yFSVHHWfTvv7mh2YQIO64qXDG0NSxOJKZ9pVhkZhdeMnUvltsRNBRrylPCg5XRS_6lq5Ou47dJcGiv6kOI5kjUrcwT09OkOe4hjEcagPI2lS_uiEOgQh3JFrIZfQt2PSXyXdLCw%3D%3D)

God bless you, and God bless America.

That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?" I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work. The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me. The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. Forever. I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out: | | | God bless you, and God bless America. name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can't handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z85u08ci0d27f0gpq4s3pidjj4cbq0df6gv7qh3g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6cor4cjh2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9d2fngbk51ijqr69as0t8h0e0jms8gt484m8f8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6cor4cjh2bs "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**

| [CLAIM A SIGNED COPY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcl8kehamtm4p4dh3qv3at4f15moqtknqme7a5co_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6cor4cjh2bs "CLAIM A SIGNED COPY")

These signed versions are only available to top conservatives, and you are one of them. We don't want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity.

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z02gdd0m891n4n937rneso2rnms4gg2u2pqbg05g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6cor4cjh2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**

name: Lt. Governor Robinson
subject: Stepping down as Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663072%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dAIpXphkGXl8m%2f%2f3TuqRHQ&sysid=1)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I’m a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I’m the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663073%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZASZ%2fXIpDT3q84n205y%2fA&sysid=1)**
---

I won’t beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I’m humbly asking if you’ll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663073%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZASZ%2fXIpDT3q84n205y%2fA&sysid=1)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & this is the most impactful thing you can do to help us make history & defeat Joe Biden.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

|
---
| Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
---

Business donations are not allowed. Donations must be made by individuals and cannot exceed $6,400 for the cycle. Donations are not tax-deductible.

By adding your name and providing your email and phone number, you agree to receive emails and/or text messages about how you can contribute to or get involved with Friends of Mark Robinson. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency varies.

THANK YOU. -Mark Robinson | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson Business donations are not allowed. Donations must be made by individuals and cannot exceed $6,400 for the cycle. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Bring the Kingdom to the Capitol
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._mtDhAPVlGg)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! **And, after reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL, we are in the FINAL WEEKS of our 2023 tour ... and we'll be roll through the final states in 2024.** [**Will you help TPUSA Faith finish our FINAL EVENTS for the Kingdom to Capitol Tour this year, with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more to help us reach as many people as possible before September 1?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._DQhT_6g)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
So far, **Kingdom to the Capitol** has visited almost half of America's capitals. We only have two more weekends, where we will visit six states to finish out this summer. We plan to roll through the rest of America in 2024. Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America!**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
After reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL this summer, we want to reach THOUSANDS more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, are bringing the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._cwQGNbSyqeMqBexdw) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjEzLTI4YTUzMDJlMjE2OTQxMDQ4MDZjZTFmYzM0NGQ0ZmUyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/S7Y8BhXafAZRiretoSVs_A) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Stefanie's iPhone
subject: apologies in advance for any typos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: _I just pulled the numbers, and last night, we fell $1,268 short of our end-of-month goal._
Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign – donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority.
So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,268 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. **Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? Kirsten is counting on you to dig deep tonight so that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and compete with the GOP's megadonors.**
**Here's your personal donation link:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67418028/419661843/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4334-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTgzYjc5MC04ZDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIzAz13Gb1E0QGIG6MNR-x71i0UzDvyEcnhNivJ86Xw=)**

Stefanie

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67418030/419661845/1575385346?refcode=jtk4334-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTgzYjc5MC04ZDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIzAz13Gb1E0QGIG6MNR-x71i0UzDvyEcnhNivJ86Xw=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67418031/419661846/1575385346?refcode=jtk4334-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTgzYjc5MC04ZDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIzAz13Gb1E0QGIG6MNR-x71i0UzDvyEcnhNivJ86Xw=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: I just pulled the numbers, and last night, we fell $1,268 short of our end-of-month goal. Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign – donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority. So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,268 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? Kirsten is counting on you to dig deep tonight so that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and compete with the GOP's megadonors. Here's your personal donation link:= Thank you so much, Stefanie Sent from my iPhone | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Invitation: Farmers Speak - A virtual round table on revitalizing food, farms and soil
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It is my pleasure to invite you to join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., for a free, online Roundtable on Transforming Food, Farming, and Soil Policy this Thursday, August 3 at 8pm EST

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=1)
---
Hello Peter, [](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=2) It is my pleasure to invite you to join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., for a free, online Roundtable on Transforming Food, Farming, and Soil Policy this Thursday, August 3 at 8pm EST / 5pm PST. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=3 "RSVP Today!") [RSVP Today!](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=3)
---
Agriculture provides a pathway to human and global planetary health. Our wild and working landscapes–when stewarded harmoniously–provide oxygen and nutrient dense food, sequester carbon, and regulate the hydrological cycle which is earth’s air conditioning system, essential for climate resilience and mitigation.
America has much of the best agricultural soil on earth. Farmers and agriculture are a country’s economic backbone and yet they are struggling. For decades, America's farmers have been devastated by policies that have driven up farm debt and increased their vulnerability to climate change.
Fortunately, a new generation of farmers is focused on working with nature by rebuilding their soils using regenerative practices that increase biodiversity, improve their resilience to drought and floods, and increase on-farm profits.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., is making agricultural policy a top priority to turn our nation's farms around. How will he do that? He'll start by learning from some of America's most innovative farmers–and you can join him in this learning.
**[Join us live on August 3](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=4)** for Mr. Kennedy in conversation with **Ben Dobson** of Hudson Carbon in New York, **Reginaldo Haslett-Marroquin** of Tree Range Farms, Inc. in Minnesota, **John Kempf** of Advancing Eco Agriculture of Ohio, **Bob Quinn** of Quinn Farm & Ranch in Montana, **Judith McGeary** of Farm & Ranch Freedom Alliance in Texas, **Will Harris** of White Oak Pastures in Georgia, **Gail Fuller** of Fuller Farms in Kansas, **Kerry Hoffschneider** of The Graze Master Group in Nebraska, and **Wayne Swanson** of Swanson Family Farm in Georgia.
Together we will hear stories of heartbreak and success, loss and regeneration, as Mr. Kennedy charts a course for the revitalization of farming in America.
Land stewardship and farming hold the key to human and ecological security and a livable planet. Learn the exciting ways in which we can save ourselves while developing policies that support farmers.
**[Please RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=5)** , mark your calendars, and join us LIVE on Thursday, August 3 at 8 p.m. EST/5 p.m. PST for this inspiring conversation!
**If you know someone passionate about farming, regenerative agriculture, or sustainable and healthy food, please share this email with them and encourage them to attend the online event!**
I look forward to seeing you and your friends on Thursday!
Elizabeth Kucinich
Regenerative Systems Advisor
Team Kennedy
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=6)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=7)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=8)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=9)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=10)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=11)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=12)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=13)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=14) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=15) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=16) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=17)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_roundtable_on_food_far&n=18).

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5629b3374f654436a3b8b3781cfad50d&_e=ur1LgQHYq9uefAem-Xd6FnHE6QV_dnKcuE3rdhNyr7fH2Me2YDUB_HeF3dTl_NYk2CO1sAzGXYyt3eq9Sz9TIWSmOk3znzKwc0IAFYBzBO6eLtpEQI_RH92dz-y_Q_fndre527Qnblwvz6tMGb8fd_DwklWbUXd_KlStjwZAf7QLfTn6-ftkanxAuii7uaUI_vSFHGQE1dBQh29UgxnWVOV8Hz0sXOSSg7IRTv_N7XklUwJY_Bj3q0JMpg5T5lgvHm78qljgX0lyF5b6e1LOr9qtGDpvENXecVLgwq8OvHzbwUAGtzI6hmtyideVtk_iF1JVuv2dx1pR4U32vlP0Gc5GD_4qTPwF-JjiuzRtgkG5e3bG3T7Gtqld9JiVSPHROaVf8J9cZdWbyIsZB3WnCDFQ34KvTihqgfzc61upBJM%3D)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5629b3374f654436a3b8b3781cfad50d&_e=ur1LgQHYq9uefAem-Xd6FnHE6QV_dnKcuE3rdhNyr7fH2Me2YDUB_HeF3dTl_NYk2CO1sAzGXYyt3eq9Sz9TIWSmOk3znzKwc0IAFYBzBO6eLtpEQI_RH92dz-y_Q_fndre527Qnblwvz6tMGb8fd_DwklWbUXd_KlStjwZAf7QLfTn6-ftkanxAuii7uaUI_vSFHGQE1dBQh29UgxnWVOV8Hz0sXOSSg7IRTv_N7XklUwJY_Bj3q0JMpg5T5lgvHm78qljgX0lyF5b6e1LOr8AjmDGDZF3hB9QyyolyLYpyf5wJiYO3iXm-BoAkcKJ4jwDJHqV6mxdx7STw9WaoWZUjKEMzP1NaQVfjoR9QJ98VqU1MwcE_cOgQTzVzeiEpeyiW1DxdpqundPK67cs35fe-c4ZZA83p8Z_TFD4VQHA%3D)**

name: American Action News
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcckv39j8np5h3qjt00t23qsev6h9iq9958nekpo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjf62hef5s6g0uu6ligg476pefact0gf7ukvl9j8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7s5qpjdifdortjfg05cosmm34dpn1l47e10htm0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ut76lggsi79en56ml6sq0bljkdrdtoku5pi1b0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt0fogk91qjve3d0i9c4binano0vkk11tqt6817g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---

body:
Welcome to the Blue Dogs | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419078/419665504/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTRiYzJjLTkyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kfq4rUCv5pTAFmJ_IZdahdq11hsksCpiyTm0txo6_dY=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419079/419665505/-1302022355?&refcode=E3555-20230731-Welcome1e-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTRiYzJjLTkyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kfq4rUCv5pTAFmJ_IZdahdq11hsksCpiyTm0txo6_dY=) Hi Peter! Welcome to the Blue Dogs – we may look like an indie band, but in reality, we’re just normal people serving in Congress and a new kind of Democrat. In this photo, you see a Marine from Maine, an auto shop owner from Washington State, and a commercial fisherman from Alaska. We’re the leaders for Blue Dogs, a coalition of people dedicated to improving the lives of working people like us. **We also don’t believe in giving you a bunch of bull - so here’s the hard truth:** In order to protect the House from extremists next year, we need to protect _all_ 10 of our Blue Dog seats and win at least 5 more in rural America. It’s going to be tough, but Blue Dogs know how to win in working-class districts (we’re some of the only people who have done it) - and that’s why we’re asking you to join us. As Blue Dogs, here are some of the common sense things we believe in: protecting our freedom, securing our democracy, and passing policies that benefit the everyday, hard-working Americans. We believe if there’s a good policy that helps America, we should pay for it - but working people shouldn’t have to foot the tax bill. We know who we are, and we know how to win. We believe Congress needs more normal people like us, and a lot fewer fringe extremists. [**So, will you please chip in any amount and we’ll put it to good use spreading our message and leading the fight to reclaim America? Your support means everything.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419080/419665506/-1302022355?&refcode=E3555-20230731-Welcome1e-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTRiYzJjLTkyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kfq4rUCv5pTAFmJ_IZdahdq11hsksCpiyTm0txo6_dY=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419081/419665507/-1302022355?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3555-20230731-Welcome1e-EG-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTRiYzJjLTkyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kfq4rUCv5pTAFmJ_IZdahdq11hsksCpiyTm0txo6_dY=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419082/419665508/-1302022355?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3555-20230731-Welcome1e-EG-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTRiYzJjLTkyMzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kfq4rUCv5pTAFmJ_IZdahdq11hsksCpiyTm0txo6_dY=)

clean_body: Welcome to the Blue Dogs | = | = Hi Peter! Welcome to the Blue Dogs – we may look like an indie band, but in reality, we’re just normal people serving in Congress and a new kind of Democrat. In this photo, you see a Marine from Maine, an auto shop owner from Washington State, and a commercial fisherman from Alaska. We’re the leaders for Blue Dogs, a coalition of people dedicated to improving the lives of working people like us. We also don’t believe in giving you a bunch of bull - so here’s the hard truth: In order to protect the House from extremists next year, we need to protect all 10 of our Blue Dog seats and win at least 5 more in rural America. It’s going to be tough, but Blue Dogs know how to win in working-class districts (we’re some of the only people who have done it) - and that’s why we’re asking you to join us. As Blue Dogs, here are some of the common sense things we believe in: protecting our freedom, securing our democracy, and passing policies that benefit the everyday, hard-working Americans. We believe if there’s a good policy that helps America, we should pay for it - but working people shouldn’t have to foot the tax bill. We know who we are, and we know how to win. We believe Congress needs more normal people like us, and a lot fewer fringe extremists. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Now let’s get sht done!
