name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq6ine7viki6j4os2kdkhgn49gi0uf95kfsdji6g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zofkoeiqkgbe9p7f8in8fgqp60afrmvn82jngsno_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3tsjlccd1601esaafa0p8hlcncn133nve5lcnq8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbbddu9gc1l8oue7ksp3sr321sgevfmhpkchc98_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh6aob4cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419425/419666392/-1667455293?sourceid=1051607&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5NTE3NS05MzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47QvFl1ozNb6H_h8LsmTJyQ_iW6wsfVjOgk7dciCxmc=&emci=d3f4c516-8330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f8795175-9330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

The tides are changing in Wisconsin. Today is the day Judge Janet Protasiewicz gets sworn in to the state Supreme Court and becomes **Justice Janet Protasiewicz**. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419426/419666393/-1667455293?sourceid=1051607&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5NTE3NS05MzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47QvFl1ozNb6H_h8LsmTJyQ_iW6wsfVjOgk7dciCxmc=&emci=d3f4c516-8330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f8795175-9330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** **[Right now, there are hundreds more pro-choice women like Janet gearing up to be on the ballot in 2023 and 2024. EMILYs List is here to help them win. Can you contribute to that effort with a donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419433/419666400/-1667455293?sourceid=1051607&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5NTE3NS05MzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47QvFl1ozNb6H_h8LsmTJyQ_iW6wsfVjOgk7dciCxmc=&emci=d3f4c516-8330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f8795175-9330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** One of the cases expected to land in front of Justice Janet this term is whether Wisconsin's draconian abortion ban is constitutional. This is why having pro-choice leaders everywhere is important, Peter — because anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion rights from all sides, and we need to be ready from all sides to FIGHT BACK.

There is always more work to do in the fight for reproductive justice, but it's important to take a moment and celebrate our victories, too. There is a new pro-choice champion on the Wisconsin Supreme Court today, and this community helped make that happen.

**If you'd like to further EMILYs List's mission to elect more women like Janet Protasiewicz everywhere, donate now:** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67419434/419666401/-1667455293?sourceid=1051607&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc5NTE3NS05MzMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47QvFl1ozNb6H_h8LsmTJyQ_iW6wsfVjOgk7dciCxmc=&emci=d3f4c516-8330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f8795175-9330-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you, the EMILYs List team

subject: SIGN ON to tell Target to have PRIDE in their LGBTQ+ gear!

body:
**We have to stand up for PRIDE.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67419477/419666604/-378444293?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230801_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiM2MzMy05NDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1dZS7YPQSFVNFT639iAEsxM5dOzSl8Izmg-bMpPwYc=&emci=4072db5f-9230-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3e0b3c33-9430-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
**[Tell Target to stand up to bully Republican Attorneys General who are trying to erase the LGBTQ+ community.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67419478/419666605/205040176?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230801_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiM2MzMy05NDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1dZS7YPQSFVNFT639iAEsxM5dOzSl8Izmg-bMpPwYc=&emci=4072db5f-9230-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3e0b3c33-9430-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
Seven Republican Attorneys General (AG) are trying to get LGBTQ+ merchandise removed from Target retail stores. Citing obscenity laws, they claim that rainbow gear is harmful to children.
Peter, I didn’t come out as gay until I was an adult because intolerance and ignorance like what we are seeing here creates a climate of exclusion, danger, and fear for LGBTQ+ people.
**We need a groundswell of support to stop this dangerous precedent that could bully and influence corporate behavior and erase the LGBTQ+ community.**
**[Join me and sign the petition to tell Target’s CEO Brian Cornell to stand up to bullies, support the LGBTQ+ community, and keep Pride merchandise in Target stores!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67419479/419666606/205040176?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230801_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiM2MzMy05NDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1dZS7YPQSFVNFT639iAEsxM5dOzSl8Izmg-bMpPwYc=&emci=4072db5f-9230-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3e0b3c33-9430-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
Target is not selling obscene Pride merchandise. The AGs don’t have a legal leg to stand on. This is just an underhanded tactic the Republican AGs are using, but it could work, if Target caves to the bigoted bullies.
Let’s show Target that we support their commitment to inclusion and Pride, and that we have their back if they stand up to this intimidation campaign on the right.
**[Add your name and tell Target’s CEO to stand strong and reject the anti-LGBTQ+ demands to remove Pride merchandise from their stores.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67419480/419666607/205040176?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230801_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBiM2MzMy05NDMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1dZS7YPQSFVNFT639iAEsxM5dOzSl8Izmg-bMpPwYc=&emci=4072db5f-9230-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3e0b3c33-9430-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
It is the bully who is insecure.
-Derek Marshall

name: Jason Crow
subject: Before we hit the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Happy Colorado Day! Not that we need an excuse to celebrate, but today marks Colorado’s 147th birthday. I am proud to call this state home every day. I’m looking forward to spending time this summer hearing from everyday Coloradans on what issues are most important to them. **But before my team and I hit the road, I have a request:** **[Will you let me know what your favorite local restaurant or small business is in Colorado?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67420150/419668640/-2122846830?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2NkODkzZC05NTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZ_eJJtSKaBKXUAVwi5mmyJ9vU1l7iO31WV31_mj-LA=&emci=06ebfa14-7930-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dccd893d-9530-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=29801744)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67420151/419668641/-2122846830?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2NkODkzZC05NTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZ_eJJtSKaBKXUAVwi5mmyJ9vU1l7iO31WV31_mj-LA=&emci=06ebfa14-7930-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dccd893d-9530-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=29801744)
---
After a long day of traveling and meeting Coloradans, one of my favorite things to do is enjoy a good meal from a local restaurant.
Colorado is home to some incredible eats: We have breakfast burritos filled with Pueblo green chile (the best green chile), BBQ made with meat sourced from our farmers, Rocky Mountain oysters, and all the craft beer and whiskey you can imagine.
With so many great restaurants, I’m hoping you can help us narrow down our list.
**[Can you share your favorite restaurant or local business in our new survey? I’m looking forward to scanning through your top picks and reporting back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67420152/419668644/-2122846830?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2NkODkzZC05NTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZ_eJJtSKaBKXUAVwi5mmyJ9vU1l7iO31WV31_mj-LA=&emci=06ebfa14-7930-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dccd893d-9530-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=29801744)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67420153/419668645/-2122846830?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2NkODkzZC05NTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZ_eJJtSKaBKXUAVwi5mmyJ9vU1l7iO31WV31_mj-LA=&emci=06ebfa14-7930-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dccd893d-9530-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=29801744)
---
I’m excited to visit the places that truly make Colorado great, because they are a constant reminder of what I’m fighting for in Congress. I’ll never stop fighting for our land, our communities, and our way of life.
Thank you for being a part of our team,
— Jason Crow
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67420154/419668646/-2122846830?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2NkODkzZC05NTMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZ_eJJtSKaBKXUAVwi5mmyJ9vU1l7iO31WV31_mj-LA=&emci=06ebfa14-7930-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dccd893d-9530-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=29801744)

Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2db9c76379ed4a39af37594f408eb6c9&_e=AGr7-W_JFTLQuS3TbQ3VwFG3UxZVjUgAPERfGtg9NzkVCd57ccJXsMwf0rjLqW9nuD4kg6ThW02Y1mdFplu4lnT7WsvHlcmyRDpXe2JnCCS7_QmIn3nvVDZ099bbexfkEjipXMBaZU87rvHKVCRn_Q1AHb5e_of2dxjG5QE0K20BIvMPzbjPhyK0bEUYPBF_hpZNHwsmWy8Fq9zZq41Alw2PB0OYu3Xs0SWABxUNsu_Y_KsOzaVsZ520emCVoKKRdTqTUeTJU-7MK_LgQtPqmywZfkxf2QjNQQk43vsxgd3AG4kJYfeBKqYVcPzULoWrXn1gr6blYgwc1ZzsX-us6EY626hu_62ecZYMEjwoCsxkjYk1AsuXeRAzdlhikkFR8GMDejROiRTNR95bJu8-JOsnQhpA7K2rV38vo92hIVs%3D)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

clean_body: His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite. | Friend, Five seconds. That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth. His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite. Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to: Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars. Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals. Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers. Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there. Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package! On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals. This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous. But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way. That's why I'm emailing you today. SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders. Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion. clean_body: | | | | This is disappointing Peter, I’ll get straight to the point. This month our team set out to raise $60,000 - we just got out of our monthly finance meeting and we missed our target by $9,845 Lori decided to extend the goal by ONE MORE DAY. Our house seat is in danger and the early days of this race are crucial if we are going to protect it from the radical left. Click to donate to our goal and help us bridge the gap. Thank you, Dave H. Team Lori Finance Team Sent from my iPhone | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Dave’s iPhone 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kellyanne=20Conway?=
subject: Did you see this email from Eric? Fwd:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Wanted to make sure you saw this: | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12616717?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4270063467&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Hello Peter,
---
| It’s Kellyanne Conway, I wanted to make sure you got this email from my friend Chairman Eric Underwood; I am really excited to meet you and other grassroots Republicans who are pushing our Republican party forward.

[Will I see you there?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c9b60c9cf9&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Best,
Kellyanne Conway
---
|
---
| P.S. It’s not too late to**[ join NEGOP+ to give you access to this exclusive event.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9afc3c5ed6&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| **\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Chairman Eric Underwood <admin@ne.gop>
Date: Tue, Jul 11, 2023 at 11:20 AM
Subject: NEGOP-Group Kellyanne Conway would love to meet you!

Dear {Recipient/Fellow Republican},
---
| In just one month, NEGOP+ members will have the opportunity to hear from a woman who made history while working on Donald J. Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.

**We are excited to organize this event for NEGOP+ members, as Nebraskans have a significant role to play as engaged voters in the Presidential primary election less than a year away!**

[**NEGOP+ Booster Club membership includes**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d1c4c29f41&e=25844e23a8) a Booster Club Membership Card, a NEGOP+ Club Pin, free and discounted entry fees to NEGOP events, and a specialty Booster Club Item. This is a great time to kick-off your NEGOP+ membership with the opportunity to spend an evening with Kellyanne Conway!

**Event Details**
**Date:** August 18th
**Time:** 6:30 pm CT
**Location:** Divots Conference Center, 4200 West Norfolk Ave, Norfolk, NE 68701

**About Kellyanne Conway**
---
| |
---
Kellyanne Conway served as Campaign Manager of the come-from-behind victory of Trump-Pence 2016, making her the first woman in U.S. history to successfully helm a presidential campaign.

For nearly four years, Kellyanne served as Assistant to the President and Senior Counselor to the President at the White House, working on a range of issues affecting domestic and global policy.
---
| She is the Founder and former President of The Polling Company, Inc./WomanTrend a privately-held, woman-owned corporation she operated from 1995-2016.

She is one of the most quoted and noted pollsters on the national scene, having provided commentary on thousands of television shows on ABC, CBS, NBC, PBS, CNN, CNBC, MSNBC, HBO, Comedy Central, MTV, Fox News Channel, on the paid speaking circuit and for numerous radio shows and print stories. Throughout her multiple decades in market research, Kellyanne has provided primary research and advice for clients in all 50 states and has directed hundreds of demographic and attitudinal survey projects for statewide and congressional political races, trade associations, and Fortune 100 companies. Kellyanne is a “fully-recovered” attorney, licensed to practice law in four jurisdictions (Maryland, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and the District of Columbia). She holds a law degree, with honors, from George Washington University Law Center and completed her undergraduate studies at Trinity College and Oxford University.

Kellyanne has served on numerous boards and advisory councils. Her new business, KAConsulting, provides clients strategic advice, polling, and media training to corporate, political and nonprofit clients. Kellyanne is a Fox News Contributor. Her memoir, Here's The Deal, published in May of 2022, was a #1 New York Times bestseller. She is mom to four amazing teenagers.

**[Join NEGOP+ Today](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=83271ae078&e=25844e23a8)**
If you're not already a member, here's your perfect chance to become part of this impactful gathering of active Conservatives. Join the membership to ensure your place at this **Do Not Miss Event** , and stand alongside us as we strive to strengthen the Republican Party's influence in Nebraska!

---
| [BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8a5a76c248&e=25844e23a8 "BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »")
---
| We greatly appreciate your continued support and eagerly look forward to your participation as we work together to uphold our shared values.
---
| Best Regards,

Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d93a21fc5e&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=37ba50c55e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=37ba50c55e).
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: IBEW Local 441 Endorses State Senator Dave Min
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
Organized Labor Continues To Unite Around Min’s Run For Congress In CA-47 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/243c7f1b6510/ibew-local-441-endorses-state-senator-dave-min-15659712?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** August 1, 2023
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**IBEW Local 441 Endorses
State Senator Dave Min**

_Organized Labor Continues To Unite Around Min’s Run For Congress In CA-47_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 441 announced their support for Dave Min for Congress, adding to the incredibly robust list of endorsements enjoyed by the campaign, including labor and national advocacy groups, as well as over 150 local, statewide and federal elected officials. IBEW Local 441 joins UFCW Local 324, IBEW Local 47, International Brotherhood of Teamsters Joint Council 42 and International Union of Painters and Allied Trades (IUPAT) District Council 36, as well as SEIU International, the California Federation of Teachers, and the American Federation of Teachers, in supporting State Senator Dave Min for US Congress.

“**A friend to Labor and longtime advocate for working families, Dave Min has our whole-hearted support,** ” said Neal Lauzon, Business Manager for IBEW Local 441. “**It’s always a pleasure to support candidates who have our best interests at heart, like solid wages and a fair economy. We look forward to his representation in Congress.** ”

IBEW Local 441 represents 2,400 skilled and trained electricians in Orange County. They are currently partnered with 264 electrical contractors, servicing companies such as Boeing, Panasonic, and Disneyland, as well as Cal State Fullerton and UC Irvine. Min has emerged as the clear choice of Labor in the race for California’s 47th district.

Min entered the race in January with the endorsement of the incumbent, Congresswoman Katie Porter, who is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. Since then, he has built massive momentum, announcing the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e451a6f111&e=7017cc100e).

Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee.

Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
#####
_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| | **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: Organized Labor Continues To Unite Around Min’s Run For Congress In CA-47 | | | | | | | For Immediate Release: August 1, 2023 Contact: press@davemin.com IBEW Local 441 Endorses State Senator Dave Min Organized Labor Continues To Unite Around Min’s Run For Congress In CA-47 IRVINE, CA — Today, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 441 announced their support for Dave Min for Congress, adding to the incredibly robust list of endorsements enjoyed by the campaign, including labor and national advocacy groups, as well as over 150 local, statewide and federal elected officials. IBEW Local 441 joins UFCW Local 324, IBEW Local 47, International Brotherhood of Teamsters Joint Council 42 and International Union of Painters and Allied Trades (IUPAT) District Council 36, as well as SEIU International, the California Federation of Teachers, and the American Federation of Teachers, in supporting State Senator Dave Min for US Congress. “A friend to Labor and longtime advocate for working families, Dave Min has our whole-hearted support, ” said Neal Lauzon, Business Manager for IBEW Local 441. “It’s always a pleasure to support candidates who have our best interests at heart, like solid wages and a fair economy. We look forward to his representation in Congress. ” IBEW Local 441 represents 2,400 skilled and trained electricians in Orange County. They are currently partnered with 264 electrical contractors, servicing companies such as Boeing, Panasonic, and Disneyland, as well as Cal State Fullerton and UC Irvine. Min has emerged as the clear choice of Labor in the race for California’s 47th district. Min entered the race in January with the endorsement of the incumbent, Congresswoman Katie Porter, who is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. Since then, he has built massive momentum, announcing the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available . Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024 PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Dave Min For Senate PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

| With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are understandably looking to safeguard their assets.

After analyzing its customers' account data, investment firm Charles Schwab's research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't.1

Additionally, those who work with an advisor "displayed a more diversified asset allocation mix and had a lower concentration of assets in particular securities."1
### Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?
Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders and also had more diversified asset allocation mixes. [See additional results here.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c09cb9629384d36a1d63fbd4ab0345d&_e=SWBuGif9cFb118Z2AURCSBZf9gH-YWA-BztCgbbyt99x5gKUdHYP8XbqTZBXXFEGK-cl1k-vb1U4MweB8HYTy4L8CTyGiY_oPKooPWque3EU2_hnllqvkj6TK96oETncCR0nBZrCtd7hxTMRT2B5tbwpqFYk8CJtNX6jGBWtdq3rpHF9wP723vC2mTXt4tmhdZf27pvcBCCj4gdOGyY9En93i8mFsXtLiLaoUrj0PTYku7nhzLGDqTW5of5shUpdE1nQWp9SavZnChDiHetWOrG1oRmLim8qn2XAKnn_7PhJQ90GL6B61uSxVnbF8zKYgSgZsuK65Tjz9Dg91OZBcfRzdoEiI1-gML53dU5TiUb0YkK_jtXSzlQhZ5WEGGsxkNZiVL6D88LdYFhubVDXo9PG2Pui1T1RMZQunlQ-EZm1pivHlXKZ1AZNMrOOkGqmB373QydWzEeb6iF-1jpBe5amtbNQZDuNaTjI0KQwlQo%3D)
### Why Work With a Financial Advisor?
Working with a financial advisor could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

Ready to take control of your retirement plan? After analyzing its customers' account data, investment firm Charles Schwab's research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't.1 Additionally, those who work with an advisor "displayed a more diversified asset allocation mix and had a lower concentration of assets in particular securities."1 Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings? Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022: Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438 Non-advised participants: $236,2061 Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders and also had more diversified asset allocation mixes. Why Work With a Financial Advisor? Working with a financial advisor could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. “We need champions in Congress” | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dXbQ1QYfuX5229pqJTwk-t3K6-1DZbE0s1TXZ3gH7bks3lwIUzXUYkGtmu8ajzB2a611yuThrOrcLGKPShOndbVbe3-BicQNhFMlJsbQtfSAsnGAIRDo4XARex9q4PNj1Z9nAAvKt3VBRnsZ-tSCf9Q/3yd/hA9NjBv-RUClAZRJnJMFFg/h0/rwxfcmVA48JfwsqSJIQb-ql0mACs5nS42TDHL18X2ow)

Peter, as a Democratic, pro-choice woman, I couldn’t be more proud to announce that the nation’s largest resource for women in politics, EMILYs List, is endorsing our campaign! This endorsement shows that we have the momentum we need to win in TX-15 — now all we need is to keep going. **[Will you add your endorsement alongside EMILYs List, Wendy Davis, Sylvia Garcia, and more by making a contribution today? The election may seem far away, but early money is the best way to keep up our momentum and get to a win when we go up against Monica next November!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0BGboLv8GrfD4925-J93OcwT8kiP2QI1n6ush8HErSAUU2NmskgT6UZ-IhrjNu-MVT6KUKsvz217gt6kbP9__Pg2Wk18oaMU92wWBvMkFjycGyIdkflWoq5j9DNP7TdQMt0uZOL1IzoTUxQb0HPG4H5Vv9vTD0IEEGk5wbjp5oj3iYptVpBK2xanAhMc2p7pdCj7IKEtrrh1n1l4Faa9wTD_BthoGJ4xAo82xg_j_hmh4ieIn4Zd4rnO_ACQ2XBlquYMsOhRxtYkkHAHkqCe20iS6VCPE02elB2sNoT1mhsqaaWl0VQSiwPc9cwj2fXIDjFzbD9etPl2BI8X1K8BaA/3yd/hA9NjBv-RUClAZRJnJMFFg/h1/nznX1svYXU4oMHGwJV3f-NWrLVfFNQPQFunfs31Tpk0)** Here’s what EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler has to say about why they’re endorsing our campaign: _“Michelle Vallejo has dedicated her career to improving the lives of South Texans and addressing the challenges they face. As a businesswoman and community leader, she has been a champion for the women, working families, and small businesses that make the 15th Congressional District thrive. Texans are currently living under some of the most draconian and extreme anti-abortion laws in the country, and it is urgent that we elect Democratic pro-choice women like Vallejo who will fight in Congress to restore and protect reproductive freedom. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Vallejo in her run for this critical seat, and we know that she will be a pivotal voice for her community in the U.S. House.”_ Peter, South Texas deserves a leader who will keep politicians OUT of our private health care decisions. But in her short time in Congress so far, Monica De La Cruz has been in lockstep with her party’s radical, anti-abortion agenda, voting in favor of MORE restrictions on women’s health care. **We must defeat her.** In Congress, I’ll always fight for a woman’s right to make her own decisions, affordable health care, and good-paying jobs. **[EMILYs List’s endorsement is proof that our movement has national support. Can I count on your support to help get me to Washington where I’ll fight for the women of South Texas and beyond?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0BGboLv8GrfD4925-J93OcwT8kiP2QI1n6ush8HErSDkypT57r1PvZhnX-N7VrA6fk6em-mG-TgX-mZspTJvTEysN4AV5R6kkPXbfWa1-AkkLLKaMYaaR6kyB2wgOb1qbRZXnh85FaenyIw9Ae2Y6nUeIz0CMcROih_wYV_NsbQUsxijaySv0rPUBV6uePmHglWOSLVKLCSeL05vFqvtO2IR3szLPXai2OukreQ5LiKmoLiwpga_CP9Yf6dtgsbfbK5EMCJRxjZIKI11jJtJu9znt-rZKCKWEuHikhVqn2FibkJL4UfoMZYSXT4Ummqv8TeuNHUXJj5zUNK4EOF1TQ/3yd/hA9NjBv-RUClAZRJnJMFFg/h2/CmoiN7VsEtMvIN9rkS1LtRgVejiJWBve3m5yeEskPXc)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0BGboLv8GrfD4925-J93OcwT8kiP2QI1n6ush8HErSB0idm9mmvAKWa6BgKRzuISqB_kYfdnYfEzPhC2Nx9opyBbc1nAPnGjLqZdgRqi-RJyvu-GXLLSby_OZS0r4-9s5Xf9tgr9au26UVqYsICQWFX4NJh1iWufQD4URCDn93fVi2Qk4ogwDDV8N9-pNXx_ygXbKyUZvaaK5V8Xz67q3QDF6wIJM3QuUv85OJw2ZGNTVZ2VZjHA8OWPOBnCniCO64OPWqLLkZYUX8N8Jhjo7pNrM5VVimWaumpyv2TkdMpaXdJ5706MQ8ZS_y5im_NEXp84KeOM4ksf62VC9yIGlQ/3yd/hA9NjBv-RUClAZRJnJMFFg/h3/bfr6kvN-SyvHfk6zxt6wZPy-8pp9K1AyCha3f3Z8Rgo)** ¡Vamos Por Quince! clean_body: “We need champions in Congress” | | | Peter, as a Democratic, pro-choice woman, I couldn’t be more proud to announce that the nation’s largest resource for women in politics, EMILYs List, is endorsing our campaign! This endorsement shows that we have the momentum we need to win in TX-15 — now all we need is to keep going. Here’s what EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler has to say about why they’re endorsing our campaign: “Michelle Vallejo has dedicated her career to improving the lives of South Texans and addressing the challenges they face. As a businesswoman and community leader, she has been a champion for the women, working families, and small businesses that make the 15th Congressional District thrive. Texans are currently living under some of the most draconian and extreme anti-abortion laws in the country, and it is urgent that we elect Democratic pro-choice women like Vallejo who will fight in Congress to restore and protect reproductive freedom. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Vallejo in her run for this critical seat, and we know that she will be a pivotal voice for her community in the U.S. House.” Peter, South Texas deserves a leader who will keep politicians OUT of our private health care decisions. But in her short time in Congress so far, Monica De La Cruz has been in lockstep with her party’s radical, anti-abortion agenda, voting in favor of MORE restrictions on women’s health care. We must defeat her. In Congress, I’ll always fight for a woman’s right to make her own decisions, affordable health care, and good-paying jobs. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Pro Life Update
subject: CS Lewis Christianity DVD
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zipon30cpktae34vv7fug989oj7qnm7igaia92h0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjflfa2f96353m7s2dj10van1d0trjoichmaci38_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrl33nji9aghjnr8ah3r01ie27fo14v0lp1h7n2g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeh0tc3bnrd0obai1bn6icpmhs2ineh1oqveuvl0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Religious Liberty Survey
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm4sf6pmpfdje16u47qe9ljn5td8urvdhpc9heco_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv7ma54t76rgdand9pk3fp1tcmmi2uf377gsms6g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze0urnhv3jkq3rd7fujcdt656lm2c164k7h6mgp0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuc87c8urqlj7v741bskggmacdfhlue0697l6ebo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjh69o31cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Deroy Murdock
---

body:

If you don’t live in Montana, take a moment to check out what we’re hoping everyone in the state sees over the next couple of weeks. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=17fe21ed0a8f4f55a21a5f633849164f&_t=xCmqxqQcwbe5KyGE6L6nD2IyF5ogt2rXWQnjO0xjcTxXAFLuR5PxIhiqm9zYWKqP0YCbs78XPZ25n6LHBxgtrhuWI35ANzubJDIT1VeaZQw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=17fe21ed0a8f4f55a21a5f633849164f&_t=xCmqxqQcwbe5KyGE6L6nD2IyF5ogt2rXWQnjO0xjcTxXAFLuR5PxIhiqm9zYWKqP0YCbs78XPZ25n6LHBxgtrhuWI35ANzubJDIT1VeaZQw%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=17fe21ed0a8f4f55a21a5f633849164f&_e=CsN1aXjgzPTAr22YJ5SQK-fviQB06Yr_fTCn9GeMm4k6oXfkZeYR4i4tB5gRX-o07M7yjSHWtOonlcaN35lbb_ay7W-kfFEJxxn7rIJ7nK2sVAJpOrEmkzadFlxg8zcm_1V9sYuJbRyPPMllLRdxS9W6o-rj44VQnmOWf2j0jkJE__ApnyBVVsV_dxCbOJmu71e-Ye3bKgguomp3PuuG6MEaA6u36WUOxOqR0AjxueEzeLq10BmSCFDNnCc_4PZ7-2BJkqcv_rNGoTb1avwsY_8vETOYAWYd2IZot2ydjMLWaLECVMXF-WgoEaS8GVYSY1AIIxSMUwxed-mDMRP3M6K02k79faWLW6Fvc0chV9FLYfvLm9ryTRRmvWVqB3qWP9uQHkwfJgdakLqtK_Lt8_4p6yu6Wo5Iq6OyXrLCduk%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you today. On Friday, my campaign **[launched our first major statewide advertising campaign of the 2024 election.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=17fe21ed0a8f4f55a21a5f633849164f&_e=CsN1aXjgzPTAr22YJ5SQK-fviQB06Yr_fTCn9GeMm4k6oXfkZeYR4i4tB5gRX-o07M7yjSHWtOonlcaN35lbb_ay7W-kfFEJxxn7rIJ7nK2sVAJpOrEmkzadFlxg8zcm_1V9sYuJbRyPPMllLRdxS9W6o-rj44VQnmOWf2j0jkJE__ApnyBVVsV_dxCbOJmu71e-Ye3bKgguomp3PuuG6MEaA6u36WUOxOqR0AjxueEzeLq10BmSCFDNnCc_4PZ7-2BJkqcv_rNGoTb1avwsY0FYqAJT9xENu6P4ndxCRO6OFTTpGbE18v_onLuSL33RnaHIena7myP1CjNSb_mM3ZPqVgGzhMCxqiETR_3AHwJ05X__7JJjawLrIkdDuvz4lhgVIhlB1JiUAXPAigQ3DAzuNFSLcco0e-jjwRg9N-w%3D)** More folks in Montana know about our campaign now than they did before I entered the race on June 27th, but there are still quite a few voters out there who don’t know enough about me to form an opinion.

That’s why for the next couple weeks our **[“God& Country”](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=17fe21ed0a8f4f55a21a5f633849164f&_e=CsN1aXjgzPTAr22YJ5SQK-fviQB06Yr_fTCn9GeMm4k6oXfkZeYR4i4tB5gRX-o07M7yjSHWtOonlcaN35lbb_ay7W-kfFEJxxn7rIJ7nK2sVAJpOrEmkzadFlxg8zcm_1V9sYuJbRyPPMllLRdxS9W6o-rj44VQnmOWf2j0jkJE__ApnyBVVsV_dxCbOJmu71e-Ye3bKgguomp3PuuG6MEaA6u36WUOxOqR0AjxueEzeLq10BmSCFDNnCc_4PZ7-2BJkqcv_rNGoTb1avwsY3bH1dKxO5iiMDvzBGb0N3fdaw8ed8lh9XO_PIWRIbcPio7RvhOKztOTbI7r9pmZOVbuPsFwMAKPyV6JxarXVxMBV6aGJf5_fnB9m1gIDCw4j02cysBNPZYxRO8aPBbWLF6q1zlXtgFYC7t7halyIRE%3D)** TV-Ad will be running in Montana’s major media markets and online. That’s why for the next couple weeks our TV-Ad will be running in Montana’s major media markets and online. subject: BREAKING: New GOP opponent enters neck-and-neck race in Ohio!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
BREAKING: NEW GOP OPPONENT ENTERS OHIO SENATE RACE AGAINST SHERROD BROWN
Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever!
This news couldn't have come at a worse time, folks:
After The Cook Political Report called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat.
With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight:
Please, folks split a donation between Sherrod and Serve America to help us reach this critical goal so we can win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
Thanks for your support,
—Team Sherrod

body: Background on Devon Archer testimony about Bidens and Burisma [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64423&L=29977&F=T&&hash=13f31d75ceea12826c65f51b37186be8c0fd94649e6b951daafccf14f6b6949b] Devon Archer tells Congress Burisma pressured Hunter Biden to deal with Ukrainian prosecutor: source [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64423&L=29977&F=T&&hash=13f31d75ceea12826c65f51b37186be8c0fd94649e6b951daafccf14f6b6949b] Source: Just the News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64423&L=29977&F=T&&hash=13f31d75ceea12826c65f51b37186be8c0fd94649e6b951daafccf14f6b6949b] A source familiar with the House Oversight and Accountability Committee interview of Hunter Biden business associate: "Devon Archer testified that the value of adding Hunter Biden to Burisma’s board was 'the brand' and confirmed that then-Vice President Joe Biden brought the most value to 'the brand.'" Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Justice for a copy of the FBI document that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” A Washington Examiner story: Republicans said the FBI form indicated Burisma owner Mykola Zlochevsky allegedly told an FBI informant that he paid $5 million apiece to Hunter and then-Vice President Biden to shake off a corruption investigation. [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64423&L=28126&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcnVzc2lhbnMtdHJvbGxpbmctam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1uZXdzbGluayZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7eea6d3b252809e10f2d091e2908ca6cb7741649c6da5656d3d3ede3c07cefac] Records from the State Department include a January 17, 2017, email from George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was copied to then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling” Joe Biden over “his son’s business." On January 17, 2017, Biden was on his sixth visit in seven years to Ukraine. When Biden visited Ukraine in 2015, he threatened to withhold $1 billion if the country’s top prosecutor was not dismissed. Hunter Biden was under investigation by the later-fired prosecutor general. clean_body: Background on Devon Archer testimony about Bidens and Burisma [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Devon Archer tells Congress Burisma pressured Hunter Biden to deal with Ukrainian prosecutor: source [] Source: Just the News [] A source familiar with the House Oversight and Accountability Committee interview of Hunter Biden business associate: "Devon Archer testified that the value of adding Hunter Biden to Burisma’s board was 'the brand' and confirmed that then-Vice President Joe Biden brought the most value to 'the brand.'" [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-06-28 Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Document Alleging Bidens’ Bribery Scheme with Burisma Owner [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Justice for a copy of the FBI document that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” A Washington Examiner story: Republicans said the FBI form indicated Burisma owner Mykola Zlochevsky allegedly told an FBI informant that he paid $5 million apiece to Hunter and then-Vice President Biden to shake off a corruption investigation. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-09-17 Obama State Official Notes Russians’ Trolling of Joe Biden on Hunter Biden Corruption Allegations [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Records from the State Department include a January 17, 2017, email from George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was copied to then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling” Joe Biden over “his son’s business." On January 17, 2017, Biden was on his sixth visit in seven years to Ukraine. When Biden visited Ukraine in 2015, he threatened to withhold $1 billion if the country’s top prosecutor was not dismissed. Hunter Biden was under investigation by the later-fired prosecutor general. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2020-10-27 Democratic Lobbying Firm Met with U.S. Officials in Ukraine in February 2019, Discussed Burisma Holdings [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Records from the State Department include a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. body:
More madness from leftist professors... Is their most dangerous idea yet?| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmxCdeCNknAmiz9wq8vOlt2TAsg-1RixUP4C64xqFjnk_zK5UDcb3z5G7aap-8OdL5z7dYpOfJ7R-aF_Rtk8XzTcmHBF2z2gcueJhlFdhWe00ariUXoRp6kEMZtXXJ3vZD97E62v0v9cPqxqc7mh8RRQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Two radical Left academics challenged President Biden in an open letter — and The Swamp can’t stop talking about it. And when you read what they said, you’ll see why:
---
“**We urge President Biden to restrain MAGA justices** immediately by announcing that if and when they issue rulings that are based on gravely mistaken interpretations of the Constitution that undermine our most fundamental commitments, the Administration will be guided by its own constitutional interpretation.”
---
**Let me translate that for you:**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmZJ3ff8_QESgo5BdizwvOcJPETGLWPh_U9fx3VbWdmbGgX7XN3LqXDXYEA130JTnv_VKBQz73I7AvRjfxMyfxfy0oV_M7F65GKXKVioXwXEoLaGCB0_cqAXUYhhOKkJfBczXZRrkoOljfk_IiP6a8AA%3D%3D)
---
[**Fight Back Against the Left’s Power Grab**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmlhNptxPvYORa5wmim0K8JTLIzE64sX9QOzfmWnJDdSdmOx2Je4_DoltHNJPfYsF6FygdoW9KFKzIajUqqFcW-yfxMR_D75Fk_u7pfUjSAFtlZVW9uO19_cdW-mtGbUq4uxEPccgrwGy-MoOYTr4Rqg%3D%3D)
---
A president cannot simply ignore one of the other three co-equal branches of government. Anyone who passed middle-school civics can tell you: That’s not how America works. But that’s how the Left WANTS it to work — and they are finally saying it out loud. **Peter, this latest headline just confirms that we’ve chosen the right fight at _[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmK4IAb9vfSuYVtXQTfQD2AnkzqFM2G2YdBFv0_8fTu2TkVDhKKtfEfhAPrD3eqdzO9mbRcykpdaXEnwey_dgkAU4O54fmlhheqSDwz-u_YDT-TOLCHIj5kGwH3tYekZyeTn6_anOHrcSlY4tzWScbxQ%3D%3D)_****. ** The Left dares to make such a blatant attack on our courts because they KNOW that the judiciary is the last line of defense against their plans to wholly transform America. It’s why the Left has:
* _Fought to elect radical judges across America..._
* _Poured millions into electing radical prosecutors..._
* _And even threatened the Supreme Court. _

We are tracking the woke mob’s activity and ready to fight for our courts at every level of our government — but we can’t do it without you.** ** **_We’re calling on all patriots to donate to the Court Defense Fund today! Can we count on you?_**
---
[**I Will Stand Up For Our Courts!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmP2eQ_INT02zXYjialHGZbfDsNNpMy2h-z_3Lfk2xHALl50zdxDAovKcLfmQG186sRrRsBdtVVfZ7EtdG1wgwGrmeI6jUWN1_a2zFLJ4nXztWebsxF8FSwJ5km7hrrEhR2fncnS8tueDdxVh8NJabvQ%3D%3D)
---
Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive DirectorFair Courts America
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3d90fea251484152a0f33606ca19501c&_e=j4l0MVJK2Ofn2aKeBllmBfpaFgOrLXsWpacfBtK_ESXuzZEDwxq5mQY1xe5MB6dexhbyeKr0GlK4lk0qVorH20IPTRVGmTnu4OEFC-twmrM038bQsOrXIkfDGMLKOxo3XE4mWAcr5GmthD2Lo5ab_a36ke8sshZ3rZpP2QC_6DMtb8W-2pdk27fBLsaHWT9uI29dBS6cevVzIPC9OFanYtcy8fYzjy26mDnCN_lRjERini-zfAUdw1BSw87YoNBmRtvaE9Qa0hMk3dO-p0rJFxFdHbGxWaVMdOBYQ6j0SfNTzzhRpeWikiEUyXFYt1u4uXFpgSlsygdaufAl_oc32yRQJBujBRXFnaoOSj-9Ud2qiMn3tHLcqmpWealVVFwhHa9rJCYWzd3Ruq8PFxDGGA%3D%3D)
---
_P.S. The letter specifically suggests Biden act immediately, saying “the threat that MAGA justices pose is so extreme” that it merits acting without Congressional approval. This is a trial balloon for a MASSIVE power grab, and we’ve got to be ready. _

name: Team Cori
subject: dismantling white supremacy and building an anti-racist society:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
To eradicate white supremacy, we must face its painful truth -- not hide behind whitewashed history. | |
---
Peter, Last week, Cori Bush called out Republicans for their racist policies on the floor of the House of Representatives. She also called out Florida’s governor for defending the state’s recent school curriculum updates that would teach students that enslaved people benefited from slavery. **Cori is the first activist from the movement for Black lives to be elected to Congress, and she’s surrounded by our country’s anti-Black racism every day.** She works in a Capitol building built by enslaved people. Past presidents and members of Congress enslaved Black people, and a fifth of the country’s current powerful decision-makers are direct descendants of enslavers.[1] **Cori Bush isn’t like most members of Congress. She’s lived the same struggles that everyday Americans endure, which is what drives her fierce urgency for transformational change. She knows that anti-Black racism is built into our country’s institutions, and she’s not going to let right-wing extremists erase our country’s history and present truth.** [**Can you chip in $5 or more today to support Rep. clean_body: To eradicate white supremacy, we must face its painful truth -- not hide behind whitewashed history. | | Peter, Last week, Cori Bush called out Republicans for their racist policies on the floor of the House of Representatives. She also called out Florida’s governor for defending the state’s recent school curriculum updates that would teach students that enslaved people benefited from slavery. Cori is the first activist from the movement for Black lives to be elected to Congress, and she’s surrounded by our country’s anti-Black racism every day. She works in a Capitol building built by enslaved people. Past presidents and members of Congress enslaved Black people, and a fifth of the country’s current powerful decision-makers are direct descendants of enslavers.[1] Cori Bush isn’t like most members of Congress. She’s lived the same struggles that everyday Americans endure, which is what drives her fierce urgency for transformational change. She knows that anti-Black racism is built into our country’s institutions, and she’s not going to let right-wing extremists erase our country’s history and present truth. White supremacy is entrenched in this country and our work to eradicate it depends on our ability to face its painful truth -- not hide behind whitewashed history. That’s why Cori is boldly pushing for visionary policies such as reparations, investing in Black communities, and healing the harms of criminalization and environmental racism. She’s helping create the multi-racial democracy we truly need in order to have healthy, thriving communities in the United States. | | My name is Conor O'Callaghan and I'm excited to share that **today I've officially launched my campaign for Congress in Arizona's 1st District!** Year after year, election after election, David Schwiekert breezes through our district, tossing around words like "reasonable" and "common sense" and "moderate." Then he returns to Washington, where he backs the most extreme measures he can find, including blocking common sense legislation and undermining our democracy. I am stepping up because I've had enough of career politicians like David Schweikert who put themselves before their constituents. **It's time for a change and together we're going to make it happen.** As a lifelong Democrat and a proud resident of the district, I'm building a movement rooted in the values that make this community great: integrity, dedication, and a commitment to solving problems, not prolonging them. My wife, Tina, and I are raising our three sons right here in Scottsdale, where I grew up. I'm proud they are attending public school, just like I did, and will one day follow in my footsteps at Chaparral High School (Go Firebirds!). **More than anything, those three boys are why I'm committed to represent AZ-01 with compassion, innovation, and an unwavering dedication to improve opportunity for everyone who calls this community home.** I want to give back to this district that gave me so much. But to do that, I need your help. **[Check out our campaign video and please consider supporting our movement. name: Rick Scott
subject: I took on the establishment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | It’s been a few months since I challenged Mitch McConnell for Senate leadership.

And even though he retaliated against me by kicking me off the Commerce Committee, I have no regrets.

I want to bring a new era of conservative leadership to Washington, one that takes action on the promises we made to voters during our campaigns.__

We need bold Republican leaders who aren’t afraid to make hard choices and take a firm line.

And even though I lost the leadership election, I haven’t backed down from my fight to RESCUE AMERICA.

For too long, Republican leaders in Washington have caved to Democrats which is leading America toward woke socialism. We need leaders who are tough, speak the truth and aren’t afraid to stand up to Joe Biden.

And whether I’m in leadership or not, that’s EXACTLY the kind of Senator I aim to be every day.
