name: Cortlynn Parkinson
subject: Scott's Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/9020a1993638cf6fc3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, Scott doesn’t know that I’m doing this, but I wanted to let you in on a little secret: Scott’s birthday is coming up! **Scott turns 41 on Thursday** – and I’m just racking my brain over what to get him. My husband has been an **amazing father** to our four kids. We’re raising them with the values of loving our **God** , our **country** and our **freedoms**.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/0066ef58306230cfc3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Now, Scott is taking the same passion that he brings to our family to save our country by **running for the U.S. Senate in the state of Virginia.** He’s running against **Hillary Clinton’s former running mate** , Tim Kaine.
---
[**Help my husband beat Hillary’s running mate >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/c658f2f8f151dd8ec3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Tim Kaine has been in Washington for over 30 years, and I don’t have to tell you that our country is in bad shape. Parents are having their rights stripped away in the classroom, and our kids are being subjected to a radical agenda that teaches them to HATE our country. Scott could no longer sit on the sidelines and watch our rights as parents stripped away. So here’s what I’m thinking: for Scott’s 41st birthday, _**let’s help him in his fight for parental rights all across the country.**_ **[Would you give Scott a $41 donation to his campaign to tell him THANK YOU for standing up for parental rights?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/cfaa48db0541d5f4c3d6b838967d376c/42903)**
---
[**Tell Scott HAPPY BIRTHDAY! Chip in $41 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/17f40d07975c2341c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Over the last three years, politicians like Tim Kaine and Joe Biden have **waged an outright war on parental rights** by:
---
* Shutting down schools far longer than needed
* Pushing woke ideology in our schools
* Taking parents out of the decision to choose where their child goes to school

---
Parents have a **right to take action** to shield their child from this type of indoctrination.** Parental rights mean that **we, as parents, can’t sit back & tolerate cultural wokeism**, or the hijacking of our kids’ innocence. **Parents can, and must fight back.****
****Which is why we have to nationalize Scott’s Senate race against Tim Kaine.**** **[So please, take a minute and send Scott a HAPPY BIRTHDAY gift of $41.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/df60eed5eb0d39f4c3d6b838967d376c/42903) I know that he’ll be so surprised when I tell him! For Freedom,Cortlynn Parkinson
---
[**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/aa135f110e3c4ded/94c80a06dd4fd0fac3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
**FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA**
---

body:
Hey Peter – THANKS A MILLION! I know this month has been tough amidst vacations, events, and wanting a break from the end of the previous quarter. However, we still managed to beat the summer slump and surpass our goal for the month! | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=95f52d379d374ce88f3af95403e65608&_e=kEAuXoqqGCgVyZrCra43bj6YHoTWpjU5guV63fmBrupvJuHwIB8Ggyl4NECszXD8w07OlYTHGStElRNf1wWTqP_VgEy1UX2i53hcfyd4_p1NIeY_Byszu8OrC7QSeNJDmCEIh2xoJhyOdYHyGOuc2fjcWePjDRHsUe2usxHzo1ue8PxGsjVskJ6VIK4Cv4Y2Y9ySOE1AjOGkwrn9OWEfwtvezb-BvkK-Q5g3XgEzfFFpCg3SdISeZZE8wnsyDz-Mc55kSTs81PjAg9j1aMWgrqLA_Xva4Syxe5P3J97R8ugxANPyySLIfpSEBSrXFYBdjJn9pbLXTD1k852BKwKuqcWfvTHDyldltVfEIANcvc7JHEzlvP8DyXXxBYubIqhDmLXaln_ssPYQRW6Lv_1CD9um6F-y6u9_acgqexBw8zc%3D) Hey Peter – **THANKS A MILLION!** I know this month has been tough amidst vacations, events, and wanting a break from the end of the previous quarter. However, we still managed to beat the summer slump and surpass our goal for the month!I can’t express to you how much this means to me. We’re pushing through and building the foundations of this campaign early on to ensure we catch up to John James and stand up for Southeast Michigan.I’m so lucky to have you by my side.Thank you for an incredible July. I look forward to keeping this momentum going way into fall!– Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28QQEwqSEgQAApAKCiB85vwXsPz5dW33FG7emqzXOqVp0DoGoR_59ceqdnFWyCxOVloVyAsJKOA7LrOos7U4Ohk_dKg0HHdlL7XY3H9SPKqzeB7i6_SD79io52e8Y5pQwXJn926SanxghWJowNp971HQ%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28wUpaiIWSsWhQnlgNi-_P0dWNlrmMFYMqb-SKOwm99M7Xh46jtcSStwlZz_i1TjLiejO8tycf8XRNzitRA82so1VfufyVjzn1NYzg1QWIZjfSDljoLWGTA96HtOZZuW1EKTzjWg7uFzXWwJItI4OWSg%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28at2H_lQXnL4A7uf6nO0zUTbiZIE14uZ2kqpOY4Avq-QrN7DTX0jCJnWzuMmgQ1ylFSrwG-FvWjlcmu1-KJcvypu0ERO7H7cEgZi8puio-DbH7Zw3u-VcDqSIsVBJwkW6Z6zITInv4Q83OqDoCqCYrg%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28fybONlu6xDzVjyYOSy7GTSl9WB8OGW76YBbURo4qoHmMBbmGYcpmoB9sVjH0uSTb59m5a1m4nmnivkSdsz3VvUUyiwGFNMeearrdROCU439rxE5fLGtyrU0wEUBnj4ce4JCT1Mw04NiSSe75nlsHNg%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28U3ipypfs9qMzePaLZvzohSdYE85o5iDU80ugg70eJMIbjuXH5rlJUJMRZKVfHUOVAXS1ySoK7_37g0nVwF3Yw8zAcaNfT25LzNL7-VRPwjU7tIq3An2pDO0gNUyIK1AmQdFnAltQoRSxuXTbluRkWw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW281YAuYPgXVHlIl02m4w-BwOvqlET4KqMsOhfloONZ-dt65oRAjKIfLy4611T22lm_CEwnJ4ZUM_rjdmFsUQbNadJyZba4_HyaU0CNOFvQROYNiP0Wztst3hxbwxbvfai4gYSmdTTv0gavdkkJ5qDOUg%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a43415c7b9db425b81ffd906d7ab1eac&_e=nQp9z6kQG6QfE2nI6c1_30w6JVqNHjoQ1WsRUmA2eUQmun8u07s_hPK6Y2Gn1UXKz9cern1Y66uXWGDpvwEFG_YdEoy_Glk27OVvnGT9V799doaoU5OLTMhduSiTWoMj8xi5TV9sM0S5_njmhWXHGtTtP0XI7eT0ERtu_6LuKzdwc5eRw5LhDrRGPjjho-C6mZA4aQznb57KjfMVpgSC6144CzuY8dEccf4BjL_O8qJHIWvoe_G-1lwWe1lShW28fDH6KTiAbYg2WxJnJ4LZ0J-ZHZbsysEbbYWIL82PYBAH2y3x2iRFfTkYv876bK2d6Buv5QAnhfHz5R7c0UlqF3pAkm09CMfZ-hoQfnVsjv48xePs5azLznm8Bf3WaP47uEA5TtzvVtsc3N5g04aT6w%3D%3D)

---

name: John Fetterman
subject: August
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Thank you to everybody who stepped up.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU for being part of this team. Thanks to everybody who was able to support us, we finished July strong. 💪
It's August recess, so I'm spending some quality time back in PA with family, friends, and neighbors before we head back to the Senate in a few weeks.
I've always promised that we'll keep up the fight for our LGBTQIA+ neighbors, the Union Way of Life, and a living wage -- **and I know that with you on our side, we'll win.**
Thanks for being a *huge* part of this team.
Together,
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
PS: If you want to help us keep the momentum going, **[donate any amount at this link.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230801-1?refcode=em20230801-1-8488&refcode2=8488_434096_u6tyoH&akid=8488%2E434096%2Eu6tyoH)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230801-8488-footer&t=1&refcode2=8488_434096_u6tyoH&akid=8488%2E434096%2Eu6tyoH)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you today. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e06240d8301d4020b2a6c7c37298b6df&_e=FleMuwMngrv0Wugxh6C3BAw6ORnCcFoCfSpWEuCFdNvbrILFJcvcVhejQ3TW1e2CYT00yuBkGbt0HaL-4Mg3aIYxc_eQeFtyRfax-8DLsVFT6HRNTDIeNuKTmJ5O2BdfalG7odeDPT9szgDnsmnnAOZPFOb23lqORTdpeTAepP_YEGD6WrJjPfGdth8Pe1wnCUyE7IvDRydt74rzSmLFLFEdcxDtrgYwGzlGq8rs84-8lxhEMsS2eCxYMSn_9whlbzOgxdgvNr-weY1hGADvQeqxpt9knFMAVAzhr5qe8oimlKBOR_MsK8bGPxiSVmI8VMofNIt8YIVrLkyOlnGl4PphTGF9V9I03eKkNMV_plXWRju6TW4ZNyWh3F57b8ngpjGcBVexSsVWbN6YwoZ7jp5Bnh7jh3LPvGup71PCO2I%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e06240d8301d4020b2a6c7c37298b6df&_e=FleMuwMngrv0Wugxh6C3BAw6ORnCcFoCfSpWEuCFdNvbrILFJcvcVhejQ3TW1e2CYT00yuBkGbt0HaL-4Mg3aIYxc_eQeFtyRfax-8DLsVFT6HRNTDIeNuKTmJ5O2BdfalG7odeDPT9szgDnsmnnAOZPFOb23lqORTdpeTAepP_YEGD6WrJjPfGdth8Pe1wnCUyE7IvDRydt74rzSmLFLFEdcxDtrgYwGzlGq8rs84-8lxhEMsS2eCxYMSn_9whlbzOgxdgvNr-weY1hGADvQbKtUdNBOCNgJttC74rGtCvcZ8oe44LmH13YOvhFWXTdXEvVnbUoqGPzRpI-CXR4PKq0HFBWR9nocOBLZYFdKiJT7u9rI6UbAv3vKk6aA9RrwmQ7UhAhE_spGZzQM8KALmmum0GnhFUF4Aw7Z48jadc%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e06240d8301d4020b2a6c7c37298b6df&_e=FleMuwMngrv0Wugxh6C3BAw6ORnCcFoCfSpWEuCFdNvbrILFJcvcVhejQ3TW1e2CYT00yuBkGbt0HaL-4Mg3aIYxc_eQeFtyRfax-8DLsVFT6HRNTDIeNuKTmJ5O2BdfalG7odeDPT9szgDnsmnnAOZPFOb23lqORTdpeTAepP_YEGD6WrJjPfGdth8Pe1wnCUyE7IvDRydt74rzSmLFLFEdcxDtrgYwGzlGq8rs84-8lxhEMsS2eCxYMSn_9whlbzOgxdgvNr-weY1hGADvQS0XoksPfitxSTdxzPq4tz89UIweb5CXwKMn2FLrnasxLXOm8BHXEuEuu1d_x9EwGpDyN8jpO6Dhhtb-vUmrpeoeOGiegMyGhq1wBHbI1TJU6ywgoIyumncbv3qKeTTKzPmSLbIGpmXnl70N4VhT6-M%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e06240d8301d4020b2a6c7c37298b6df&_e=FleMuwMngrv0Wugxh6C3BAw6ORnCcFoCfSpWEuCFdNvbrILFJcvcVhejQ3TW1e2CYT00yuBkGbt0HaL-4Mg3aIYxc_eQeFtyRfax-8DLsVFT6HRNTDIeNuKTmJ5O2BdfalG7odeDPT9szgDnsmnnAOZPFOb23lqORTdpeTAepP_YEGD6WrJjPfGdth8Pe1wnCUyE7IvDRydt74rzSmLFLFEdcxDtrgYwGzlGq8rs84-8lxhEMsS2eCxYMSn_9whlbzOgxdgvNr-weY1hGADvQY9hwbvdJ63yKMCDGg_-6d7lVMOq3RGY-wbr0GVSPIp_BNc7WD4GFUn3KpO4BUfEjRzKEbCxQFhEvStK1AzYN8KV6LnDiQJr1GKtamrQEv0IdmOXTH3Shg5txXU1rFEg1lMPV4nICCpIs-lqm0qDZ7s%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr. Alert
subject: “It makes me a lot more confident”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

In June, the Supreme Court issued two decisions with major consequences for our democracy.

**First, in _Allen v. Milligan_ ,** the Court struck down Alabama’s congressional map for violating the Voting Rights Act by illegally diluting the power of Black voters. Now, Alabama has the chance to put in place new, fair maps with an additional majority-Black district before the next election – and other states like Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas could be required to draw new maps as well.

**Then, in _Moore v. Harper_ ,** the Court rejected a dangerous, right-wing legal theory that could have given state legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, suppress voting rights, and even overturn legitimate election results. **In response, Attorney General Eric Holder said:

_“It makes me a lot more confident that we’re going to have a fair election come 2024.”_**

[**_Team, the NDRC is fighting across the country to help ensure fairness in our elections, and our work wouldn’t be possible without supporters like you. clean_body: | Team, In June, the Supreme Court issued two decisions with major consequences for our democracy. First, in Allen v. Milligan , the Court struck down Alabama’s congressional map for violating the Voting Rights Act by illegally diluting the power of Black voters. Now, Alabama has the chance to put in place new, fair maps with an additional majority-Black district before the next election – and other states like Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas could be required to draw new maps as well. Then, in Moore v. Harper , the Court rejected a dangerous, right-wing legal theory that could have given state legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, suppress voting rights, and even overturn legitimate election results. In response, Attorney General Eric Holder said: “It makes me a lot more confident that we’re going to have a fair election come 2024.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. clean_body: We’ve proven in these last few months that our campaign has what it takes for the long haul, and it’s because of supporters like you. | | | Peter, We’ve proven in these last few months that our campaign is ready for the long haul, and it’s because of grassroots supporters like you. From everyone on our entire team, we sincerely thank you for your support. Our country is at a turning point. With so much on the line right now, we can’t afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks, Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024

The EMILYs List team is kicking off the month with two key primaries, a round of new endorsements, and a celebration for Vice President Harris. We hope you'll take a moment to read about what we have in store, but first: **[The EMILYs List team is preparing for another busy month of supporting Democratic pro-choice women across the country. If you're ready to join the fight, can you contribute any amount now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67426669/419690469/-1667455293?sourceid=1051610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzE4MWRjOS1hODMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tvm8n-RWSa_HncUequn8U8KnnWY0ECTstxt_rMfPUJE=&emci=a5e387de-9630-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=c3181dc9-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** 🗳️ **PRIMARIES:** Today, Arizona voters will cast their ballots in the primary election for mayor of Tucson. EMILYs List is proud to support Mayor Regina Romero — the first woman and Latina to serve as mayor of Tucson.

👀 **ENDORSEMENT ALERT** : Also today, the EMILYs List team is excited to announce our _endorsement of Michelle Vallejo for TX-15_. Michelle comes from a big family of farm workers, immigrants, and entrepreneurs. She believes that with integrity, hard work, and dedication, everyone deserves the opportunity to accomplish their American Dream._Keep an eye on your inboxes for more Congressional endorsements coming your way soon!_

🇺🇸 **WE DID IT, JOE** : Aug. 11 is the anniversary of the day Joe Biden named Kamala Harris to his presidential ticket. EMILYs List is looking forward to celebrating this monumental day – and we hope you'll join us in sending well wishes to Vice President Harris. Make sure you're following us on [**Instagram**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67426670/419690470/-447802997?sourceid=1051610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzE4MWRjOS1hODMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tvm8n-RWSa_HncUequn8U8KnnWY0ECTstxt_rMfPUJE=&emci=a5e387de-9630-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=c3181dc9-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) and [**Twitter**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67426671/419690471/816177461?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor&sourceid=1051610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzE4MWRjOS1hODMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tvm8n-RWSa_HncUequn8U8KnnWY0ECTstxt_rMfPUJE=&emci=a5e387de-9630-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=c3181dc9-a830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) to follow along. The last midterm elections proved that the only way to prevent and reverse abortion bans is to keep anti-choice Republicans out of power at _all_ levels of government. clean_body: 📎 August memo for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Peter, August is here! The EMILYs List team is kicking off the month with two key primaries, a round of new endorsements, and a celebration for Vice President Harris. We hope you'll take a moment to read about what we have in store, but first: 🗳️ PRIMARIES: Today, Arizona voters will cast their ballots in the primary election for mayor of Tucson. EMILYs List is proud to support Mayor Regina Romero — the first woman and Latina to serve as mayor of Tucson. 👀 ENDORSEMENT ALERT : Also today, the EMILYs List team is excited to announce our endorsement of Michelle Vallejo for TX-15. Michelle comes from a big family of farm workers, immigrants, and entrepreneurs. She believes that with integrity, hard work, and dedication, everyone deserves the opportunity to accomplish their American Dream.Keep an eye on your inboxes for more Congressional endorsements coming your way soon! 🇺🇸 WE DID IT, JOE : Aug. 11 is the anniversary of the day Joe Biden named Kamala Harris to his presidential ticket. EMILYs List is looking forward to celebrating this monumental day – and we hope you'll join us in sending well wishes to Vice President Harris. Make sure you're following us on and to follow along. The last midterm elections proved that the only way to prevent and reverse abortion bans is to keep anti-choice Republicans out of power at all levels of government. We now know that when choice is on the ballot, choice wins. **We're thrilled to have you on the team, Peter and we can't wait to tell you more about what's in store this month. Donate now to help EMILYs List continue endorsing, electing, and uplifting Democratic pro-choice women everywhere: Thanks for reading, the EMILYs List team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da64b4b9f9ff48f68a66daff6233b2f6&_e=SJDx4VuvG5PlwT0Vvi4GFeKvTLUEBEdsI80QfiR7eNYubBbGQMwM84gkrvN-8O16HAyoR0nqwKr2qmqC8AqOuZ7DoqJ2UFV86sipuQQ5s5xfolsyu-QfHno9VgnFTazHNf26z-7ASzsCl0LsQRu509pHJ81NCJvuZpseXsNgZdAQxlFjVNx4pBQQe5OjDW0dtfKk4bOoI6koMKZPm_S59v-GeN1BzpOE8PtAKjgOmtxqPSBRhmHqBu2z_vwpTPUuabnIWNmn7U71_SFNZp_aw-yOYDzG3Lm-PfdM21dc2Ob5UJEdpCSpJ7J4Vl05MEmxfIzoZP5BRg3AFoYfS3jm8sVvIgjN233vMOTyZzwlgjsO9XmzvOfEocBBusd4jK9uW0JtKXIHM4gDCEazBTy3EA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

name: Full Mag News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e54e7a9addd41bfb0b27fe925c2c003&_e=AjFg6L2UZPeKTHD-B-RrmIh7-n3vrmQGDiZoxw7cwHemMuyrIegkv1abud06qh3VQE0aGw7sBYKJ0aXiZ_44M5uZ90D2GHCqWQvWzeje3wTgtcZKmTF90bZ-mbZurNuLPrcJo-XMMjIO2RSeMbszMq6JP2L-sIYwukO07oJw8Ys3Som8WQ0bKa8Ojpl2DfBivvqnQR4NR5Rp_STwGIxGE4DwzMBn9Q88bfNgS83MYdZQR_wcd3X0aCfahkyK4O3jAT4g5eLs-QN4pW7p8S-oMvyXmAhpvpL6Eq5-r_VwEL7oxX6j_pR8NIILuC9ILv4ghogEVVri3lzkSA84m5NOtqRfBouU9_HiV9bCXQNcPu1YiF6kbPQyVuyBjvLD8x8UbOrHoTxKrLLBy4kwdYZtMDHaPBjXuCPFr5QzLFIjBzo%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e54e7a9addd41bfb0b27fe925c2c003&_e=AjFg6L2UZPeKTHD-B-RrmIh7-n3vrmQGDiZoxw7cwHemMuyrIegkv1abud06qh3VQE0aGw7sBYKJ0aXiZ_44M5uZ90D2GHCqWQvWzeje3wTgtcZKmTF90bZ-mbZurNuLPrcJo-XMMjIO2RSeMbszMq6JP2L-sIYwukO07oJw8Ys3Som8WQ0bKa8Ojpl2DfBivvqnQR4NR5Rp_STwGIxGE4DwzMBn9Q88bfNgS83MYdZQR_wcd3X0aCfahkyK4O3jAT4g5eLs-QN4pW7p8S-oMm_2BzKCTvCreH7P1Lb4m-JBj1wHqnHbM5xIvFbDxF0OEFbqVRGXW53EW_It_3ukVONAmS4bXJXZr_mK1PsDROmVnU3uoMZuHoEylBw1X_aCv65GbDNvKSQT0nsp_lKNYu0Op4EU4GgCppnKCcw_jTE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e54e7a9addd41bfb0b27fe925c2c003&_e=AjFg6L2UZPeKTHD-B-RrmIh7-n3vrmQGDiZoxw7cwHemMuyrIegkv1abud06qh3VQE0aGw7sBYKJ0aXiZ_44M5uZ90D2GHCqWQvWzeje3wTgtcZKmTF90bZ-mbZurNuLPrcJo-XMMjIO2RSeMbszMq6JP2L-sIYwukO07oJw8Ys3Som8WQ0bKa8Ojpl2DfBivvqnQR4NR5Rp_STwGIxGE4DwzMBn9Q88bfNgS83MYdZQR_wcd3X0aCfahkyK4O3jAT4g5eLs-QN4pW7p8S-oMjFQmy00hr8FOte2nwui0k0u5-ild6_q47CLQ26trhC2myifpwi_fFAZ_v7hamYbTSfhr2MZH2BRjjo0SP2Xj7M9AgAatDRmml6bGzAdKILONVfz9qPLdPfPBe-Epq5uyV2LNdihtq1C3xN1JRtB2F0%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e54e7a9addd41bfb0b27fe925c2c003&_e=AjFg6L2UZPeKTHD-B-RrmIh7-n3vrmQGDiZoxw7cwHemMuyrIegkv1abud06qh3VQE0aGw7sBYKJ0aXiZ_44M5uZ90D2GHCqWQvWzeje3wTgtcZKmTF90bZ-mbZurNuLPrcJo-XMMjIO2RSeMbszMq6JP2L-sIYwukO07oJw8Ys3Som8WQ0bKa8Ojpl2DfBivvqnQR4NR5Rp_STwGIxGE4DwzMBn9Q88bfNgS83MYdZQR_wcd3X0aCfahkyK4O3jAT4g5eLs-QN4pW7p8S-oMh_8xOuXdS83n_G8l8-Hamx90OpFIXz8m669YMycdIdrRR1Su8On1BFy8ZJIkZy8sqE3hWMawCSUXlKO1n_26j61Fngs6SvY9163h2UDTLK4Lask1ckxx8UYvlBrqwoRXEpYDCQZQr6MrAlMXvtxkHU%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e54e7a9addd41bfb0b27fe925c2c003&_e=AjFg6L2UZPeKTHD-B-RrmIh7-n3vrmQGDiZoxw7cwHemMuyrIegkv1abud06qh3VQE0aGw7sBYKJ0aXiZ_44M5uZ90D2GHCqWQvWzeje3wTgtcZKmTF90bZ-mbZurNuLPrcJo-XMMjIO2RSeMbszMq6JP2L-sIYwukO07oJw8Ys3Som8WQ0bKa8Ojpl2DfBivvqnQR4NR5Rp_STwGIxGE4DwzMBn9Q88bfNgS83MYdZQR_wcd3X0aCfahkyK4O3jAT4g5eLs-QN4pW7p8S-oMt4wcK_llqF3-3HZXo44LuG2cqyLmDWusTHkJ4DnmL5YqbOE3GEg2QHjb_cgO91dOBGHCJ1d6OY0edN7SAductyfglr9tpNFHR2_w6OQ0bolXiCoLbYS9c57OSSFzcx8LChbGbXU-dp45q7znIXouR0%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: World Lung Cancer Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Peter-
Today is World Lung Cancer Day, and I want to tell you a story that I hold close to my heart – I lost my father to lung cancer in high school. He raised us on a farm and taught us valuable life lessons that have made me the person I am today.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
My father's fight against lung cancer was a challenging time for my tight-knit family. As an impressionable young kid, I saw firsthand just how important accessible and affordable health care is. Early on, I realized that no American family should face a crisis like this without access to health care or struggle to afford life-saving treatment.
That’s one of the many reasons I’m in Congress today, fighting for North Carolina families.
Today, as we raise awareness on World Lung Cancer Day, I reaffirm my commitment to comprehensive health care reform. Elected officials like me must work tirelessly to ensure that every individual has access to quality health care regardless of their background or income. This includes early detection, preventive measures, and equitable access to essential treatments for all those affected by lung cancer and other illnesses.
To keep up this important fight, we must work together and elect leaders who know every American should have access to the health care they need. Can you chip in $1 today to help me fight for affordable, accessible health care? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230801-email&amount=1]
I miss my dad so much. But today, we can honor the memory of my father and countless others who have faced the pain of losing a loved one to cancer and ensure that no family has to endure this hardship without the support they need.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230801-email&recurring=true]

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Marijuana was just legalized in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a significant step in the right direction, but our work is far from complete.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=402%2E791427%2Eyc-7VI)

Friends -
For too long, the criminal justice system has been built to criminalize people of color and Indigenous people, disproportionately sending them to prison for minor offenses, like marijuana possession, and entrapping them in a vicious cycle of incarceration.
**But today, in Minnesota, we are changing that system by legalizing the use of marijuana. This is a significant step in the right direction, but our work is far from complete. Let me explain:**
While today is a major victory for Minnesotans, there still remains a lot of work to be done at the federal level. I’ve said this before and I will say it again, we need to legalize marijuana nationwide and expunge records for cannabis-related offenses.
That’s why I’m a proud sponsor of the _Marijuana Opportunity Reinvestment and Expungement Act_ or the MORE Act. This bill would not only decriminalize marijuana at the national level but it would also remove marijuana from the list of scheduled substances under the Controlled Substances Act and eliminate criminal penalties for an individual who manufactures, distributes, or possesses marijuana.
Over 70% of people 18-44 years old support legalizing marijuana nationally. And as more and more states like Minnesota take their own steps to legalize marijuana, I hope that the federal government takes action as well.
Because the only way we can begin to repair the harm caused in communities across the country is to end the War on Drugs and invest intentionally in education, housing, healthcare, and employment.
Today should be a day to celebrate the progress we’ve made in Minnesota. So please, enjoy today _responsibly_ , and let’s continue the work to bring justice to so many Americans impacted by the War on Drugs.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

* * *

Before you go...
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or any amount that makes sense to you — to stand with Ilhan Omar and send her back to Congress? Your grassroots support is so important to this campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230801-1-t2&t=2&akid=402%2E791427%2Eyc-7VI)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-aug23.i_mkOm&amount=3&refcode=em230801-1-t2&t=3&akid=402%2E791427%2Eyc-7VI)**

Peter, _Is shoplifting a victimless crime?_ Radical prosecutors would like us to believe that. It’s why left-wing prosecutors have all but stopped prosecuting crimes like shoplifting. **But you and I know that’s not the case, so I went on Fox to set the record straight.**

**You see folks argue that poverty creates crime._[But there’s an enormous amount of data that shows crime creates poverty.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=773010eb5dca4f20a21244af8acdb619&_e=whwnsPIK_NdzeHM1gW6Ii4gb3cGrDxrzxrYAphWPy5GBaCTj0FRCRWTt5covYX2jATFm0UWGfY-6v19faCKHSR5hjYyBMrr2LKoXXZq5Lqcrwmu13w8iVljC-mbRsjdLOOWEOj6p79Gx43RQHGefFZxdF9-32k-Z6OzWp5sdE3RWFxTIyd-62SnrURGOJWkV_EtvN-9w9CnBztPDkx4vxYggKZljNZvUKFZiBbOFBPMzAGzoa-buSbt6XaswIL7ZQXy3xxwrxZK3MJvO8XlvkJiNIs5lywmAmBLgZL_8oyU3Zgj3qeXzfgGTTampAY44pyc7jlW84ays2e8onS0azmbiaCNKLekM0rA4HCFFjISDqr1Fb5dZMdOdu5lVIBDI)_** The refusal to prosecute crimes like shoplifting leads to lawlessness, the flight of small businesses, and decline of the entire neighborhood. Small businesses create two-thirds of jobs — but they can’t operate in areas that don’t take crime seriously. **Peter, I won’t stand by while other prosecutors simply make crime legal.** And I believe you won’t stand by either. That’s why I’m writing to you today: **Will you join my team and help me fight back against the lawless prosecutors who are fanning the flames of the crime surge?**

Peter, Hunter Biden’s former business partner, Devon Archer, was set to testify in front of the House Oversight Committee about President Joe Biden’s involvement in Hunter’s business dealings. _The night before his testimony, the DOJ attempted to arrest Archer.**[THIS IS WRONG>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eecf3dc382314f84817a97bacbf0def3&_e=g4CmQmc3Kaq8F0TcKjigKpG5BvAc4ZONa7pBYvdXO-xupax5hbuwJpx_XdVWl5H9zdmTFR-yxpc8d-JavMO6dKQBxGdn6-ddi5fcFa_49_W1GAMz5O8XMOnY9OmVbUK64nLAeuZ9Tx-GDoXooR7eDNLM9Y6i-bgvsWQyCUhrqxA6n00XCQ4CswecS-o5_enXaNVfRhOv6iNwMniU11ChYoZ4-e0by1FNOdMNeb7ZN600Wa8Em2TU35H3RjttJAQagcXmEIvq5Recs1Hmy76ZQpf7GvdyS0aPdLQwHMFlogilgjwYVYVE-ccpjseQxtrAOXuiZOiZV4v6DI8zmQyLAEmdkUumeDxBAmdl4TobTbk%3D)**_ Democrats are moving from indicting their opponents to throwing witnesses in jail on the eve of Congressional testimony –** ****and this is getting into banana republic territory.**

| | [**DEMAND EQUAL JUSTICE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eecf3dc382314f84817a97bacbf0def3&_e=g4CmQmc3Kaq8F0TcKjigKpG5BvAc4ZONa7pBYvdXO-xupax5hbuwJpx_XdVWl5H9zdmTFR-yxpc8d-JavMO6dKQBxGdn6-ddi5fcFa_49_W1GAMz5O8XMOnY9OmVbUK64nLAeuZ9Tx-GDoXooR7eDNLM9Y6i-bgvsWQyCUhrqxA6n00XCQ4CswecS-o5_enXaNVfRhOv6iNwMniU11ChYmOGvjUiKh7I8nWHMWGSUSnywA7B9hLPmxZpgKwIR4Xm5u0f7RwQGApAonC4ZGunWuyMG96oa9nwykJGp8QHTv24mYs-pLE33eTczK5PeeRKqbSEYUzLOM4McvQ_wv52gswdBGLMNDcJ7AbJtIcyhm4%3D)

We have repeatedly seen a two-tier justice system: one for the Left and one for the Right. _That’s not how our Constitution was constructed._ _That’s not how our justice system was designed._ _That’s not what our Founding Fathers envisioned._ _**[Peter, will you stand with me and fight back against this blatant abuse of power?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eecf3dc382314f84817a97bacbf0def3&_e=g4CmQmc3Kaq8F0TcKjigKpG5BvAc4ZONa7pBYvdXO-xupax5hbuwJpx_XdVWl5H9zdmTFR-yxpc8d-JavMO6dKQBxGdn6-ddi5fcFa_49_W1GAMz5O8XMOnY9OmVbUK64nLAeuZ9Tx-GDoXooR7eDNLM9Y6i-bgvsWQyCUhrqxA6n00XCQ4CswecS-o5_enXaNVfRhOv6iNwMniU11ChYuuWAg6pb28Vx5znE2kBAeVJABL9x6GcuHoF0B37ZXC4Ncla1CiYriBAPAuiudZKVKVnAlcP6rSVfiD1XgdUyE0XFmc12iPDYrG2Eev7RaXf7uERKKvZHrUn5nb8Uzdj7lXCtCL9D36-y59D0TS8-4s%3D)**_

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec9597b771424d80857e73e557beae3b&_e=Cy7LnraRDaALYWPQHhP3-pDAMoI758ujrTfNoxHh-2W4PtX-mvu9bZSrOvzrwWbp0Apr0Cdw0aInMAv1wi9QIJuUVZGhN5Sr09sgqL-ELMWu5GAI2iNs0ylqdMfgXCTmwYmzaboKQs3wx_d0ez3RCQpamdnC0jJdRwhw6vOAMNL3j6i8E9jVngMoYZdLZLqlQ2UTiZLbq0GOoik-mZSFYHy61CDn8Ef8DoH3u4Nj1-pR1KKLPqUxVRAANHDnoI0UOPcB_dVAEqZMUdObQe-OCCdFaJqep_pv9lUzOartunwudJEEfeZJCmtiq81ME4Nb4uqXSMBpwE4Q7-5J49iNtafdECQ4lwqT4pBosYVBqotuCFBFklKMio-d7ljIdBqLQDglRoebXocINUtWfYBclZ71d5MElB7Qbeyf_oeDKWUG06MnzfF0ythgWsU6xtJoZ6mMKMkgXCUK2gj8NTc6XSbmMd3znphTsNZLKctxdRk%3D "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec9597b771424d80857e73e557beae3b&_e=Cy7LnraRDaALYWPQHhP3-pDAMoI758ujrTfNoxHh-2W4PtX-mvu9bZSrOvzrwWbp0Apr0Cdw0aInMAv1wi9QIJuUVZGhN5Sr09sgqL-ELMWu5GAI2iNs0ylqdMfgXCTmwYmzaboKQs3wx_d0ez3RCQpamdnC0jJdRwhw6vOAMNL3j6i8E9jVngMoYZdLZLqlQ2UTiZLbq0GOoik-mZSFYHy61CDn8Ef8DoH3u4Nj1-pR1KKLPqUxVRAANHDnoI0UOPcB_dVAEqZMUdObQe-OCCdFaJqep_pv9lUzOartunwudJEEfeZJCmtiq81ME4Nb4uqXSMBpwE4Q7-5J49iNtUy35467eRZaS5QkhTqm_qC4hR1Wc11WtAvyvEed5Zt69vIo1oxawCBtWM14VsiAKHN32LiwgO3UyX6fQphT-f2LjVx-Ga5UlhoernZSBCzrER5BT2Xaj40m8aFspz4Bow8vjXc8U9kVMXHH6voFMWo%3D "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**

clean_body: Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. | | | | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth. On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out. Here's the truth... The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today. I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it. If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut. | | "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!" "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream." Democrats are hoping I give up on you. They're hoping you give up on me. They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether. We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values. A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Katie’s new bill to lower child care and elder care costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie’s new bill would nearly triple the amount of money families can set aside pre-tax for child care or elder care expenses.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27470%2E3422442%2E0JAUaX)
Katie just reintroduced bipartisan legislation to lower child and elder care costs for families.
Right now, families can annually set aside $5,000 pre-tax for child care and elder care expenses. _That’s the same amount families could set aside in 1986, when this law was written._
We don’t need a whiteboard to explain why that doesn't make sense. Child care costs have increased 220% since 1990, far outpacing inflation. For many families, child care is now their biggest expense—here in Orange County, the median cost of a year of infant care is $19,000.
**[Katie’s new bill would nearly triple the amount of money families can set aside pre-tax for child care or elder care expenses. Can you sign on to our petition to show your support?** **[Sign the Petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kpem-childcare-eldercare-newbill-/?source=EMAK01_1_COS_20230801_V1_F&t=3&akid=27470%2E3422442%2E0JAUaX)** The high cost of care isn’t just bad for families who find themselves having to choose between saving for a house or paying for child care, it’s detrimental to our whole entire economy. Katie will keep fighting to lower costs for families—as a single mom of three she knows this can’t wait. Thanks for your support, Team Porter **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230801-1?source=EMAK01_1_COS_20230801_V1_F&refcode2=27470_3422442_0JAUaX&akid=27470%2E3422442%2E0JAUaX)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK01_1_COS_20230801_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=27470_3422442_0JAUaX&akid=27470%2E3422442%2E0JAUaX)**

Contributions from grassroots supporters like you truly make all the difference in competitive districts like mine. I know election day may seem far away, but it is early investments that allow me to continue my fight against far-right extremism and for our Jersey Values.

Together, we can keep up our momentum and hold this seat in 2024. Thank you so much for your dedication to our mission.

We couldn’t do this without you,

Josh

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Digital thank you card for: you 📫
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2023-fr-august?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2023-fr-august?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Time and time again, we ask a lot of you. So I say thank you, friend. It’s grassroots supporters like you who motivate my fight everyday to end the MAGA circus once and for all.

I’ll be honest: It’s hard work fighting MAGA clowns in Congress. But with everyday Americans being held hostage by Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA-influenced clown caucus, we must charge on.

Look, we will have a stark decision in 2024 — an America about chaos or an America about community. There is no doubt there is a lot on the line for the future of our country. That’s why I'm fighting to help elect Democrats, send the MAGA circus packing, and take back the House in 2024.

Thank you friend, for helping make this fight possible. Together, we will choose an America about community in 2024. If you’re with me, please consider donating today, so we can continue to fight MAGA clowns tomorrow and beyond. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Aug2023-FR-august?&refcode=E3587-20230801-eomthanks-SL-Other&amount=5]

— Eric

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=975614d19f8342f285b2dfdfc5f5e90f&_e=oZYZXW0joSb5MCVDGTaIVeYKHeBPQr-7g4eMRbQEQ3-IjnyYZ7PmTS-GYxYCxrvPLTV_lxEEtlbY3AopGytl4_0Wu_IwJNDZSgTViPHIpS6A6zcenraK8C4tLHVeDLSgr8ll2LuzMzCjHcOrH5Jv-965RXTfE8-uGmqO3cAk9SbaYOyCuCo_XFsydyzsDa25kJShD_FKVShKQv6ym0KxcNI0FhBgvY3O7oJVMlHtsjuTxZRteURuPUkDiz27OdcYy-dLmt7mjBY8DVceCKj5F5XyifI7DGdBUa3JP3u3ZtoCllTkUGa0y2EfaFs2BjI0)

**[AGAIN, Peter?

First, they impeached him and found nothing wrong.

Then, they impeached him and found nothing AGAIN.

Later, they indicted him, again, and again.

NOW, they're indicting him FOR THE THIRD TIME, with talks of a FOURTH AROUND THE CORNER!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=975614d19f8342f285b2dfdfc5f5e90f&_e=oZYZXW0joSb5MCVDGTaIVeYKHeBPQr-7g4eMRbQEQ3-IjnyYZ7PmTS-GYxYCxrvPLTV_lxEEtlbY3AopGytl4_0Wu_IwJNDZSgTViPHIpS6A6zcenraK8C4tLHVeDLSgr8ll2LuzMzCjHcOrH5Jv-8is7AxP6vLZPWB4k4mhfjzMCIJS9wcO0qcqk_yq7iGi00RHWxzwIpzVf6m18-1JVHdqVV2c7IwGmVNY-_c9BKgZauuV9b6R3h8bu97Ey9zPwxHrHLDTFhpLA821qYAPzl6ukDTS_RjSzZobZmHSekQ32dEhV7scaL79kEOiMeGE)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Do You Believe This?
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-avkikd-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-j/) **Code Word: Weather** **_D_[evon Archer testified](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-t/)** that Joe and Hunter spoke more than 20 times about their business deals. A Democrat lawmaker that attended the meeting says Joe only talked about the weather. _Weather is code for BRIBES!_ **Space Force to Remain in Colorado ** **[Biden has decided to keep U.S. Space Command headquarters in Colorado](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-i/), **overturning a last-ditch decision by the Trump administration to move it to Alabama. **Life Without Parole** **[Lori Vallow was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-d/) **on five separate counts for murdering two of her children and conspiring to murder her husband's first wife in 2019. **American Heros** **[Over 50 members of a U.S. Army military police company who fought in Vietnam](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-h/) **received Bronze Stars after an Army review of the records of their actions.

**BANK YOUR VOTE** The RNC announced **[Wisconsin will be the launching pad for our nationwide"Bank Your Vote" campaign](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-k/)**, the RNC's initiative to educate, encourage and activate our voters to take advantage of voting early. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* The **[good ole](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-o/)** days!
* What did we do **[without it](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-x/)**?
* About those **[aliens](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* It's **[empty.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-avkikd-trhiujldw-c/)**

Peter,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you today. On Friday, my campaign **[launched our first major statewide advertising campaign of the 2024 election.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=070368b50c4a4147b88a5a1fc78684e5&_e=8IraUYONXSDZ-1__JbDqJ0CS6YXJu-lG8POf5tzCBBE27G6zwe0oqRTbWZKHWpGbx34LhjawFNRLlcU1SwpSAOiSjJs7vYAwS1OmGy9ezObNNtqQBlcR0XSdHVWisFMGJTe5AYna9TzfqqlT397YO3b-ttKknSb9ptYTa--FDGoWtz8e3qaKfFn1H6ryPxQiVLx0wWzadvGSZP3Nc0pLFmwiL0iKX58dCBGsNv5tSb_gZhPAa1G6dAa-QSn0rLUyC5GLTmHSzE6iCKysdBpL_MPiMEkc-nskbqf47uoJJ2Co2RHaygdd8pTfgoJWHYUcyQMrpR7n4NnJmxJQk-2SFKeIYD6KaNSVxye3LcV-POYRNbR38TbxBLda5xtWUeOzNVD6LCBKm1L9kGJAUYuZbxyFOiVD92QWX11qfnEASEc%3D)** More folks in Montana know about our campaign now than they did before I entered the race on June 27th, but there are still quite a few voters out there who don’t know enough about me to form an opinion.

That’s why for the next couple weeks our **[“God& Country”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=070368b50c4a4147b88a5a1fc78684e5&_e=8IraUYONXSDZ-1__JbDqJ0CS6YXJu-lG8POf5tzCBBE27G6zwe0oqRTbWZKHWpGbx34LhjawFNRLlcU1SwpSAOiSjJs7vYAwS1OmGy9ezObNNtqQBlcR0XSdHVWisFMGJTe5AYna9TzfqqlT397YO3b-ttKknSb9ptYTa--FDGoWtz8e3qaKfFn1H6ryPxQiVLx0wWzadvGSZP3Nc0pLFmwiL0iKX58dCBGsNv5tSb_gZhPAa1G6dAa-QSn0rLUyC5GLTmHSzE6iCKysdBpL_EtaskDJRi2PvcQ_T2sQiV6DFWtKpF8PqiIxxzrJ6QDnVbvp3-pBmvrWBOiHK21rqAwoGRdGTy_BP71i60lxlqBN-YAcwEHmjnJ9D8u4eukQCuJynzbNP7tsHxPbFuiF8UizUWv5UiFWtZ9NBCKtmUQ%3D)** TV-Ad will be running in Montana’s major media markets and online. As of now, we’ve been able to put six figures behind the ad, ensuring most voters have a chance to see it. But not everyone consumes media in the same way, **[so the more money we can put behind this ad the more likely people are to see it.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=070368b50c4a4147b88a5a1fc78684e5&_e=8IraUYONXSDZ-1__JbDqJ0CS6YXJu-lG8POf5tzCBBE27G6zwe0oqRTbWZKHWpGbx34LhjawFNRLlcU1SwpSAOiSjJs7vYAwS1OmGy9ezObNNtqQBlcR0XSdHVWisFMGJTe5AYna9TzfqqlT397YO3b-ttKknSb9ptYTa--FDGoWtz8e3qaKfFn1H6ryPxQiVLx0wWzadvGSZP3Nc0pLFmwiL0iKX58dCBGsNv5tSb_gZhPAa1G6dAa-QSn0rLUyC5GLTmHSzE6iCKysdBpL_ElmNBucjioo27pg46GNdrZKyoJ9y5uhFhMvpu8ozrDPSbfCuJzfr7k0GH0V3htW_I-vNroO9sfwn_kLCzjWL8Wz2GGpFtwxhdudVfc8cC3_sAxg2e4q1Zo2t8ER3uzLNjYJIr747eWQuJNLIVEvVUM%3D)**

clean_body: On Friday my campaign started airing our first statewide campaign ad of the election. If you don’t live in Montana, take a moment to check out what we’re hoping everyone in the state sees over the next couple of weeks. | | Peter, It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you today. On Friday, my campaign More folks in Montana know about our campaign now than they did before I entered the race on June 27th, but there are still quite a few voters out there who don’t know enough about me to form an opinion. That’s why for the next couple weeks our TV-Ad will be running in Montana’s major media markets and online. As of now, we’ve been able to put six figures behind the ad, ensuring most voters have a chance to see it. But not everyone consumes media in the same way, and if you like the ad, please consider chipping in a couple bucks to help us keep it up longer than we currently have planned. Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate (Montana) | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. | | As a candidate for Congress in Orange County's 47th, Dom's passion lies in embracing all aspects of society. From the vibrant arts scene to the bustling business world, and the tireless advocates for justice, Dom and our united team stand as the beacon of inclusivity and community. This isn't a campaign of the status quo; it's a movement driven by the people, for the people, and by the people. Our doors are wide open, welcoming all who wish to join forces. Whether you believe in unity as the path forward, see love as the remedy to conquer fear in America, or dream of a better world for the generation being born today, we stand shoulder to shoulder with you. Together, united, we will transform dreams into reality and usher in an era of progress and prosperity for all. Join us, and together, let's make history! Hit the images below and get to know Dom Jones and how you can stay informed, support Dom, volunteer, and donate so that our team can create amazing signs, shirts, and SWAG for you to sport as you support the ethical, and rightful nominee for California's 47th Congressional District in Orange County, CA! Dom has lived in our district for years and deserves for us all to lift her up and stand for us in her fight for justice. Dom Jones is the candidate that we all dream of--a heart of integrity and selfless LOVE for Orange County. Dom is of the best America has to offer!! The Servant Leader, sent to us to serve us!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760aa50a0e32432ab035d3975ad6e2eb&_e=FwK6FONbjIPBFajlhtuFPVXEtLJ2jRRvc8_Y9vpHYeho39oGKW1wZAlFLvsOMP54L8VwOWa8s5Lfy3kUtbEypAs4wSACTFiaI14eFUE_6QD_S3Y4vjKCWgqE4MlfLvPfvMhxPcxLYP_MieLCG7e7mYdT0k5P-c_fAcq7F1sZSLFzxeOk47ZRsUjyOH66lpl6OyWHVjhc8Qu1aOaCcoRbcoXvcMSNpTp9gtAw2XJOJ-gc3biewEXe3u1RiGG1WGbZkNF1TVkaV56z2igqFWZLVgrz50TZ0-u3seqJjdDa2CH6-DqGZit0PDClm6NuUQfPixCHLXPOePODm4zhRL4c6XTxRQ8LiUvxTeNxuwAZqi2dMsr4kuEVnOGsWJ1-KvxHTrT2OBhf55C_fCbUD8LyAohirLacrMCWbr4uHZ1nWXU%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760aa50a0e32432ab035d3975ad6e2eb&_e=FwK6FONbjIPBFajlhtuFPVXEtLJ2jRRvc8_Y9vpHYeho39oGKW1wZAlFLvsOMP54L8VwOWa8s5Lfy3kUtbEypAs4wSACTFiaI14eFUE_6QD_S3Y4vjKCWgqE4MlfLvPfvMhxPcxLYP_MieLCG7e7mYdT0k5P-c_fAcq7F1sZSLFzxeOk47ZRsUjyOH66lpl6OyWHVjhc8Qu1aOaCcoRbcoXvcMSNpTp9gtAw2XJOJ-gc3biewEXe3u1RiGG1WGbZkNF1TVkaV56z2igqFWZLVn4ZIQAcYJJ0LGS7NL3Ac9LJKe2qGuFmhhP18c99a116KmMlTu_Akqcv-YRf6PWEsLHWIksb1za8Mo2T-ZYHl1G0M7ectOKEwQ5txRDead3G06RaX03JcRwpvlJoY9G9cACrS3X679DFdhbVP7bFQP8%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760aa50a0e32432ab035d3975ad6e2eb&_e=FwK6FONbjIPBFajlhtuFPVXEtLJ2jRRvc8_Y9vpHYeho39oGKW1wZAlFLvsOMP54L8VwOWa8s5Lfy3kUtbEypAs4wSACTFiaI14eFUE_6QD_S3Y4vjKCWgqE4MlfLvPfvMhxPcxLYP_MieLCG7e7mYdT0k5P-c_fAcq7F1sZSLFzxeOk47ZRsUjyOH66lpl6OyWHVjhc8Qu1aOaCcoRbcoXvcMSNpTp9gtAw2XJOJ-gc3biewEXe3u1RiGG1WGbZkNF1TVkaV56z2igqFWZLVkr8BvEzyxjuru65AgjNl830lJuk6PS4yX-thKjSUd4fU-Crp8KxmgVIPlnMYJfp9WcjTeM3NcJ8CUNrJrZKK3iMZnAdZXh7OiqwelWt_xRYIgr_k4DAjUCE97-23CFybD_tkE0W_3Btp4li3-ZfolQ%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=760aa50a0e32432ab035d3975ad6e2eb&_e=FwK6FONbjIPBFajlhtuFPVXEtLJ2jRRvc8_Y9vpHYeho39oGKW1wZAlFLvsOMP54L8VwOWa8s5Lfy3kUtbEypAs4wSACTFiaI14eFUE_6QD_S3Y4vjKCWgqE4MlfLvPfvMhxPcxLYP_MieLCG7e7mYdT0k5P-c_fAcq7F1sZSLFzxeOk47ZRsUjyOH66lpl6OyWHVjhc8Qu1aOaCcoRbcoXvcMSNpTp9gtAw2XJOJ-gc3biewEXe3u1RiGG1WGbZkNF1TVkaV56z2igqFWZLVl2KgZJujPH3-EzW92FEbdW8d0o88nR5Y0hinmYGOjX6Dt_9wA_p6ckzfQfbxh2tkmWs8T0BR2O6cAEIewHi_kU6n4AkH7X7VpWGSzIM3e7_oRcVI68WI3jtJmYz8sx0JGa-qGyyeSVfT8EDutnnupg%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Updates from the Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey, it's Becky. I wanted to fill you in on the latest updates in our campaign. | | | | |
---
|
---

Hello friends,
I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me and the team lately. But, today, I wanted to give you a personal update from the trail. It’s been two months since this campaign has started and every day I am overwhelmed at what we have accomplished. I want to personally thank every volunteer who has been willing to help in this journey, including our record-breaking signature gathering efforts.
Just last week, John and I were honored to welcome many of you into our home to thank you personally for your help in that huge effort.
Here are some other updates:
1. We spent the weekend in southern Utah, connecting with voters in St. George and Cedar City.
2. This week, we are hosting events every evening beginning last night in Sevier County and then moving into Davis County and Salt Lake County. Follow us on social media @BeckyForUtah to see when I’ll be in your community!
3. Our fundraising continues to be incredible. Earlier this month, we announced a monumental haul–thanks to grassroots donors like you. For all of July, nearly 400 individual donors gave to this effort. Thank you!
4. We are beginning the effort of distributing lawn signs throughout CD2. I’d love to have a sign in your yard–[will you fill out the form to request one](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=2eb052292f&e=6484bb6dd5) and a member of our team will be in touch!

| [Request a Sign](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e35acd4d15&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
I will continue to make sure we are filling you in on the latest. With just two weeks until ballots drop, I am honored to have you on the team during this home stretch!
Becky Edwards
|
---
#### PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
| | | _Copyright (C) 2023 Becky Edwards for Congress. All rights reserved._

Our mailing address is:
Becky Edwards for CongressPO Box 26141Alexandria, VA 22313-6141

Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=42039c1857&e=6484bb6dd5&c=fcce316184) or [unsubscribe](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=42039c1857&e=6484bb6dd5&c=fcce316184)

---
| | |
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e6bf7bf49ac3482e9092fd0b36d6d0d1&_e=sD698n4HmcwacFgHoFqLrWa8FMLRk5eqNvm7Es80spH2mwagwpXi1eMvwrKAbm20SnEI8r4TM3ltuqdAgQRH5pHZ4PMqwgpz_zeHNEReTgDYVW0aG85zRJyuGu9qCS0f6NYAWiI-PEGY3VsUkC3tFPd9XywrfluiZ7lzKbtIXD67FgKnh0B4UM9z1ZbUhcv-ruJPuKXEIkdOL8oMkYdZZD7hD8zusFtAo0Egui0K3_EsGcbEWer05k5GW4GdXT1C3LI1anRPhy3MEWPkzKkmRDBqRQkCSpA-8YMY58NnjvCp85iv5Pp85MebOCOGgZ7G)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
