As you know, I did nothing wrong. It's well-documented that I told Americans to act "PEACEFULLY" and discouraged the use of any violence. This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls. The entire Biden Administration knows that I'm the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country. But more importantly, they know that I 'm the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they 're hoping that they've finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We’re training the leaders of tomorrow, today
body:
This week, our Youth Civic Engagement Fellows graduate: | | |
---
Friend, If there’s one positive thing that came out of Donald Trump’s presidency, it’s that more people got involved in politics for the first time to fight back against the hate and the harm caused by Trump’s words and actions. **In fact, in the 2020 presidential election, half of all young people ages 18 to 29 voted―an 11 point increase from the 2016 election.** 1 But, young people aren’t just fighting back against hate. **They’re getting involved in the critical issues of our time** , from environmental justice to the labor movement to reforming our criminal legal system to gun violence prevention, clean water, education justice, and more. **To harness this energy, we started our Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship where we train young people ages 14 to 24 on grassroots organizing and communications, with a focus on training young people of color.** **From our past graduating classes, 83% of participants went on to become organizers in their communities** and 100% are either attending or have graduated from college. This week, our latest cohort will graduate from the 2023 class and take their new-found skills back to their communities to help organize for change. Our current graduating class of 12 fellows is 100% BIPOC, 85% female, 7% male, and 7% non-binary. This critical organizing training, and the $1,000 stipend for finishing the course, is made possible through generous donations to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC. [**Donate today to support young people as they seek to give back to their communities and cultivate skills that are critical to the future of our multiracial democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-R0feGI8zGmlGuW4HPPFVL0bUuuiMSyGxIoxfi-Zct4ZOE6toCMEipqcfastxpkNqVPT_yCXsVR8j7weGkssTesFecBYReBMm65B_qYjyEb3TnRuddVgRQpcbDX_adX3jBnYnEE_M_HUXa-f6MkIM_aZAG4-tOrggLTQjZl6odrMiAY_5QbFg3DCoIeE5Q9nUeZ1EuS1i90WV4JuwYDT9LIEzxJc0-agPFd1hbn1D8yXD3LUiDnHhllrYjMG_etZJCufVaGcQatqHFhuSyoVMVCWu37gvcXqy3mUeynSsnoC0ak_MJwpBFVxNnisGWEj_w/3yd/I1neQPbEQkO0OgmPBHMvpw/h0/FEevHBCL_iZdxnmq4lS41Vt6VGbAyHTkqA9c-eF7AMU) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-WlkbPcC26immkg8KnV38-qSOdrOuyTfEqAldE2cs7uwxV-4EbMKPJRMrSEM2BtjrJ-uVQRVvBuJeY0yOipc7VHZ9gBOeMmtLyVa0zdsMnfSWOR9RT5g8s4FShbEeR_TCQt4sqv2Pon7U0mXNBRGZ-0Xj3ADyf2oFIix0XVtYDQ6V2RhDwE85oGSBohqgAmvgTn-LjShfjQ248VambXPUsgI53AfeM_JRMpZg-kWiAcvZX8YLjzFDfu5tiGkJMN-sbDdmm9UmmNizlqcdwEl-xVYeYJqJaTSmxQoor7qfEtNAp907ZSgIYVypdZUL1qA1g/3yd/I1neQPbEQkO0OgmPBHMvpw/h1/iWnrPz3nifF7QO7eIygW6580rYiU2uoEUWHlI8aeKFk)
---
After this week’s Youth Fellowship graduation, **we’ll begin preparing for our third annual Rooted in Community Campaign School** to train, support, and elect women and people of color who are rooted in community.
Traditionally, two-thirds of participants are women, and that’s intentional. We need more women at all levels of government if we’re going to make the urgent, bold changes that people need in order to survive and thrive. And multiple graduates of our Campaign School have won their races for elected office.
Like me, the candidates we’re training want to better serve the communities that raised them. **To ensure that everyone can join—including low-wealth and working-class people—we make this intensive campaign training free for participants.**
[**Pitch in to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today to support young people getting involved in their communities and train future candidates who are ready to run for office and serve their communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-fIjWXlT5y6mk9rkKqwFaUP5QLlI3bxeo7B9sEw7sTHfl_Efxdwa1ZEMH7o_x-3rCV-XDE7IKZ6gM37ghz84Cgr-PJ1dhnWhDIflhjPQtI-1DP5SvFghONhq5hdgSr7dLm2JRu2-KPT0g35IDDaB5qMq-w18z7Bg6V2rmP1X4rzJbN-dtHGV-KbS5ojiV2t1nzcprTRQNGF_7aSd9B1iSK8Mxk7C0bUfeg3JVAyZU-JFXbT0XBQncQzrG_1boO4TfgtTJ6Y4nJFBe-ymI294CU7WE-yIiI9PgeSKp7lzYA_X5hXuE64uhHhRpDp_8AM6NQ/3yd/I1neQPbEQkO0OgmPBHMvpw/h2/AA_kleJ-XCateySJTEH13r5Q6IIUnKXLnpK3Dzmv1W0)

clean_body: This week, our Youth Civic Engagement Fellows graduate: | | | Friend, If there’s one positive thing that came out of Donald Trump’s presidency, it’s that more people got involved in politics for the first time to fight back against the hate and the harm caused by Trump’s words and actions. In fact, in the 2020 presidential election, half of all young people ages 18 to 29 voted―an 11 point increase from the 2016 election. 1 But, young people aren’t just fighting back against hate. They’re getting involved in the critical issues of our time , from environmental justice to the labor movement to reforming our criminal legal system to gun violence prevention, clean water, education justice, and more. To harness this energy, we started our Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship where we train young people ages 14 to 24 on grassroots organizing and communications, with a focus on training young people of color. From our past graduating classes, 83% of participants went on to become organizers in their communities and 100% are either attending or have graduated from college. This week, our latest cohort will graduate from the 2023 class and take their new-found skills back to their communities to help organize for change. Our current graduating class of 12 fellows is 100% BIPOC, 85% female, 7% male, and 7% non-binary. This critical organizing training, and the $1,000 stipend for finishing the course, is made possible through generous donations to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC. | After this week’s Youth Fellowship graduation, we’ll begin preparing for our third annual Rooted in Community Campaign School to train, support, and elect women and people of color who are rooted in community. Traditionally, two-thirds of participants are women, and that’s intentional. We need more women at all levels of government if we’re going to make the urgent, bold changes that people need in order to survive and thrive. And multiple graduates of our Campaign School have won their races for elected office. Like me, the candidates we’re training want to better serve the communities that raised them. To ensure that everyone can join—including low-wealth and working-class people—we make this intensive campaign training free for participants. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for building a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy few. Always serving you, Rashida 1 | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Jane Kwon
subject: One month left to enter OLCV's 2023 Photo Contest!
body:
| | | Dear Peter, I hope you’ve been well! It’s August 1st today, which means **there’s just about a month left for you to show your love for Oregon and**[**enter our Photo Contest**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67442616/419704020/-1049963969?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiYTdkZjYwLWI3MzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KbuzU1u3iSVKpXqfTxs1MFjg9LzQ-gBGUKXZi6dOWDE=&emci=25edd236-9830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3ba7df60-b730-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230). So far, I’ve seen incredible photos from all over our ecologically diverse state**–** from Painted Hills to Brookings. Thanks to everyone who’s already entered the contest!** ** With record-breaking heat, wildfires, and drought consuming our planet and surroundings, I thought I’d share some entries we’ve received of such events and the resilience of our communities this time.

There were fires recently burning in our state, so this photo submitted by Anthony Wellines, who took it while on the job as a firefighter, stuck with me. In SE Portland, OLCV staff members toured the Jade District. Led by Metro Councilor Duncan Hwang and Oregon State Representative Khanh Pham, the tour highlighted community resilience investments in the area, much of which used to be farmland and orchards owned by Asian immigrants and their families. These investments include a community garden for growing culturally significant produce in a predominantly low-income and immigrant neighborhood, transportation improvements, and community solar. Along the Pacific Coast, we’ve seen a declining sea star population [since 2013 due to sea star wasting syndrome](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67442621/419704021/1188705450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiYTdkZjYwLWI3MzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KbuzU1u3iSVKpXqfTxs1MFjg9LzQ-gBGUKXZi6dOWDE=&emci=25edd236-9830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3ba7df60-b730-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230), with scientists believing warm waters may have made them more vulnerable to the disease. But this entry by Colleen Smith from the beach at Carl Washburne State Park appears to show signs of their recovery. Colleen wrote that it “makes [her] happy to see the sea star population returning and the tide pools brimming with life.” Extreme weather events have become so common that it can be depressing. Still, I hope a few of these entries have brought some positivity and that they inspire you to **[submit your own](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67442624/419704022/-1049963969?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiYTdkZjYwLWI3MzAtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KbuzU1u3iSVKpXqfTxs1MFjg9LzQ-gBGUKXZi6dOWDE=&emci=25edd236-9830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3ba7df60-b730-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** photos. I’ll be sharing more entries we receive via email as we approach the deadline for our Photo Contest later this month, so keep an eye out! Looking forward to seeing and sharing your photos,
Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV |
---|---
|
|

**Then, there’s Josh Hawley** — the corrupt politician who cheered on insurrectionists outside the Capitol on January 6th, 2021, then ran for his life like a coward just a few hours later.
Missourians deserve a real warrior for working people representing them in the U.S. Senate — and Lucas is ready to serve.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackinac=20Republican=20Leadership=20Conference?=
subject: Jim Caveziel Coming to Mackinac!!!
body:
MIGOP is thrilled to announce Jim Caveziel as a featured speaker for our upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference. |
---
| |
---
| | | Distinguished Hollywood actor and patriot **_JIM CAVIEZEL_** is joining MIGOP at Mackinac Island!

This is an absolute must-see conference.

The NEW MIGOP, led by the grassroots, is determined to ensure this conference is the best ever. With featured speakers Kari Lake, Dinesh D Souza, and now the awe-inspiring Jim Caveziel, we are confident that the upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference will be one to remember.

Born in Mount Vernon, Washington, Jim Caveziel was one of five children. With a strong passion for sports and religion from a young age, he dreamed of becoming a basketball player in the N.B.A. when fate intervened during his sophomore year, and a foot injury sidelined his dreams.
**_Perhaps God had bigger plans for him._**
Drawn to acting, Jim struggled, landing only minor roles for his first eight years. However, in 1998, he gained critical recognition for his performance in The Thin Red Line, which marked a career turning point. In the following years, he would go on to receive critical raves for his roles in Ride with the Devil, Frequency, and Angel Eyes.

Controversy followed in 2002 when Jim cited his religious beliefs and refused to participate in romantic scenes with co-star Ashley Judd in the film High Crimes, but that backlash was short-lived after Mel Gibson chose him to play the role of Jesus Christ in the movie _The Passion of the Christ_.

In what will forever remain his most powerful performance, The Passion of the Christ garnered significant media attention and broke several box office records, ultimately becoming one of the highest-grossing films of all time.

In 2011, Jim landed the leading role in the crime drama _Person of Interest_. The show became an instant success and one of the highest-rated television shows.

Now Jim is starring as government agent Tim Ballard in the movie _The Sound of Freedom_. Based on a real-life mission that rescued hundreds of kids from sex traffickers in Columbia, the project was rejected by every studio in Hollywood, only to become one of the most successful movies of the year.

Not only is Jim a distinguished actor, but he's an inspiring messenger as well. From his early tales of rejection in Hollywood to his blacklisting after The Passion of the Christ, he continues to walk in faith through his current project — The SOUND OF FREEDOM -- which shines a light on one of the most criminal horrors of our time.

His story is one for the ages, and you don’t want to miss him in Mackinac!

For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please [click here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2bea073816&e=a2af77507c).

We cannot wait to see you at this historic conference.
---
|
---
| [Click Here to BOOK HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS & PURCHASE CONFERENCE TICKETS](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=519942453b&e=a2af77507c "Click Here to BOOK HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS & PURCHASE CONFERENCE TICKETS")
---
| | _**_PRESERVE_ , _PROTECT,_ **and**_DEFEND_ **_the Constitution of the United States
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=cd446fd547&e=a2af77507c "DONATE NOW")
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 Michigan Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Michigan Republican Party3450 Alpine Ave. NWBox 332Grand Rapids, MI 49544
[Add us to your address book](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=79501e8e0f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=79501e8e0f).

body:

**WOW!
_GOP Concerned about 2024 Election ->_**

"GOP fundraising numbers are down, and critical battleground races are struggling to get the funds necessary to fight back against their liberal competitors. The GOP needs to do something QUICK if we're going to gain ground in preparation for the 24' race." -- **GOP OPERATIVE.**

Friend,

We've got to take action QUICK. Critics are noticing that the GOP may not have the strength to INCREASE our House Majority and Take Back America in 2024. Just look at the fundraising numbers for the last quarter -- we could be in BIG TROUBLE...

****In preparation and desperation for what 's to come, we're contacting you with some IMPORTANT INFORMATION.

FEATURED RACE OF THE DAY:

****CONGRESSMAN KEN BUCK: (C0-04)

| [**HELP KEN BUCK**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4d71dd25869c4d31aaa43bd02ee725de&_e=bl0DSUzOQlMGPC6bgGNn22_VvDal7UWqHMsKCcLsLBuaedrdKuC8Ey8W7S9qwqvouCP8qc41Lx8CNibRkN9HZHoZ9G-GoapU7TwmZGcI0AVrZDbtkIZHiu4E7dbNANy6M4wWO0WlZn1oYc1FmAFudHOUxQR0OqOBxr7uoO7ULXZvbFpgOi9trKJT_pVmXkpiuOjn4F6GLK1WJszw9gc8Zu_oj7mwwawBvlOTCgZoD7RoOtQDDr53kt-miVGcc6maez43L8d1RkkOFAE7zzNFC-lXwRoX_106z0QJgt7vujQquXsVrHpLUM3bkaUiJw0pCOeA8ghg4dmiUam448ZfzH7SmLcULVeQLFI_Q7ahVCQ19R2-6dhZUT-gEpV-C53V)

**NOW -- A MESSAGE FROM TEAM BUCK ->**

name: Will Hurd
subject: Why is he running?
body:
... he's running to stay out of prison| | | Well it's official...again. He's been indicted for a third time. The selfish, unhinged rhetoric of Donald Trump needs to stop, folks. If I haven't already, I want to make myself crystal clear... _**Trump's presidential bid is driven by an attempt to stay out of prison and scam his supporters into footing his legal bills. **_ He's not running to make America great again. Hell, he's not even running to win. We've already seen he can't beat Joe Biden. _**Donald Trump is simply running to stay out of prison. **_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=4ced2b5c31dc41c890d097988002217c&_e=rRZQgqXQjGavOWQ96Lma7wwX9ZHfC1TT5rR6orFLROmFAA-J7ta8nb5yLm5UZviCkeIGa0jXa5_bhA62AO262f-_lq_rS7dYMK8jXGfMR56w_6ey-XUnN4X6Ub8B7r0haHWObJ8KtZLeUISeBxFLbifNGuPA6kuRWZDqqfBcQnWazAtFXn_Hcppfj9pYGueYfdOHrwi40LSj6bcNRW-YCXi3CAfYv-xhZLyW0ihjDO4koWM7X3XeBI-jVAe8XFnoe-uAPMHv2fuvwUZm4yhB_WoP7rqnj7SHAeTwLXVOn_2Ydwc1kWvPx_v7LqkVXRtdn_m-mR9FZh31qubgY8R3MQAeg5iZpGSNRHXvO39GoeaG_NXT2YoOk-QhTR_FT_O1nyOiL3wapctiREHqx1QL_Q%3D%3D)
---
Trump has framed himself as the ultimate victim. He always mocks "leftist tears"... but all we've heard him do for the last 3 years is whine and cry about a so-called fraudulent and stolen election that wasn't fraudulent or stolen. _**This guy only cares about himself. The Trump from 2016, who rallied the base and made the election about the silent majority is gone.**_ As Republicans, we need to prioritize offering solutions to difficult issues. _**We can't allow ourselves to be burdened with Trump's baggage. **_ The fact is, if we allow Trump to win the Primary Election, we are willingly giving Joe Biden another 4 years in the White House – and as I said in Iowa, _**America can't handle that. **_ **[Let's focus on leaders who can genuinely guide our nation toward a brighter future. Help me qualify for the debate so I can tell the truth to Trump's face. All I ask is $1 if you haven't donated yet.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=4ced2b5c31dc41c890d097988002217c&_e=rRZQgqXQjGavOWQ96Lma7wwX9ZHfC1TT5rR6orFLROmFAA-J7ta8nb5yLm5UZviCkeIGa0jXa5_bhA62AO262f-_lq_rS7dYMK8jXGfMR56w_6ey-XUnN4X6Ub8B7r0haHWObJ8KtZLeUISeBxFLbifNGuPA6kuRWZDqqfBcQnWazAtFXn_Hcppfj9pYGueYfdOHrwi40LSj6bcNRW-YCXi3CAfYv-xhZLyW0ihjDO4koWM7X3XeBI-jVAe8XFnosNIBy-iRbesS9tG4FzjP0bWszBUsm4D1ODJDPQJl2uAWdDwK-2hqPTlWuYM4AC0W-Xsrj3jeGSTHkCJaG4irl5Lxk9Df70z9T4hwWSDk3IfTSCnjPDFFnUY_rMVAQxR4OTObujJmye5_HwDYlS13sA%3D%3D)** Thank you, **Will Hurd
** _Candidate for President & Former TX Congressman_ _P.S. If you've already contributed, please ask 3 friends today to rush just $1 to my campaign._
---

clean_body: Folks, the GOP launched a HUGE attack on voting rights (and they’re hoping you didn’t notice) → [] Will you chip in $10 now to help Democratic Secretaries of State fight back against the GOP’s anti-voter schemes by protecting voting rights at the state level ASAP? [] Chip in $10 >> [] Folks, the GOP’s new Americans Confidence in Elections Act is EVERYTHING we’ve been warning you about: This massive bill contains over 50 separate anti-voter propositions: [] → Increasing voter roll purges, → Tightening biased election rules, → Loosening campaign finance regulations, → And so much more. Their plan? [] Use the bill to GUT voter protections in Washington, DC (where Congress has jurisdiction) and give state Republicans the ultimate blueprint for their OWN horrifying anti-voter laws. [] Our pro-voter Democratic secretaries are ALREADY fighting to stop a rollback of our voting rights – but they need your help to keep it up! Please, will you chip in $10 - or whatever you can afford - today? [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in $250 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [] CHIP IN $5 >> []

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: The numbers are in, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
Peter, as Heidi's team, we're number people. So, we ran the reports, poured over the books, and put it all together for you.
Since Heidi is a former professional singer/songwriter, we thought a Campaign Wrapped would be perfect!
Our volunteers have :
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
This is a volunteer shout-out, and they really deserve it!
We want to share some of our favorite door-knocking moments from the campaign trail, but first—our election is in just TWO DAYS. Peter, can you chip in now to help us knock doors through Election Day? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
GIVE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
Peter, here are some wholesome moments from the campaign trail:
“I enjoyed speaking to a lot of undecided voters about strong issues that matter like education and traffic!”
“Sydney (one of our volunteers) was asked by someone in the neighborhood not on her canvass list if she could have any extra yard signs, which she was able to immediately deliver!"
On behalf of all of us on Team Heidi, we are so grateful to have such an amazing group of supporters standing behind us.
But this is the final stretch, and we need your help to make sure we can keep Getting Out The Vote until polls close on Thursday. Peter, will you donate to keep us pushing? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
KEEP US PUSHING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
With gratitude,
Team Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230801_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

We don’t need to tell you how much is at stake in 2024.

We’ve seen just how much havoc the extreme Republicans in Congress have caused with their _razor-thin_ majority in the House.

Last year, we saw a **_10% drop_** in Black voter turnout in the midterms compared to 2018.

And with the GOP working overtime to restrict voting rights across the country and deny voters the right to elect their representatives, **it’s more important than ever that we make sure our top supporters are getting out to vote!**

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, We don’t need to tell you how much is at stake in 2024. We’ve seen just how much havoc the extreme Republicans in Congress have caused with their razor-thin majority in the House. Last year, we saw a 10% drop in Black voter turnout in the midterms compared to 2018. And with the GOP working overtime to restrict voting rights across the country and deny voters the right to elect their representatives, it’s more important than ever that we make sure our top supporters are getting out to vote! | | | ---|--- Thanks for your input, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via .
